body:
HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE: IT’S TIME TO RETIRE.
Fellow American - Talk about a man of the people!

Over the weekend, a shocking new report was released detailing the spending habits of West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin. **Manchin has been spending top dollar to dine out with friends and family from Special Interest Groups determined to keep him in the Senate.**

Joe Manchin has tried to cultivate a "man of the people" persona to aid him in his reelection campaigns from the very Republican state of West Virginia.

Up until now, it's worked.

**In 2018, Manchin won reelection to the Senate as a Democrat by 3 points - _a state President Trump won by more than 38 points two years later._**

Joe Manchin is the only statewide elected Democrat in West Virginia and the only Democrat who could plausibly hold onto this seat. His popularity stems from decades in West Virginia politics, including two successful campaigns for governor. But Washington has changed Joe Manchin ...

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28a3557c91ee401dbf015256583aea6e&_e=5uFBYjPQZoGS3Z5ctK0VN50wrqe55L91eyUr1WLbrFcUVilHhFjD7opI_BABQVScVmuvyYUy5mk_eBPePa8b4EyJnb2EPDqUyBk6bKb4M3-m1xf6GQXyxu5XSKTmTWkg9AxAxZ_qMUZmkApW5dAYkoTFWsZTywEIqPaaAXzFvwr6cmvM1CaaW3sVOEag_PoPxJx4XcUVM5K5nyHc87kRcKK1wNsAIqxwI38Rtcv0SGfmgH18Lnq_4G6rcM_Pkna1I1LizbLUtsDxkq6HRfRA-cn81ah2zsugzoncgRoERjzIYbQ-Y9lOrdF0I4kQTAjN4HRtqOh7-Qa7KMauSZ8wGnwHzjFulTkZDZkM9gFp2e1Q7nZBG3htBT9rrU68qDadFWzHqfTLYIhCHDIZoYrwnX7WIZ6JXEpp_iLEYqqopBvBwV0n_n06u53kxCh3OcfO)
These figures are shocking given the average annual income in West Virginia is just $26,187! What would the voters who have supported Manchin through the years have to say if they knew he was busy spending his time in Washington wining and dining government bureaucrats to the tune of $1 million??? **[Well, we're counting on you to help us get the word out.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28a3557c91ee401dbf015256583aea6e&_e=5uFBYjPQZoGS3Z5ctK0VN50wrqe55L91eyUr1WLbrFcUVilHhFjD7opI_BABQVScVmuvyYUy5mk_eBPePa8b4EyJnb2EPDqUyBk6bKb4M3-m1xf6GQXyxu5XSKTmTWkg9AxAxZ_qMUZmkApW5dAYkoTFWsZTywEIqPaaAXzFvwr6cmvM1CaaW3sVOEag_PoPxJx4XcUVM5K5nyHc87kRcKK1wNsAIqxwI38Rtcv0SGfmgH18Lnq_4G6rcM_Pkna1I1LizbLUtsDxkq6HRfRA-cn81ah2zsugzoncgRoERjyvXhAbQbSsdJlWnzvlMoefea-GBUTter1q9XvgLbJdaVhuXq7x_oXDRjhFn8eJeJFEkyIPnyrW_qvwmMND4zm44CmYjk1zJBUM31Xya5xKFM_BAqwrcIgje7wS8uA0curoiKiqanr3Pi25g6tENQkA)**

| [** HELP US RETIRE JOE MANCHIN >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28a3557c91ee401dbf015256583aea6e&_e=5uFBYjPQZoGS3Z5ctK0VN50wrqe55L91eyUr1WLbrFcUVilHhFjD7opI_BABQVScVmuvyYUy5mk_eBPePa8b4EyJnb2EPDqUyBk6bKb4M3-m1xf6GQXyxu5XSKTmTWkg9AxAxZ_qMUZmkApW5dAYkoTFWsZTywEIqPaaAXzFvwr6cmvM1CaaW3sVOEag_PoPxJx4XcUVM5K5nyHc87kRcKK1wNsAIqxwI38Rtcv0SGfmgH18Lnq_4G6rcM_Pkna1I1LizbLUtsDxkq6HRfRA-cn81ah2zsugzoncgRoERjx2qDtHFJYrGSPiTojJTk6wwyKCjnO3GZq7_woLEUkolIN7C81ncnLgREprDXryRZHdU4x-iXQQzxkoLVxt7ieTpskVIuX6Tm3g3dwShWme1e8JSrFCJmNb1saa5z6zqfojKOZ2YKUZnypbK35JneSy)

❌ | | $20,000 at an upmarket seafood restaurant
---|---|---
❌ | | $10,000 at the Capital Grill
❌ | | $7,000 at a DC French bistro
❌ | | $6,000 at an Italian restaurant on Capitol Hill
❌ | | $20,000 at a 5-star hotel in Aspen
❌ | | $15,000 at an exclusive country club in Houston, Texas

**We need your help to West Virginia voters to deliver a simple message about Senator Manchin:_"Does a man who spends $10,000 at a "tuxedo-clad" D.C. seafood hotspot represent YOU?_**

[** _HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE:_
IT'S TIME TO RETIRE. **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28a3557c91ee401dbf015256583aea6e&_e=5uFBYjPQZoGS3Z5ctK0VN50wrqe55L91eyUr1WLbrFcUVilHhFjD7opI_BABQVScVmuvyYUy5mk_eBPePa8b4EyJnb2EPDqUyBk6bKb4M3-m1xf6GQXyxu5XSKTmTWkg9AxAxZ_qMUZmkApW5dAYkoTFWsZTywEIqPaaAXzFvwr6cmvM1CaaW3sVOEag_PoPxJx4XcUVM5K5nyHc87kRcKK1wNsAIqxwI38Rtcv0SGfmgH18Lnq_4G6rcM_Pkna1I1LizbLUtsDxkq6HRfRA-cn81ah2zsugzoncgRoERjwMsfVItvn5tMeMZT_hMlhuT6SQUn7JkTKyEylJ0vhc3q1K_JXuQZXO0HJ72sSjaaqVQwWal8jTL2pfGPJcEeabSVuGKVNs3DFULAIf1tyF6QROlBJeWkCwrRBRrzgtjCZsueVGXHwvUnOfceC5G1h4)

When politicians lose touch with where they came from and lose contact with the voters who elected them to positions of power, _**it's time to hang up the hat.**_

Fellow American, help us expose Joe Manchin for living the jet-set life while his constituents struggle to make ends meet. **[Sign our petition calling for Joe Manchin to retire ahead of the next Senate election.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28a3557c91ee401dbf015256583aea6e&_e=5uFBYjPQZoGS3Z5ctK0VN50wrqe55L91eyUr1WLbrFcUVilHhFjD7opI_BABQVScVmuvyYUy5mk_eBPePa8b4EyJnb2EPDqUyBk6bKb4M3-m1xf6GQXyxu5XSKTmTWkg9AxAxZ_qMUZmkApW5dAYkoTFWsZTywEIqPaaAXzFvwr6cmvM1CaaW3sVOEag_PoPxJx4XcUVM5K5nyHc87kRcKK1wNsAIqxwI38Rtcv0SGfmgH18Lnq_4G6rcM_Pkna1I1LizbLUtsDxkq6HRfRA-cn81ah2zsugzoncgRoERjxPgMNalhTEle0Au0jddxGs-0MS97sA9tRJg8pk0CD576qi75fy_n7r3-m-5rhCxG9ymxQDdjoqF8TpztOchS3v0W4VmuzenyaS7xPtRNN4ZzIGu7z_gkrQOZdc_0ahffun_FvRYaA9sGjXZSpfR9hd)**

NRSC Political Team

body:
I had to personally reach out to ask for your urgent support ahead of tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline. Here’s why:
* Republicans only need to win two more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that.
* Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in two decades — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity to flip the Senate next.
* **My team just let me know that we’re on track to fall short of tonight’s $25,000 fundraising goal, and missing a critical goal like this would signal to Mitch McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable.**

**I know we can turn this around, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right away. clean_body: Taking back the Senate Majority starts now | Peter, It's me, Marco Rubio. Republicans took back the House Majority in November. Now, we need to take back our Senate Majority in 2024. That starts with supporting GOP Senators like Ted Budd, so we can show the American people what strong leadership in the Senate looks like. Then, and only then, can we expect the American people to vote for Republicans to secure the Senate Majority. | It's so important that we begin gearing up to take back the Senate NOW. I know I can count on our grassroots supporters like you. Please don't let me down, Peter. \- Marco Rubio Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Peter,
Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is an emerging threat facing our democracy.

By using tactics to re-engineer election systems, confuse voters, and suppress the vote, dark money funded special interest groups are able to manipulate election outcomes.

Elections have different results when fewer constituents vote than when more people who accurately represent the community do.

Democracy is supposed to give every voice an equal chance to be heard. That’s why we started Preserve Democracy.

Elected officials are supposed to represent the People, which means all People deserve to be heard. So, election systems should be easy to understand and accessible to everyone.

If we want the People to elect our leaders, rather than the Dark Money special interest groups, we must Preserve Democracy.

If we want to win elections again, rather than be told by Outside Money who our new leaders will be, we must Preserve Democracy.
Join Our Movement to Preserve Democracy Today >>>

clean_body: | | | | It’ll Take All of Us. | Peter, Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is an emerging threat facing our democracy. By using tactics to re-engineer election systems, confuse voters, and suppress the vote, dark money funded special interest groups are able to manipulate election outcomes. Elections have different results when fewer constituents vote than when more people who accurately represent the community do. Democracy is supposed to give every voice an equal chance to be heard. That’s why we started Preserve Democracy. Elected officials are supposed to represent the People, which means all People deserve to be heard. So, election systems should be easy to understand and accessible to everyone. If we want the People to elect our leaders, rather than the Dark Money special interest groups, we must Preserve Democracy. If we want to win elections again, rather than be told by Outside Money who our new leaders will be, we must Preserve Democracy. Join Our Movement to Preserve Democracy Today >>> | | | | | | | Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | =

Friend,
I will always tell you the TRUTH.

Republicans did NOT live up to expectations in the midterms.
And it certainly wasn’t because of me. 233 of my 255 endorsed candidates WON.

So, what happened in the other 22 races?
...**_The Old Broken Crow, Mitch McConnell, abandoned our great candidates and instead spent MILLIONS of dollars to fuel Republican infighting._**
We can __NEVER__ let that happen again.
**That’s why I’m asking voters like YOU to participate in an AUDIT of the midterms to ensure that the Republican Party is once again beholden to _YOU._**
** ** _**[Please take my AUDIT THE MIDTERMS SURVEY immediately.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMlugzAURb_G7EDm4YEsWCSl2UTqqpOyiRwPYIoNApMof1-D0kqWJZ97_Yarq5xxwnYEl3miKpAlSJnYCjAUOAeGMeG0yGjBc1HkEpuSgrpiRPDd-kwNXvSqC9PixkwOLmkrrqNOcsWBSEWNLo0wWF1NzowmVIqkr9oQxhkVewTHeGYtl0lnsdyk1VpkZeKmU-H0ZKVIu8H6kJrFq0nY2fomjSZnQ9A6WilnhCoaZ6KyMARQcVyCuzit7OJQUWsnbI-ArXAelknqCKW9iCeTwo3CNj7S5870Txl80D5EocwZi_Die6vis1XNu-8-HuXrBlur4ja1O5c_AZ8_d8lUqfFu-97OjMegmnWCLZ3YqrfmUSF-QADbP4AtCDiRw_cbO32d6rS7jfu0ZpTcVxVe4h0eo_63Pqtkz80A8foXOZ-NJg)**_

These are the same “geniuses” who once wrote an autopsy, saying that Republicans needed to go “SOFT” on illegal immigration to win the White House.
But we showed the establishment just how dumb they truly are...

In 2016, the American People ripped that autopsy to shreds by electing your favorite President – the man who promised to BUILD THE WALL and crack down on illegal immigration like never before.
We won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin for the FIRST time since the ‘80s!

Republicans had never even dreamed of winning these states.
But it was our America First message that promised to protect our borders, our jobs, and our American way of life that led to the greatest political movement in history.

Together, we stood up to the establishment RINOs who, frankly, aren’t that different from the Democrats.
But now, we need to do it once again, Friend.

**_I need YOU to remind the Old Broken Crow of the GOP and his RINO allies that our Party belongs to We The People – _and no one else.__** **[So please, take my AUDIT THE MIDTERMS SURVEY to ensure that the Republican Party is once again beholden to YOU.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kM1ugzAQhJ_G3EBm_QcHDklRLpF6qZK2uUSObRKn2CAwQXn7GpRWsiz52_Xszpgq54LykuIiT3QFqgClElsBBoJz4BhTwUjGiMglyRVuCgb6ghHFs_WZ7rxs9T0Mk-sz1bnkVjFdElESMCUmkpclF5pfOIVS4lxLKZK2uoXQj4hsEOziGY2aBpNFucHoRWRh8mFS6cxglUzvnfUhbSavB2lH669pbHI2BGNiKxOcMs3iTkyRhgIiuym4szPaTg6R2jhpWwR8gWM3DcpEqOxZvpiSrpf26iN9eWZ_lc4H40MsFDnnEZ59a3V8HkV4Hr7nD3lY4c3q6KZ2p-In4NOxTIZK97NtWztyEYO6Lhus6cRRrW2eFRJbBLD-A1iDgD3dfr3z_ee-Tu-PfpPWnNF5qcJbvMOzN_-tL5Xs5QyQqH8B8TiLhA)**

Together, we stood up to the establishment RINOs who, frankly, aren’t that different from the Democrats. But now, we need to do it once again, Friend. I need YOU to remind the Old Broken Crow of the GOP and his RINO allies that our Party belongs to We The People – and no one else. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America.

subject: Talk about out of touch

body:
Republicans are proving what they really stand for. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57802700/389144800/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230125_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNDUyOC0xNjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=21tDwu_va_3KOb7WVyylnM7HGyjVI1h7BajnHY9hpbs=&emci=e313019c-f99c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6eea4528-169d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Folks, We’re back at work in the Democrat-held Senate to fight for workers and families. Meanwhile, House Republicans have passed anti-abortion measures and pitched a 30% national sales tax on everyday expenses like gas and groceries. **Talk about out of touch.** It’s our job as leaders to address the issues on the minds of New Mexicans and folks across the country, from the lack of affordable housing to improving public safety. Yet Republicans are focused on putting more obstacles in Americans’ way. That’s the kind of future Republicans will enact if they win back the Senate and the White House next year. In fact, Mitch McConnell’s Republican allies have already started launching attack ads against vulnerable Senate Democrats. We need to start preparing _now_ to defend 23 Senate seats — including mine in New Mexico. **That’s why it’s so important my campaign meets our first end-of-month goal of the year. Can you pitch in $10 to power our work to defend the Senate majority so we can continue delivering results for folks in New Mexico and across the country?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57802701/389144801/1676867679?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230125_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNDUyOC0xNjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=21tDwu_va_3KOb7WVyylnM7HGyjVI1h7BajnHY9hpbs=)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Are You Done Fighting?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Are you done fighting? I ask that question because this battle for our liberty just got much, much more serious. We now know the Radical Democrat agenda and its even worse than we initially imagined. **Governor Walz' budget is going to grow our already bloated state government by 25%. He's going to spend the vast majority of the surplus. And get this...he's even going to RAISE YOUR TAXES!** On top of that, Walz and the Radical Democrat Party is voting for the nation's most extreme abortion bill this Friday in the Senate. And Walz just mentioned that he wants to come for our guns as well. Are you familiar with the social credit system in Communist China? Well, it seems as though the initial architecture of that is in one of the Democrats' bill which would put more money in a data system to track "biased" speech. We discussed that on yesterday's The Truth Hurts Show: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfCpHjgJ_1THUlAXOC50t66JOnPLFVLK5O6_vzYUTNbJ2S4h1_CrGTC-cHtN3mHidbJXjKv0DK9S_quxgK_0Zk7llkuvmy7N5aqQNq1gEJioq&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=2) We should not be surprised by any of this. After all, it's the politician's objective to gain more power and control over our lives. They don't believe in health freedom - they believe in vaccine mandates! They don't believe in the right to keep and bear arms - they believe in gun registration and a defenseless electorate. They don't believe in personal property - they believe in government's ownership of wealth. _"You will own nothing and you will be happy."_ The global, leftist agenda is a serious threat to us all. And now the frontlines of the implementation of that agenda is right here in Minnesota. Tim Walz and the Radical Democrats in this state are coming for everything. They are not shy about their radical plans. So the question I have for you is what are you going to do about it? Are you going to watch this radical transformation happen or are **YOU READY TO FIGHT AGAINST IT?**! We don't really have an option here, unless your house is on the market and the moving truck is already reserved. I personally have invested in this state with my business and my family. It's not so simple for people like me to pick up and leave. And I'm guessing you are in the same boat. What I need of you is your help to **fund our field operations**. I'm assuming you don't have time to go door knock in the Iron Range or along the North Dakota border, pressuring vulnerable Democrat politicians. But I have those people at the ready. And I'm guessing you can't give up eight hours this Friday to make phone calls to targeted districts. But I know the young liberty professionals who can. What I need from you is important. I need your help to put these young liberty professionals in the fight to STOP THE RADICAL LEFTWING AGENDA NOW! Do you have $50 you can send IMMEDIATELY so I can hire those doorknockers and phone callers who will put the pressure on these vulnerable Democrats?!?! **Please, I'm begging you, reach into your pocket and help me fund this operation. We're the last line of defense against this Radical Leftwing agenda!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=3)
---
I can't stress how important our battle is right now.
We're the only group here willing to do what is needed to STOP the radicals in their footsteps.
If we fail, there's no one coming here to save us.
**Here's what we are facing with the Radical Democrat agenda:**
**\- Higher taxes**
**\- Increase in car tabs**
**\- Our overtaxed surplus money spent on wasteful projects**
**\- More tax money funneled though fraudulent non-profit groups**
**\- "Biased" speech reporting system**
**\- Abortion in all cases, up to the moment of birth**
**\- Anti-gun laws that disarm us**
I really need your help to fight back against this agenda. It won't be easy and it will take A LOT of money.
We know how to be effective and win in politics. That's how we Ended Walz' Emergency Powers in 2021.
So please, help me fund this extremely important mission.
[**Reach into your pocket and help fund our field operations with a $25, $50, $100 or $500 donation IMMEDIATELY!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=4)
Thank you in advance!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting&n=7), software for leaders.

subject: I’m officially running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERY STATE (WWW
body:
He’s the coward who pumped his fist at insurrectionists outside the Capitol on January 6th, then ran for his life hours later. |
---
| | Derek — Josh Hawley is up for re-election to the U.S. Senate in 2024 — and I’m the 13-year Marine veteran who’s going to replace him.

[**Watch our brand new launch video, then become one of the first founding donors of our grassroots movement by splitting a donation between me and EVERY STATE today.**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=b1500bfe9c&e=f653f65525)
---
| [ ](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=989f5a3187&e=f653f65525)
---
| [WATCH THE LAUNCH VIDEO >>](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=ad34655261&e=f653f65525 "WATCH THE LAUNCH VIDEO >>")
---
| **You know Josh Hawley.** He’s been climbing the ladder in Missouri to become another corrupt, career politician. [**But here’s where you’ll best recognize him:**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=8707820a56&e=f653f65525)
---
| [ ](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=f8661c3861&e=f653f65525)
---
| He’s the guy who pumped his fist at insurrectionists outside the Capitol on January 6th, then ran for his life just a few hours later. [**When things get tough, Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — not run away like a coward.**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=f04425a830&e=f653f65525) [**If you’re ready to send a real warrior for working people to the U.S. Senate, I need you on my team. Can I count on you to become a founding donor to my grassroots campaign by splitting a donation between me and EVERY STATE today?**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=6798cee659&e=f653f65525)

---
| [DONATE $12 NOW ➜](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=41caf3457c&e=f653f65525 "DONATE $12 NOW ➜")

| In 2024, we’ll have a real shot to take back power from corrupt politicians and corporate elites like Josh Hawley. This is our chance to put everyday working people in charge of our country.

_Lucas Kunce_

name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: Ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15221?t=6&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP) I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

FOlks, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $3 whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Ron Be Gone to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start: »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15212?t=8&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15218?t=14&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15219?t=15&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15220?t=16&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP)
I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight.

And it’s up to all of us to fight back.

— Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1662%2E564421%2EoETAPP).**

subject: Accountable: (Of a person, organization, or institution) required or expected to justify actions or decisions; responsible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Adam refuses to let MAGA Republicans off the hook — he has always held them accountable for their abuses of power and their unethical conduct, and he doesn’t plan on stopping now.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1645%2E5257348%2Ea-moBx)
Derek, there is nothing MAGA Republicans fear more than **accountability.**
**Accountability** for gun violence, with gun deaths the leading cause of death for children.
**Accountability** for decades of climate denial.
**Accountability** for voter suppression — and indeed their attacks on our democracy itself.
**Accountability** for lies and conspiracy theories — and endangering national security.
On these issues and many others, they want us to _just shut up about it already._
Well, that’s not how democracy works. Adam refuses to let MAGA Republicans off the hook — he has always held them accountable for their abuses of power and their unethical conduct, and he doesn’t plan on stopping now.
Even with MAGA Republicans kicking him off the House Intelligence Committee.
**[If you support Adam’s continuing efforts to hold Republicans accountable — _if you want to fight back_ — please consider chipping in $3 or more to our campaign today, and help us respond to the MAGA movement’s egregious actions:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jan2023_abs_em.S2MzIc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230125_PM3_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1645%2E5257348%2Ea-moBx)**

Derek, there is nothing MAGA Republicans fear more than accountability. Accountability for gun violence, with gun deaths the leading cause of death for children. Accountability for decades of climate denial. Accountability for voter suppression — and indeed their attacks on our democracy itself. Accountability for lies and conspiracy theories — and endangering national security. On these issues and many others, they want us to just shut up about it already. Well, that’s not how democracy works. Adam refuses to let MAGA Republicans off the hook — he has always held them accountable for their abuses of power and their unethical conduct, and he doesn’t plan on stopping now. 3 days. 2 shootings. 18+ dead Californians. Both targeting the Asian-American community.

And yet, MAGA Republicans in the House majority are STILL holding up critical gun control legislation to stop the next mass shooting. It’s pathetic, cowardly, and incomprehensible.

It breaks my heart that we can't turn back the clock and bring those innocent Americans back. **But if we can funnel our anger and pain into real action,_we can try to stop the next one._**

I’m a proud supporter of stronger gun control reform. It’s earned me an “F” from the NRA – but I’m not backing down.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core.**As a fellow conservative American, you simply cannot afford to ignore what’s happening to our country.** [**That’s why I’m offering you a copy of my explosive new book that exposes the far-left’s evil plot – _FINAL BATTLE: the Next Election Could be the Last._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk756d2vpjfnrhmhiqbpc0kp4rifuobbqt4246p8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq2d1jeiojb85nm9rret5hebqq6cjl6kojfddlkoqj7cbl69rqcd336tge2cb4chh32dhi64p38cr26koe0pv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9p69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf52m9iasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64pj0chh66pui24bhfk8gicb1fkoi2q85cluiak9pfk2k2mi184shqep238h1e8he4933ctgmepj0c3gm0oh5u)

| | This is a can’t-miss deal that I pray you take advantage of today.My name is David Horowitz. I wrote **_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ **because I’m committed to ending the reign of far-left Marxist elites._Why?_ Well, 50 years ago... I _was_ a Marxist.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkid85kgvfgijb1pu4rvlj5b0ldpia6rhref6bmo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq2d1jeiojb85nm9rret5hebqq6cjl6kojfddlkoqj7cbl69rqcd336tge2cb4chh32dhi64p38cr26koe0pv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9p69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf52m9iasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64pj0chh66pui24bhfk8gicb1fkoi2q85cluiak9pfk2k2mi184shqep238h1e8he4933ctgmepj0c3gm0oh5u)
---
| | I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj7aaj44abcs4g43hnjiocn22od5isop3f2r9lbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctj60o76cjh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him.But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._**We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this.[**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo035vbvk6ogpf6did51vjp1dvc7cvg3nifh8b5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctj60o76cjh2bs) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg63nl0rbn5fbl71qqjn1bc9c23o1o9cga4un7m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctj60o76cjh2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfnof9rnn0p56n27ruq0shioea7tthbgdi45o64g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctj60o76cjh2bs) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel
---

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkiti72lfgmvrjsk5a8dmvfiqkefirfjirruc248_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctj60o76cjh2bs)

He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him.But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways.Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family.We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel | | | © Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... For the past two years, conservatives have held the line against Biden's socialist agenda. And we're not done standing tall. We are not backing down. Across America, people are waking up to Biden's failed agenda. Our nation is at an inflection point. Let's keep up the pressure on our new Republican Congress, and make sure they are listening to "we the people." We can 't do it without you. Our activists on the ground in battleground states rely on your support as they defend our values, protect our communities, restore parental rights, and demand transparency in our electoral system so we know each legal vote counts this November. With these out-of-control Liberals in the White House, the House, and the Senate using their power to crack down on anyone who challenges their radical agenda, it's never been more important to fight back. We must continue working for the policies that matter on the state and federal levels, and we're doing the hard work to advance the conservative agenda every chance we get. Because we know the truth: everything we care about is on the line. Our children. Our schools. Our sovereignty. Our voting rights. It all comes down to the work we do together. And we just can't afford to come up short. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7825%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DCR9%2b%2bPNcJg0Zm4XczM9GA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93040%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DtWeQ3Elqp7EyHhNyEyMjg&sysid=1) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93041%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Phscdnn8ACMR0S%2fZf9iyJQ&sysid=1) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93042%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jEaQWS856JWdnajiq1BTNw&sysid=1) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93043%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fa8Rp9ysqbeTLEHKH61%2fJQ&sysid=1) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE
**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93044%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0d%2b9m6VsF9p4Tf%2fuhDUntA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93155%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CKb6OQeBj0TFO8wv0yYNBA&sysid=1)
---
[_Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation._](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93156%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wqX1ToQvWcXBad3FVxK%2bRQ&sysid=1) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jn1oDsFevtcIs%2bg%2bRu%2fM9w&sysid=1)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4DTiBPLBFEwpcmXh1ukjyA&sysid=1)
---

body:
2024 Starts Today! In order to win the White House in 2024, it is vital that the largest voting bloc in America turns out to vote. The largest votin

## 2024 Starts Today!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10054.1.dcfa0be5fdcc067544093e4ad49e0bae)
---
In order to win the **White House** in 2024, it is vital that the largest voting bloc in America turns out to vote.
**The largest voting bloc in America is the Christian vote** by far. Unfortunately, many Christians stay home and do not vote.
If we are going to win in 2024 we must get Christians out to vote.
I believe the **best way to mobilize Christians is by mobilizing their Pastors**.
This is why I formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10055.1.f2c1ce8c4f1b7d42a45f362920f20733).
We are growing everyday leading up to the 2024 election, but I need your help.
Some prominent Evangelical Leaders have turned their backs on **President Trump** lately and **President Trump** really needs our help right now.
We need to reach more Pastors across America and that takes funding.
Some great Patriots have come beside [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10056.1.e6fa0abe962279bf8920ad8174c245f0) to help in this effort.
[Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10057.1.be646ae8d595da5f6f7cef6c1fa94b3e) will be hosting a prize drawing at the end of February with some incredible giveaways.
**Item #1** \- A FREE Trip to the **ReAwaken America Tour w/Eric Trump, Gen. Flynn, Roger Stone, Mike Lindell** and others in either Miami, FL or Las Vegas, NV.
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10058.1.5fad10b074a9d618e8b5fcd9225b42ae)
---
The winner of the **ReAwaken America Tour** trip will choose either Miami, FL on May 12-13 or Las Vegas, NV on August 25-26.
This giveaway will include a **VIP Meet & Greet Pass** ($500 value) to meet all the speakers as well as **flight** and **hotel accommodations**.
**Item #2** \- **Signed General Michael Flynn baseball bat**.
General Flynn is a huge supporter of [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10059.1.8486e1a5f143767762d9f82e5d77c537) because he recognizes the importance of Christians being involved in our politics.
This giveaway will include the baseball bat **signed by General Flynn** which will be shipped directly to the winner.
**HOW TO ENTER FOR THE GIVEAWAYS:**
Every $20 donation to [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10060.1.d6afd923f7ba3d4f32424eb2b60ac9bc) will result in 1 entry into the drawing from today through February 28.
Ex: $20 donation = 1 entry
$100 donation = 5 entries.
$1000 donation = 50 entries
Drawing will take place on Tuesday, Feb 28. Winners will receive email notification.
Enter to win by making a donation at [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10061.1.9d6ae23f7ceee92ae0ede33dd6c83f5d)
**Let's Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again.**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Why is that the case and why is this a major problem?

A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10077.1.4dbdb2eb83b92fde52e281a2f0a1320e) and when you register an email will be sent to you prior to the Zoom Conference Call with the link and details of how to join.
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.

Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10083.1.054b5c2329209da64b24b0ea059bbb2f) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10084.1.45fb9e45c97c2410315dbc129b7de1ee) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10085.1.e809a3568cd8c32519c806b9f3e9b7a7) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10086.1.4a532f70581b8ab8948ba5b0f15bf437) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17201220.10087.1.9d983c24115a5045e8377b9c2cd8acb3) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

name: America First Policy Institute
subject: We’re running out of time to save our children
body:
| | | **They 're trying to indoctrinate your children.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r)
---
**This Teacher Says Left Has Turned Public Schools Into 'Indoctrination Centers'**
---
**They 're coming for your country.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r)
---
Report: Schools Are Teaching Kids To Hate America Under The Guise Of 'Civics'
---
**They 're determined to destroy your religion.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r)
---
**Teacher says he will 'summon Lucifer' into the classroom.**
---
**And if we don 't stand up TODAY, they could transform America as we know it.**
---
Peter, the radical Left has fully infiltrated our schools. Now, we're running out of time to stop them before they indoctrinate an entire generation of Marxist, Anti-American foot soldiers to push their cause. [_**That 's why the team at the American First Policy Institute needs your help to fight back...**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r) The radical Left started working toward this more than 40 years ago. They flooded higher education with disciples of the radical left who wanted to fundamentally transform America and turn it into another failed socialist experiment. Once they'd filled colleges and universities nationwide with leftist professors and administrators, it was only a matter of time before it trickled down all the way to the preschool level. That's why today, you can hardly turn on the news without hearing horror stories about school leaders and teachers encouraging students to come out as transgender or teaching them that America is an evil, fundamentally racist country. **The good news is that it 's NOT too late.** The America First Policy Institute has just released a POWERFUL new web-based tool to use in the fight against the leftist assault on our children. **Peter, today we 're honored to introduce to you the America First Parent Platform.** Here's our plan to empower parents to take back control of their children's education from radical leftist indoctrination: 1\. The America First Parent Platform provides a robust selection of model policies for state legislatures to enact that will empower parents to take back their local school boards. 2\. We created and are constantly updating the only NATIONWIDE database of school board members so that concerned parents, grandparents, guardians, and concerned citizens can easily find and contact the school board member(s) who dictate the policies that affect the children they love. 3\. Our platform gives parents a way to report radical leftist curricula and indoctrination in their local schools! Our team is working around the clock to ensure that we continue to expand the America First Parent Platform and ensure it reaches everyone who needs it... [_**But we can 't do that without your help... That's why we hope that you'll consider supporting the America First Parent Platform with a TAX DEDUCTIBLE gift of $25 or more today!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249974:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r) Peter, at every turn, the radical Left is trying to ensure that they keep the power they've worked so hard to acquire in our schools. They're dumping millions of dollars into local school board campaigns. They have the teachers' unions on their side. Their buddies in big tech are censoring and suppressing information that would shine transparency on their efforts. And they'll stop at NOTHING to put America LAST and corrupt the minds of our children. [_**Peter, PLEASE use this opportunity to get in your last-minute tax deductible donation and help save our country from left-wing indoctrination.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r) Sincerely, America First Policy Institute
---
[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62249973:6IRs_dGGN:m:1:3331421248:E9EA9CF3897315B46AFF75F489AD32F4:r)
---

name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: Court to decide state income tax
body:
Did you see the email below?

Democrats are arguing their case for a state income tax on capital gains before the State Supreme Court TODAY.

If the Court sides with Democrats, they will have realized success over years of their efforts to force a state income tax on Washingtonians. We here at Shift WA have covered their illegal push since our launch in 2013.

We covered their many schemes, including how they planned to reward big labor with the new tax and their attempt to alter the meaning of words to pass a state income tax.

And we've interviewed our state's foremost experts on the matter, including the Washington Policy Center's Jason Mercier and former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna.

We remain committed to fighting Democrats' efforts to pass a state income tax. [**But we need your help.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422817:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)

Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. [**Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 to help us keep the lights on?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422817:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)

Look out for our email wrapping up what happened in court!

Thank you,

The Shift WA team
Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on Washingtonians for many years. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422818:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on you for decades. And now - TOMORROW - Democrats will have their day in court.

The State Supreme Court will hear Democrats argue that an income tax on capital gains is - get this, [**contrary to all established definitions**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422819:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r) - an excise tax at 9 a.m. on January 26. That's right, Democrats want a state income so bad they won't even call it one, just to confuse the media and the public!

During the 2021 legislative session, Democrats realized years of their efforts to force a state income tax on Washingtonians when they passed an income tax on capital gains. Every Democrat knew they were passing state income tax on their constituents, but they would not admit it.

**The passage of the Democrat-only bill came as no surprise. After all, we here at Shift WA have covered the Democrats ' push for a state income tax since our launch in 2013. **

Back in 2015, we exposed how Democrats' biggest campaign donors - including the Washington Education Association (WEA) - [**stood to benefit the most from a state income tax**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422820:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r). And - surprise, surprise - unions have organized a protest at the state capital tomorrow in an attempt to intimidate justices into supporting the illegal state income tax.

Importantly, we've covered every angle of Democrats' tactics - including their attempt to alter the meaning of words to pass a state income tax. We highlighted Jason Mercier of the Washington Policy Center's thorough investigative work. Back in 2021, Mercier contacted every state - along with federal tax and budget authorities like the IRS - to confirm reality. He found [**no agreement with the Washington Democrats**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422821:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r), as every other rational body in the country considers a tax on capital gains to be a form of income tax.

As Homer Simpson would say, "Duh."

We also [**interviewed former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna (2005 - 2013)**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422822:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r) when the lawsuit now before the Court was filed. McKenna explained why the state income tax (on capital gains) is unconstitutional.

You can count on Shift WA to continue fighting and highlighting Democrats' efforts to pass a state income tax - focusing on their unconstitutional actions and shining a light on their schemes. **[But we need your help.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422817:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)**

Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. [**Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 to help us keep the lights on?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422817:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)

**You can count on us to continue bringing updates on Democrats ' tactics to you. But we need your help to keep going. **[**Will you consider contributing today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422817:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422823:WEjzQVDGN:m:1:2610672541:1B1D33A6D8667AAA0D9F69B87A6D5DCB:r)
---
|

clean_body: Did you see the email below? Democrats are arguing their case for a state income tax on capital gains before the State Supreme Court TODAY. If the Court sides with Democrats, they will have realized success over years of their efforts to force a state income tax on Washingtonians. We here at Shift WA have covered their illegal push since our launch in 2013. We covered their many schemes, including how they planned to reward big labor with the new tax and their attempt to alter the meaning of words to pass a state income tax. And we've interviewed our state's foremost experts on the matter, including the Washington Policy Center's Jason Mercier and former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna. We remain committed to fighting Democrats' efforts to pass a state income tax. Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. Look out for our email wrapping up what happened in court! Thank you, The Shift WA team Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on Washingtonians for many years. | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on you for decades. And now - TOMORROW - Democrats will have their day in court. The State Supreme Court will hear Democrats argue that an income tax on capital gains is - get this, - an excise tax at 9 a.m. on January 26. That's right, Democrats want a state income so bad they won't even call it one, just to confuse the media and the public! During the 2021 legislative session, Democrats realized years of their efforts to force a state income tax on Washingtonians when they passed an income tax on capital gains. Every Democrat knew they were passing state income tax on their constituents, but they would not admit it. The passage of the Democrat-only bill came as no surprise. After all, we here at Shift WA have covered the Democrats ' push for a state income tax since our launch in 2013. Back in 2015, we exposed how Democrats' biggest campaign donors - including the Washington Education Association (WEA) - . And - surprise, surprise - unions have organized a protest at the state capital tomorrow in an attempt to intimidate justices into supporting the illegal state income tax. Importantly, we've covered every angle of Democrats' tactics - including their attempt to alter the meaning of words to pass a state income tax. We highlighted Jason Mercier of the Washington Policy Center's thorough investigative work. Back in 2021, Mercier contacted every state - along with federal tax and budget authorities like the IRS - to confirm reality. He found , as every other rational body in the country considers a tax on capital gains to be a form of income tax. As Homer Simpson would say, "Duh." We also when the lawsuit now before the Court was filed. McKenna explained why the state income tax (on capital gains) is unconstitutional. You can count on Shift WA to continue fighting and highlighting Democrats' efforts to pass a state income tax - focusing on their unconstitutional actions and shining a light on their schemes. Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. You can count on us to continue bringing updates on Democrats ' tactics to you. But we need your help to keep going. ---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv5gj0b5dc5mvc5t7migtgtf0ls4po7bde0476r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctgm8or5c3h2bs)****["](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3mn2jqe6nnp5npq0ptms7kebp3as39utnhcug5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctgm8or5c3h2bs) --is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsb76msaekf4l42bihosgaqp7h7b1gm0ne88uqcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctgm8or5c3h2bs)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zchs149ofmo8lkdv1re09japvkba5hmo04em796o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctgm8or5c3h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. name: Josh Stein
subject: Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I am asking for a minute of your time.

**[I am about to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Governor of North Carolina and Josh Shapiro. First, let me explain.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57817922/389198795/-1679429229?refcode=email_012522_steinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyNThjYS04ZjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sa5ddp344nKRgVYYxuEdgTKNYhwHOysi3ySfVmLtZHo=)** I learned early on that some things are worth fighting for – no matter the opposition. Julius Chambers, James Ferguson, and my dad Adam Stein founded the first integrated law firm in North Carolina and led the legal battle against discrimination and for equality. In 1971, their law office was firebombed and burned to the ground. But that didn’t stop them from fighting for what was right. Today, we have a different set of bomb-throwers, who threaten our freedoms and our future. And extremist politicians divide us to cling to power – they gerrymander legislative districts, promote the Big Lie about the 2020 election, and foment insurrectionists... undermine and underfund public education, block Medicaid expansion, and turn a blind eye to corporate polluters... attack fundamental reproductive freedoms, vilify entire groups of people as “filth,” and pass extreme, hateful laws, like HB2, North Carolina’s infamous bathroom bill. **I’m running for Governor because I believe in a very different North Carolina – one rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for everyone. ** For the last six years, as Attorney General of North Carolina, I’ve taken on big fights and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend reproductive and voting rights. North Carolina is a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater. Everybody deserves a fair shot – because if you work hard, where you come from should not limit how far you can go. Everyone should be able to get good health care, no matter where you live or how much money you earn. Every kid deserves a great education. And every family should be safe at home, at school or at work. This is our moment. Together, we can build a better and brighter North Carolina. **[But it’s up to us. Join us. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57817923/389198796/1057720564?refcode=email_012522_steinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyNThjYS04ZjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sa5ddp344nKRgVYYxuEdgTKNYhwHOysi3ySfVmLtZHo=)** **[And please contribute any amount you can. Thank you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57817924/389198797/1057720564?refcode=email_012522_steinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyNThjYS04ZjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sa5ddp344nKRgVYYxuEdgTKNYhwHOysi3ySfVmLtZHo=)** | | [SPLIT A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57817925/389198798/1057720564?refcode=email_012522_steinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyNThjYS04ZjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sa5ddp344nKRgVYYxuEdgTKNYhwHOysi3ySfVmLtZHo=)

Josh Stein

clean_body: I am asking for a minute of your time. = I learned early on that some things are worth fighting for – no matter the opposition. Julius Chambers, James Ferguson, and my dad Adam Stein founded the first integrated law firm in North Carolina and led the legal battle against discrimination and for equality. In 1971, their law office was firebombed and burned to the ground. But that didn’t stop them from fighting for what was right. Today, we have a different set of bomb-throwers, who threaten our freedoms and our future. And extremist politicians divide us to cling to power – they gerrymander legislative districts, promote the Big Lie about the 2020 election, and foment insurrectionists... undermine and underfund public education, block Medicaid expansion, and turn a blind eye to corporate polluters... attack fundamental reproductive freedoms, vilify entire groups of people as “filth,” and pass extreme, hateful laws, like HB2, North Carolina’s infamous bathroom bill. I’m running for Governor because I believe in a very different North Carolina – one rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for everyone. For the last six years, as Attorney General of North Carolina, I’ve taken on big fights and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend reproductive and voting rights. North Carolina is a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater. Everybody deserves a fair shot – because if you work hard, where you come from should not limit how far you can go. Everyone should be able to get good health care, no matter where you live or how much money you earn. Every kid deserves a great education. And every family should be safe at home, at school or at work. This is our moment. Together, we can build a better and brighter North Carolina. = = | | = Let’s get it done, Josh Stein Attorney General of North Carolina and Democratic candidate for Governor | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: ICYMI: My State of the State Address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR Gretchen Whitmer for Governor
body:
You can read the highlights here. | |
---
Last night, I laid out my plans for Michigan’s future. If you missed my State of the State Address, I want to give you a recap of what my proposals for our state are.

**First,** my Lowering MI Costs plan would repeal the retirement tax, boost the Working Families Tax Credit, and deliver pre-K for all, so every kid gets a great start. It includes:
* Repealing the retirement tax would save 500,000 households an average of $1,000 a year. That's money for prescriptions, groceries, gas, or gifts for grandkids.
* Boosting the Working Families Tax Credit would deliver a combined refund of at least $3,000 to 700,000 working families. This increase will directly benefit almost 1 million kids-45% of the kids in Michigan.
* Delivering pre-K for all would save families $10,000 a year. It will put all 110,00 4-year-olds in Michigan on a path to a brighter future while helping their parents go back to work knowing their kids are safe and cared for.

Together, these proposals will save millions of Michiganders thousands of dollars and help us fight inflation head-on.

**Second,** my MI Kids Back on Track, which I first introduced last year, is a plan to get every kid what they need to meet their goals by expanding tutoring, after-school programs, and extra instructional time in the classroom.

**Third,** I am also proposing an additional comprehensive investment in law enforcement, including better training, oversight, and access to mental health resources. To reduce gun violence, I am proposing common-sense reforms, universal background checks, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders so we can make sure guns are kept out of the hands of those who might represent a danger to themselves or others and stored safely at home.

**Fourth,** my Make it in Michigan Package proposes establishing a sustainable funding source for the state's bipartisan economic development efforts while growing talent, making our communities better places to live, and helping our state become a place where anyone can thrive. That means we're competing to bring more jobs for you and your family here to Michigan. Together, we can move faster to compete for companies on the cutting edge of manufacturing and bring more supply chains home.

**Finally,** my plan to protect fundamental freedoms proposes repealing the state's 1931 abortion ban and other outdated laws restricting people's ability to control their own bodies and restricting who they can marry.

I am also calling for an expansion of the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act to include legal protections for the LGBTQ+ community. Shoring up these fundamental freedoms will also improve talent recruitment and retention, as young people want to live in states where their rights are respected.

These proposals will make Michigan a better place and bring us into the future. I know together, we can get it done.

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer
---

PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR Gretchen Whitmer for Governor
P.O. Box 15282
Lansing, MI 48901
United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/73hNyQ0i2U6-07IsPHOBLw2?unsubscribedata=r0CIFKvbkE29qlkB8cCqhSVKhHg6eVl0uFyig0TPkgkHvDIXmKfxbjcn061R9vG%2FwdR4ncKSEXX%2BjJvt%2BjrsySPpDoRTMVxY0cx7Gni2afieiTFBBw7Zyx1E5%2FnKTu1QMX4BdL6djl6gLcnbAbXi2LO7TIr%2BOHJI2qeibqHKM5XLMnY0LC6U60CHdxqKb2ALD7ajSNajMTf4JgXnzOUYefak2DKrk5iw6O%2FA2aW99q4z54lswH3t1bq9PJCFppZJPk8Xbm2%2B74it%2B8fQ%2B5A3qPUpCULynoMRGMsof3w4JXONpKt7i2HVX5qdNS5Qwp7s0r%2BfnrPz1a0EMkNRQM%2FOB%2FLngWV6Qb8rn0%2BXjmJCBc0gzdsCTFZaQhJBHy%2FdR5EExU2W%2FnmRu6ZZa2sLW6WIMSC3Edt9qp%2FUQziwlqFYgOU%3D).
