name: Tom Brejcha
subject: HAPPENING NOW: The pro-life trial of the century
body:
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b8de4de2024ab89a2c54cdbccbe7b8&_e=HdYgeH00FR0OtHU6jWIbbmU28xVitofqM_-lk-52996YCu9k6dONFb3LulCvTR8RJd0aYXeetHwyj_GrH-8gyodME1o_oy_ufoE8_2UFyqeSeruEr8sT4dgfUNq8wsFTg9cQpzQbyVoduqy8FTaIF1eV1niV9wg3ftujxFsSvH0s4-T95ku27zAvdLgbI6CnjLtTsxRziaTy4Gm1SfyiO6DeZyOnVlI_4EHd2P9d14MjoONGbXJVS_GxRmSkLeWQPwYXq8kML4euGqcXS0LgQRs3VcR1klFQxSB5o90zlyfB0fIlHrM72yUURyFPYE4QgR8Kfi9lVpRccf5yKob_2Kr2os2cNmye5yDemTVY0rM-GiGiz7lEY27UpyIGI_5D) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b8de4de2024ab89a2c54cdbccbe7b8&_e=HdYgeH00FR0OtHU6jWIbbmU28xVitofqM_-lk-52996YCu9k6dONFb3LulCvTR8RJd0aYXeetHwyj_GrH-8gyodME1o_oy_ufoE8_2UFyqeSeruEr8sT4dgfUNq8wsFTg9cQpzQbyVoduqy8FTaIF1eV1niV9wg3ftujxFsSvH0s4-T95ku27zAvdLgbI6CnjLtTsxRziaTy4Gm1SfyiOzSn5xmBIKGNWIdCSpKKwwHJthdwj0UU4v7oPnLeN2T2uQbxbJXulUJMMTcnr-nHoYrpMVTVF3RXYgUN1qmRCd335nVwld1uXfIRaXYuMngQGRz_Y3x2f_xNhMnAwVpBqk0C7mZwNXuhbjByAPP5m_dnWTkRIFTiIc5FpME7xAua) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b8de4de2024ab89a2c54cdbccbe7b8&_e=HdYgeH00FR0OtHU6jWIbbmU28xVitofqM_-lk-52996YCu9k6dONFb3LulCvTR8RJd0aYXeetHwyj_GrH-8gyodME1o_oy_ufoE8_2UFyqeSeruEr8sT4dgfUNq8wsFTg9cQpzQbyVoduqy8FTaIF1eV1niV9wg3ftujxFsSvH0s4-T95ku27zAvdLgbI6CnjLtTsxRziaTy4Gm1SfyiO_HngHotxQNy2ZWO0YMcqFTYnuiv36XxO1lYQID2CTNxale5f_f7BICHnMCQEbwRajVa0QFp4FVyeJfxFxjtvvjnrw83m2V-G7YSFQdrnISXks8KiG9U_ZsOUBKJculCx8Uo80Vh3Brc_tZ_GlbZ-hzr4MY7UQ4DBo2wzKPWy5e0) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b8de4de2024ab89a2c54cdbccbe7b8&_e=HdYgeH00FR0OtHU6jWIbbmU28xVitofqM_-lk-52996YCu9k6dONFb3LulCvTR8RJd0aYXeetHwyj_GrH-8gyodME1o_oy_ufoE8_2UFyqeSeruEr8sT4dgfUNq8wsFTg9cQpzQbyVoduqy8FTaIF1eV1niV9wg3ftujxFsSvH0s4-T95ku27zAvdLgbI6CnjLtTsxRziaTy4Gm1SfyiO66EVSC5zmv9h6wl9gew8tn1f9zou4IPTbToqwArdr0DZ19PQGyhpgt1y_EeGSYEVkwI7ltJYS69SnXHBwxO9uk32iyJqpp_ds1i5OVYPsO16Mr4ZGjFcgFoe1O0LtByGDNlN3qCpPqo8yBehbsjCb6ngorAeztJcTD0q91woyks) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids. Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 {\\optouturi} | Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: CTA Jan. 26th: Demand Biden Docs & More!
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to thank Rep. James Comer for investigating Biden’s border crisis, keep the liberal crackpots away from your gas stove, ask Speaker McCarthy to allow C-SPAN more access to the House floor, and show your support for Harmeet Dhillon for RNC Chair!
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Rep. James Comer (R-KY) is leading the GOP’s effort in the U.S. House to hold the Biden administration accountable for its handling of the border crisis. As Chairman of the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, Rep. Comer has scheduled a February 6 hearing and set a February 2 deadline for Biden’s Department of Homeland Security to turn over documents. **[Show your appreciation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cvSgthAs3JQ)** for Rep. Comer’s leadership by urging your own Member of Congress to support Rep. Comer’s efforts on the border crisis!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Ax3af9XeSufg)
---
Scores of liberal politicians gaslit Americans when they supported extreme regulations against gas stoves, but got caught in their own tweets firing up the same stoves they supported banning. Nonetheless, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) intends to impose excessive new regulations on American kitchens. [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) urging Congress to demand answers from the CPSC and hold a hearing with CPSC Commissioner Richard Trumka, Jr.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._GzwO0Yj_8YcZCg)
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-FA)
---
Throughout Speaker McCarthy’s historic bid for the gavel, Americans enjoyed a rare vantage point into the workings of Congress thanks to C-SPAN’s open access to the House floor. [**Use our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to urge Speaker McCarthy to seize this opportunity for greater transparency and extend C-SPAN’s open access to the House floor!

[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-_hex4JQ)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We’ve mourned five gun massacres in California, Iowa, and Washington State in recent days, and Congress still does nothing to control firearms nationally.
body:
Heartbreaking inaction
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda468bd8-0f03-4f25-8968-2d47f79f6b6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Heartbreaking. Cruel. Treasonous. _Just a few descriptions of Republican policy and cruelty that enables mass gun death in America._ **_Firearms have now surpassed cars as the leading cause of death for our children._ **It is at the same time sickening and horrifying. _We’ve mourned five gun massacres in California, Iowa and Washington State in recent days, leaving 24 dead and families destroyed. __States like California and Washington have done the right thing, passing strict laws, and they've greatly lowered their gun violence rates. __**But they can't stop guns from crossing state lines. We NEED a national solution.**_ [**_Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Giffords so we end this uniquely American tragedy, once and for all_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8e7715f-d1be-4b75-a9ed-26bd9f13f140/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b9ca9c1-faba-4173-9992-130384d8e043/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Fred Guttenberg--a friend who lost his daughter in the Parkland massacre--put it perfectly during a recent appearance on Nicole Wallace's MSNBC show when discussing Republicans:_ **_" They talk right to life. My daughter had a right to life, people killed this week had a right to life. They talk freedom? You don't have freedom from the grave. Ok. My daughter doesn't have freedom from the grave."_** _None of us have this freedom. I knew Fred's sister before Fred's daughter was murdered. We will all know survivors of gun violence or become them ourselves if we don't stop this plague. NOW._ **_" Giffords," founded/run by former Rep. Gabby Giffords (shot through the head during a town hall in Tucson) and her husband, recently re-elected Sen. Mark Kelly, fights every day to end the sickening scourge of gun violence. __We know how to do it. They know how to do it. Every other high income democracy has done it. _** [**_Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Giffords so we end this uniquely American tragedy, once and for all._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec1ee975-76a0-4a01-93f1-434cb0c5dfe6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for caring for your country and community, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T397dd24f-b9b0-438a-8758-b23b27992239/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[_**I’m asking 4,648 supporters to chip in and become 2023 Donors before my first End of Month Deadline to help me prove Democrats have what it takes to win back the House. Listen, Peter, I’m not under any illusion that winning back the House will be easy – but I’ll never back down from extreme MAGA Republicans, especially not when so much is at stake in this fight.
Extreme MAGA Republicans want to gut Social Security. Raise the retirement age. And they’re even talking about cutting Medicare. You deserve so much better than that, Peter.
[**Democrats are ready to deliver For The People, and that’s exactly why taking back the House is so important. 1. **The corruption trial of former Speaker Larry Householder and former Chair Matt Borges just began.** Federal prosecutors allege that top Ohio Republicans accepted $60 million in bribes from the power company FirstEnergy, in exchange for a $1.4 billion bailout. But the corruption runs deeper, and Republicans like Dave Yost, Matt Dolan, Frank LaRose, and Mike Carey all have questionable ties to FirstEnergy and the scandal.

2. **The Ohio GOP passed legislation to disenfranchise as many Ohio voters as possible.** In the first week of 2023, Governor DeWine signed one of the most dangerous anti-voter bills in the country — creating unnecessary barriers at the voting booth and restricting early and absentee voting.

3. **Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to flip Senator Sherrod Brown's seat red.** Analysts are already calling the race a "toss-up." Republican State Senator and multi-millionaire Matt Dolan is the first to announce that he's running against Sherrod, and we can expect him to use his fortune to self-fund and attack Sherrod.

As Ohio Democrats,**we're fighting back to protect the rights of Ohioans and the future of our state.** We need representatives who will lead with transparency and integrity. _And we could use your support._

[**Before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, chip in to the Ohio Democratic Party and help us elect Democrats up and down the ballot — from the Ohio Assembly to the U.S. Senate. Federal prosecutors allege that top Ohio Republicans accepted $60 million in bribes from the power company FirstEnergy, in exchange for a $1.4 billion bailout. But the corruption runs deeper, and Republicans like Dave Yost, Matt Dolan, Frank LaRose, and Mike Carey all have questionable ties to FirstEnergy and the scandal. 2. The Ohio GOP passed legislation to disenfranchise as many Ohio voters as possible. In the first week of 2023, Governor DeWine signed one of the most dangerous anti-voter bills in the country — creating unnecessary barriers at the voting booth and restricting early and absentee voting. 3. Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to flip Senator Sherrod Brown's seat red. Analysts are already calling the race a "toss-up." Republican State Senator and multi-millionaire Matt Dolan is the first to announce that he's running against Sherrod, and we can expect him to use his fortune to self-fund and attack Sherrod. As Ohio Democrats,we're fighting back to protect the rights of Ohioans and the future of our state. We need representatives who will lead with transparency and integrity. name: Susan Swecker
subject: I’m asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We need your help to put us over the edge

|
---
Derek, Protecting abortion rights will be one of the most important and consequential things Virginia Democrats do during my time as Chairwoman of the Democratic Party of Virginia. But to do that, to protect our Senate majority and win back those critical House of Delegates seats, **we must elect more Democrats up and down the ballot all across our Commonwealth.[Will you help me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57824974/389225556/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230126-susan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0Y2UwMS1hMTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LTB5BV6Ybqye8aIrcNN7JkQbCDUACQ_l-iDezGjxGAw=)** There is so much work to do this year. We’ve already flipped a state Senate seat in Virginia Beach and Norfolk, and protected abortion rights in Virginia for another year, but **we can’t afford to slow down — I know the GOP won’t.** Taking on Governor Youngkin and the VA GOP extremists s a full-time job, one my staff and I take on happily, but we can’t do it without your support. [**Can I count on you to chip in and help me and my staff hold Youngkin and his party accountable?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57824975/389225557/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230126-susan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0Y2UwMS1hMTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LTB5BV6Ybqye8aIrcNN7JkQbCDUACQ_l-iDezGjxGAw=) I’d like to thank you for everything you’ve done for the party in the last few weeks, months, and in some cases — years. **I’m out to prove that Glenn Youngkin winning in 2021 was a fluke and that this Commonwealth that I love is still the Blue Commonwealth we’ve worked so hard to make.** Thank you for your time and consideration. Again, if you can, please **[click this link here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57824976/389225559/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230126-susan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0Y2UwMS1hMTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LTB5BV6Ybqye8aIrcNN7JkQbCDUACQ_l-iDezGjxGAw=)** to chip in to the DPVA as we fight to keep fighting for Virginia. Susan Swecker, Chairwoman, Democratic Party of Virginia | [****************************](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57824977/389225560/-500518466?refcode=dpva-em-230126-susan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0Y2UwMS1hMTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LTB5BV6Ybqye8aIrcNN7JkQbCDUACQ_l-iDezGjxGAw=)**********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57824979/389225561/-500518466?amount=10&refcode=dpva-em-230126-susan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0Y2UwMS1hMTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LTB5BV6Ybqye8aIrcNN7JkQbCDUACQ_l-iDezGjxGAw=)**********

name: Senate Alert via Republicans
subject: Schiff in the SENATE?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253600:6XU8edGNv:m:1:3331421248:C3AE67CCD6FA0DDEBBF6A95B7373D5FC:r)

**BREAKING NEWS:** Schiff JUST ANNOUNCED he's running for Senate in California, _where he has a good shot of winning._
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253600:6XU8edGNv:m:1:3331421248:C3AE67CCD6FA0DDEBBF6A95B7373D5FC:r)
Adam Schiff is one of the most CORRUPT members of Congress. He doctored a text message and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! He championed the endless sham effort to impeach the former President, AND he politicized U.S. intelligence in Afghanistan, putting our troops at risk.
_**The last thing America needs is Adam Schiff in the Senate Majority!**_
Not only do we need to keep far-left radicals like Adam Schiff out of the Senate but eliminating the Democrats' Senate majority has become even _more critical._

**[Will you rush your support now to ensure Adam Schiff never gets the chance to chair a Senate committee?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253600:6XU8edGNv:m:1:3331421248:C3AE67CCD6FA0DDEBBF6A95B7373D5FC:r)****

If Adam Schiff reaches the Senate with Democrats still in control, he'll make his witch hunt of the former President in the House look like child's play. We must prepare for the fight against Schiff TODAY.

**[Please help us defeat radical leftists like Schiff in key Senate races and restore a Republican Senate majority by rushing your immediate support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253600:6XU8edGNv:m:1:3331421248:C3AE67CCD6FA0DDEBBF6A95B7373D5FC:r)********

clean_body: BREAKING NEWS: Schiff JUST ANNOUNCED he's running for Senate in California, where he has a good shot of winning. Adam Schiff is one of the most CORRUPT members of Congress. He doctored a text message and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! He championed the endless sham effort to impeach the former President, AND he politicized U.S. intelligence in Afghanistan, putting our troops at risk. The last thing America needs is Adam Schiff in the Senate Majority! Not only do we need to keep far-left radicals like Adam Schiff out of the Senate but eliminating the Democrats' Senate majority has become even more critical. subject: States make the difference
body:
| | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8ef62fc2f4&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,We are getting close to the end of the month. Do you take a minute to look over your household budget and start planning for next month? Perhaps you know you have car repair expenses on the horizon or that you have some deferred maintenance on your home.We do the same thing on campaigns. Each month gives us a chance to look ahead and plan for the campaign budget. But I have to tell you, I’m worried. I am running for Governor of Washington State and I need your help if we are going to hit the number we have budgeted in order to stay in this race. **The leftist elites would love nothing more than to see me come up short for the end of month fundraising deadline!**
| [PITCH IN TODAY: SAVE WASHINGTON STATE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=588be1d661&e=fdefed58de)
---
We have seven more days until the end of the month in order to prove the political establishment wrong. We have gained great momentum and have made great strides but we are in a fight to win this race. _**The only way we can stop Biden’s destructive policies is by electing Governors who can stand up to him and prevent him from destroying America state by state!!**_ There is immense focus on federal races — but races like mine are where we can TRULY push back against Biden. Look at how Ron DeSantis and Kristi Noem have made their states sanctuaries for LAW-ABIDING, FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS! Even with all that Joe Biden is doing, their examples keep their great states safe and insulated from a large majority of his crap.With your help, if you pitch in to my campaign today, you can be part of my victory. When we win, we’ll be the NEXT home of freedom in America!
| [CHIP IN: HELP US STOP JOE BIDEN TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=33ba9a924e&e=fdefed58de)
---
We are on the verge of major advances here at the start of this campaign but without your help, we may come up short for our monthly fundraising number. We’ve got one week left to finish strong. Your support **WILL** put us in a position to win this race and I need you to dig deep **TODAY** so we can start this race stronger than ever!Any amount you can contribute to help us will greatly be appreciated. Every dime we bring in will go straight to voter contact – because we know that if we can reach the voters with our message of **lower taxes** and **less government intrusion** , we will gain all the votes we need to be the winner!!Please stand with by investing in our historic campaign today!
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7d74bae277&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $35.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=665e9f93dc&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=eeec372935&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $75.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=97f4a38cd0&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $250.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=edf7cec7f8&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE A CUSTOM AMOUNT!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=bcc216ad6f&e=fdefed58de)
---
In God We Trust,Semi Bird

name: Charles Booker
subject: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18871?t=1001&akid=2922%2E346206%2EOPoUZf ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230126-2922-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2922_346206_OPoUZf&akid=2922%2E346206%2EOPoUZf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78796%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fBnUHWLahxtLWuxqP5T1rg&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78797%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A4rhYSNcUEvl9RJkzt5Qpg&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78795%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w5Rbpew7f6GayyfJZlZnzg&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78798%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0wfFnaU%2fmIjawgb4ci0l0A&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78799%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ZWu1toDZ%2foO6NSxUwE4sA&sysid=1)

subject: 🇺🇸 Should DC become our 𝟓𝟏𝐬𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐞?

body:
| **_BREAKING:_**
**Fox host describes Washington, DC as "basically a third [world country]." Co-host says, "If you're not going to behave, DC is never going to be a state."**

Making DC a state will transform our country for the better and FINALLY give over 700,000 Americans the representation they’ve long deserved.

[With a new session of Congress just beginning, it’s important to us we get an accurate read of where our supporters stand »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?refcode=VPP_20230126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6148%2E878179%2EOwXaVB) | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?refcode=VPP_20230126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6148%2E878179%2EOwXaVB) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?refcode=VPP_20230126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6148%2E878179%2EOwXaVB)
---

****12,000 responses required before midnight TONIGHT****
DECADES of work and advocacy has created a massive grassroots movement for DC statehood, and we are anxiously waiting for our House Democrats to push for DC statehood on the floor of the House.

**This is a critical step forward to form a more perfect union.**

[We need to hear our dedicated Democratic base's thoughts on DC statehood »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?refcode=VPP_20230126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=6148%2E878179%2EOwXaVB)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zniprp80ojhnon28om0c60ieh8df7sl33gdjbe2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu769bu08b504fo79tkg0evp6met8rfvlenmdqf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp86v1cfh4e74nigmt3jgcmnucrh7psoblsv1hfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lm5grn1c5aidjrr7krfv6fmfo8hd6q4cm5biig_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4912d83fr1uijep8odko5hp1dqminsicmj4gnkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb17tlqbvmahjt3kuuck5rmc72ceck3oked1ci70_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7nq875898pbteh8obd95guab48qnaunbhivffb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2e6f3m568ktjlc7t54du0gjsib91oshm0gh3mlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7pgh027t01ecjk6nm1nku6cd17gdv8vpoamktdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctim1pr6chh2bs)
---

---

---

| Friends, In case you missed it, earlier this month, we released our 2023 Legislative Agenda - "Fighting for Granite State Families in 2023!"
Our legislative agenda will focus on fighting for Granite State families who are struggling with high costs on everything from food to energy. They need help and that will be our priority.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657997%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k%2bmfq8e9ugrQMMVKhBr9pA&sysid=1 BREAKING UPDATE: Donald Trump Makes A FULL RETURN To Social Media

Within the “coming weeks” Meta, formerly known as Facebook, is set to reinstate former President Donald Trump’s Facebook and Instagram accounts. This news comes after years of fighting the ban with Trump’s legal team and supporters. It is expected that the reinstated accounts will be subject to certain restrictions and monitoring by Facebook for any violations of their terms of service. It remains to be seen how much freedom Donald Trump will have in his use of these platforms.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Show up, listen, and deliver
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | You are receiving this email because of your interest in campaigns like Sharice for Congress. To be removed from this mailing list, **[click here](https://act.shariceforcongress.com/p/1_ahKEMWqku52hwaGTOFzA2?unsubscribedata=LN8FJYBkobU44u2OgCfE%2F6q%2FrVzE34YI5CI31qnh%2FfkiY4Tu1yLTpcqJdpGDwcH1EdR9pKVEFSc%2B2gl6Cscj9o%2BUdN1gXQWbBj2A3%2FBMqNRKNWSNg2M2LzZ1kP%2B%2F6KSEWdfZycL56zqP%2F9SHzyKMbZXDkSAwK9vI5NFOhq4dJKBddnSfJNbf37lp1Y5FV89Umki66PWb58tX4saF2nQ5uDfxyh3DckHDwWqtSuZTAJRm26HOL%2BXqYNL2lNCn%2Bb6WMpLYs%2F%2BJ2Qz4vwub3ZOIkpVNpLnhFxalmodjFTp63Qqx9iff3Tsu999OJSb7IULxoDIHYAtdOVRIR8Dnmy0aZZ3d%2FXZVwC%2Frz3SxF56rpdhlMWY4EbHxqnnfUSYK7PPHLSq1%2BSEhZLDgOcOvxEcSIC4xNvz%2FNlYwOEvTAFE68m7R5WkNHOmkxY3q7ur9Fimg).**
---

Welcome to Team Sharice! We’re so glad you’re here.

There aren’t a lot of people in Congress like me. One of the first two Native American women in Congress, I’m a former White House fellow under President Obama, a first-generation college student and community college graduate, lawyer, and former MMA fighter.

**But most importantly, I’m giving Kansas families a voice in Congress. My approach is simple: I show up, listen, and deliver.**

I will always reach across the aisle and work with anyone, as long as we’re working together to deliver for Kansans — because that’s the leadership that KS-03 deserves.

Since I was first elected, I’ve been fighting for Kansans and all Americans in Washington. **From protecting healthcare access and reproductive rights to fighting for voting rights and improving our local supply chains, I want to know what issues are most important to you and your family.**

**[As we prepare for our next big race, will you take our Congressional Issues Survey today to fill me in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57809710/389169077/1145754108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20221208_WL_1.1_0_NTL_welcome_NA_NA_WL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMWIxZS04MzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xolzU1LqJafRroJe8-Nw1V6t7LXtIIdk7hhPK-2Rrus=&emci=5cccf4e2-b974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a8bf1b1e-839d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57809723/389169090/1145754108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20221208_WL_1.1_0_NTL_welcome_NA_NA_WL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMWIxZS04MzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xolzU1LqJafRroJe8-Nw1V6t7LXtIIdk7hhPK-2Rrus=&emci=5cccf4e2-b974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a8bf1b1e-839d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
I’m honored to be the first openly LGBTQ+ Native American elected to Congress, but representation shouldn’t stop there. We need more women, people of color, and people in the LGBTQ+ community running for office.

The path to regaining our House majority runs right through KS-03, and there’s no doubt that our race will be just as competitive in 2024 as it was in 2022. Your input will help us stay focused on the most important issues. **[Click here to take our Congressional Issues Survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57809731/389169100/1145754108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20221208_WL_1.1_0_NTL_welcome_NA_NA_WL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMWIxZS04MzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xolzU1LqJafRroJe8-Nw1V6t7LXtIIdk7hhPK-2Rrus=&emci=5cccf4e2-b974-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a8bf1b1e-839d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Representative Sharice Davids

clean_body: | | You are receiving this email because of your interest in campaigns like Sharice for Congress. To be removed from this mailing list, . Welcome to Team Sharice! We’re so glad you’re here. There aren’t a lot of people in Congress like me. One of the first two Native American women in Congress, I’m a former White House fellow under President Obama, a first-generation college student and community college graduate, lawyer, and former MMA fighter. But most importantly, I’m giving Kansas families a voice in Congress. My approach is simple: I show up, listen, and deliver. I will always reach across the aisle and work with anyone, as long as we’re working together to deliver for Kansans — because that’s the leadership that KS-03 deserves. Since I was first elected, I’ve been fighting for Kansans and all Americans in Washington. From protecting healthcare access and reproductive rights to fighting for voting rights and improving our local supply chains, I want to know what issues are most important to you and your family. I’m honored to be the first openly LGBTQ+ Native American elected to Congress, but representation shouldn’t stop there. We need more women, people of color, and people in the LGBTQ+ community running for office. The path to regaining our House majority runs right through KS-03, and there’s no doubt that our race will be just as competitive in 2024 as it was in 2022. Your input will help us stay focused on the most important issues. Thank you for your support — I’m so glad you’re on our team. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The FBI's Corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

_The FBI corrupted politics and helped rig the 2020 election_.

The FBI is compromised by foreign cash.

You and I learned that lesson again when prosecutors indicted a top FBI official involved in the Russia collusion hoax for colluding with Russia.

The Deep State accused Donald Trump of conspiring with Russia because he was the only one who wasn't in league with Moscow.

**I discussed this growing scandal with Steve Bannon on War Room, and I hope you'll[take a few moments to watch](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r)
| | [ CLICK HERE TO WATCH](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r)
---
**After you watch the interview,[please chip in right away to help me defend President Trump from the longest witch hunt in American history](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r).**

For two years, Democrats and the fake news media smeared Trump supporters as conspiracy theorists and Putin apologists for calling out the lie that Donald Trump colluded with Russia.

And yet it was an FBI counterintelligence chief investigating Trump who was doing favors for a Russian oligarch.

Taking illegal foreign cash.

And yet the Deep State slimed President Trump as a traitor colluding with Russia.

**I'm fighting back.**

It's time to drain the swamp, which starts with breaking up the FBI.

**For the last six years, the FBI has operated as the personal political police force for the Democratic Party.**

Parents speaking out against mask mandates and critical race theory at school board meetings or Americans questioning the results of the 2020 election put you in the FBI's crosshairs.

The Gestapo raid on Mar-a-Lago was the last straw.

And now, you and I know a top FBI official stands accused of the same crime the Deep State used to attempt a coup against Donald Trump.

**It's long past time to end the witch hunt against President Trump.**

_But I need your help to do that_.

**[So please, watch my interview with Steve Bannon and chip in to defend Donald Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r).**

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61428247:WnfPkVDNJ:m:1:2365227053:D4A1FF5F09599C97D2DD3C2F105F316C:r)
* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**

subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0430%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=VCOHxiiXTAtcjuF2U%2bU9nA&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YKFVvC9Xm55W40jX0FNUOw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D2yELRCGK8Ja%2fLoK97T9eg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nq4jqT0tpT5aR4NtOSMs8w&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D2yELRCGK8Ja%2fLoK97T9eg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657901%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MrL9ivwKMw1s87ifPpzomA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657902%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=doYEao2QU3wZ33Dbm6ILZA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657903%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5riOHTaBDLVqNQJnn8rntA&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | **_Business Insider: Georgia leads the way among six states that hold the key to the White House in 2024**_ According to a new article from _Business Insider,_ Georgia is one of the six states that will determine who wins the White House in 2024.

[_**If that’s all you needed to know, will you pitch in right now to help ensure that Georgia goes blue in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57813331/389182885/710125701?refcode=20230126.1_2024Upd_1AD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyZDhhZi04OTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6N42bJ5MxBRzViKPTob6rUOmS03UaxXenVyEkiM3TAY=)**_

**_With all eyes on Georgia, we can’t afford to waste a single day._**

We need to prove to Joe Biden, the DNC, and the world that Georgia has what it takes to defeat Donald Trump AGAIN in 2024.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in
2024 to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for
everyone.

Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.

If you’re with me, chip in $10 right now to be one of the Founding Members
of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2023_abs_em_launch

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.U6B5wJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.aZ7DO3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.sfJsy4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.0yUkhh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.3OtEFQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]Screenshot of Schiff for Senate launch video

Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose
leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they
must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical
Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump
is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous
crowd of imitators.

This is the fight of my life — to protect our democracy, build it back
stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of
Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food,
education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed
as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy
fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start
looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can
fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight:

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For
universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To
stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and
progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in
2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this
election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start
preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our
country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his
rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears. Kevin McCarthy just removed me
from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding
them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a
lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground,
no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the
country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the
Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1012&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the
end of the day? I'm not accepting corporate PAC money in this race. Even
$3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1013&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.U6B5wJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1014&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.aZ7DO3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1015&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.sfJsy4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1016&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.0yUkhh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1017&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.3OtEFQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1018&akid=948%2E5257348%2ErmztD6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough
for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.

Talk soon,

— Adam

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone. Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country. If you’re with me, chip in $10 right now to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link: [ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2023absemlaunch If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT [ ]Screenshot of Schiff for Senate launch video Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators. This is the fight of my life — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable. And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself. Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it. With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight: For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation. With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead. Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now. Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat. Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears. Kevin McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate. Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place. When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side. [ ]Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day? I'm not accepting corporate PAC money in this race. Even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy. Talk soon, — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. Let’s rebuild America together

Dear friend,

I am writing to express how thrilled I am to endorse my good friend, colleague, and fellow veteran Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat.

[](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=cc3400902e4f49bfa8d0576caca30fe4&_e=PF8tEhN7K1QYtyaqGcZno5SM6osVWH5O1NdHTNLfZYwJUxK067k1S1vJ6jf1dlCfd-QyaTCZi7BMfQw1FqjJHci6XU0O3zSNUsb9KIvZ8_f6LXrOv6y8DsQMvUncj3jw0-zAJNgkZCRGgYIzBB8b50uph70MmPTJT_UFCf9QCkALRT08IFMEHrbebo0c269_Sq-s8esJ09I_akyl74tYDiBcU5QDyD2aOTpNdcUitBqvEub8q5-BB61hoDrxxhSOyymJDM5nwsmjCYCBclo751U6c2OiSeV-BHvJAy0OuhGaHv7PDUUM-YNUbfZZbkuUPV8O93lmrka2K08yUccxIkDvKTFOW8a1B48hP2ZRlW-geuRPGN0C63TRmpGLcQgqPewM7vQ8EMcbcUVfiogW7isMvX2JSxg1gt4ed4At2c2_pyqf8DgG8eIlB4qH9sfPivYAec7Jmzl8CMcGPKFSjOifr2_Jw2bdJcS4P5g0mk5NlIa_QPKx1JpEVFnlupcfLHlCbyJhIfm-wVE2uKVSdQ%3D%3D)
I have witnessed Jim’s dedication and resilience firsthand, and I know he will lead the American people with the utmost resolve.

Now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington who recognize the national security threats facing our country. Thankfully, Jim Banks is just such a leader and will make a substantial and immediate impact as a United States Senator.
| [ **SUPPORT JIM BANKS’S CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=cc3400902e4f49bfa8d0576caca30fe4&_e=PF8tEhN7K1QYtyaqGcZno5SM6osVWH5O1NdHTNLfZYwJUxK067k1S1vJ6jf1dlCfd-QyaTCZi7BMfQw1FqjJHci6XU0O3zSNUsb9KIvZ8_f6LXrOv6y8DsQMvUncj3jw0-zAJNgkZCRGgYIzBB8b50uph70MmPTJT_UFCf9QCkALRT08IFMEHrbebo0c269_Sq-s8esJ09I_akyl74tYDiBcU5QDyD2aOTpNdcUitBqvEub8q5-BB61hoDrxxhSOyymJDM5nwsmjCYCBclo751U6c2OiSeV-BHvJAy0OuhGaHv7PDUUM-YNUbfZZbkuUPV8O93lmrka2K08yUccxIkDvKTFOW8a1B48hP2ZRlW-geuRPGN0C63TRmpGLcQgqofGAm8TYxL6s3Uz9tzZdl2oeG0wuytcDuKe7-O3JoFrBN3XBwsCXLMBLUcJ0mz0PhEjHDntoOE7apG75a1J3g2zuJt7LtMYAzr9W63oPtuzxadOMtHfbE39alif2wVUd75Y2rRDsmcAne3dzOoLVgA%3D%3D)

**Here is why Jim Banks deserves a seat at the table:**

* He will **fight** to secure our border.
* He will **fight** to protect innocent life.
* He will **fight** to stop the Democrats’ socialist spending agenda.
* **He will defend America.**

Jim is clear-eyed about the threat Communist China poses to our nation and will support the necessary investments in our military so our people can remain safe and free. As a veteran like myself, Jim understands the importance of modernizing our health care system for veterans to ensure they receive the support they deserve.

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: My fellow veteran Jim Banks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I work with lots of conservative leaders every day in Congress. _But few have stood out to me like Jim Banks._ Peter, Jim is a Conservative _firebrand_. He says what he believes, he _never_ backs down, and most importantly, he takes action even when it’s tough. **And as a fellow veteran, he understands that freedom is NEVER free.** **Now, my friend Jim Banks is running for Senate, and I’m proud to support him 100% through his new mission. **

clean_body: | | | Peter, I work with lots of conservative leaders every day in Congress. But few have stood out to me like Jim Banks. Peter, Jim is a Conservative firebrand. He says what he believes, he never backs down, and most importantly, he takes action even when it’s tough. And as a fellow veteran, he understands that freedom is NEVER free. Now, my friend Jim Banks is running for Senate, and I’m proud to support him 100% through his new mission. Peter, Jim put his life on the line serving in Afghanistan. He knows what so many veterans and active service members know: that America is worth fighting for. But just because he’s hung up his uniform doesn’t mean he’s done giving his all for America. In the Senate, Jim won’t let the radical Left tear apart our nation’s values. He’ll defend us from socialism just like he defended us from America’s enemies abroad - but just like on the battlefield, he needs a team that will always have his back. | | In Service, Col. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's col
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1lan22vghp5rhnb6fibq7ac1p7618muvig4cjr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1u0un2g7rb5fkma3bjh7nmsjh76rbei9iqhagmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqhlp2a3ubblji27uajuc9qcidpcti8qkucsn9qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkh4mk7sa0t4s4ghrn804jv1o8deh8cbnitms0o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zggsgsmvnt2jitjohva17dng7f6mo7o1turvsp0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh141q491s3uk9sfvchlrel4tn9m8kb510acfjjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z865s64q5vrj8gfcjp2uufjc4u8ci6v5gct2ikcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za6lnsrcphdgipip4ml5b4e1ldf52gue2888t0n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthmcoj2c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Don't Let George Santos Have Access to Classified Materials >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e9875f8-2fbf-419d-a8d2-e0cd09f746ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Representative George Santos has lied about his work, his education, and almost everything else. And there are BIG questions as to where he suddenly got hundreds of thousands of dollars to fund his campaign. **Which is why he should never, ever have access to classified information.** America can't risk putting its national security in the hands of someone like Santos. And Speaker Kevin McCarthy must not give him committee assignments or any other positions that give him access to this sensitive information. His fellow House members have called for this, and we agree 100%. [**Send McCarthy a message: Keep George Santos away from classified materials.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9507c12-4075-4f5c-9ade-26555b4859ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Our PAC is different from the others
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, We’re sure you’ve seen a lot of emails lately about the Arizona Senate race. Some of them claim to be raising money to help, but it’s unclear where that money is actually going. So what is the Replace Sinema campaign all about? ✅We’re the only PAC _solely_ dedicated to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable, working with grassroots groups on the ground in Arizona, building a top-notch research and communications operation, and talking to reporters every day about why Sinema needs to be replaced. ✅We’re not beholden to anybody except our supporters (you!). Many Democratic organizations have to play nice with Sinema for the next two years. We don’t have to play nice. ✅We’re doing the hard work to Replace Sinema with a REAL Democrat who represents Arizona, NOT special interests (that means we’re also going to work our butts off to defeat the Republican if there’s a three-way general election). It’s been a big week since Democrat Ruben Gallego made his entry into this race. We are thrilled, and ready to help Democrats achieve victory over Sinema and the Republicans. We have to keep up the momentum. **[Make a contribution to show Sinema she has no business even running again >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fciI8BBOn0OEGnq4whyweiQTIg97Y4hzhehwfueejQsvBeYwJRZthH4ycQ6KLBgbCOQ4_R1HBd4kWOg4nqZFl6D7dCdeZ58QqzzeqEEfbHZOQgllUAUSdeyVtLhxQzHZeOT5MpOeV-Q6v0UwgdTzJwnuS7GZ-9NjqYNbGmpfObINnvxEBHQjMMdK-OiKvCnqMJVowF6iXFki-cBvyt6umTug56y4CvE4Y1hWN1UGjODE1tDGx8vA9nvwXprL2jNVdti81_Oa0TIarldzsl_3q-h5adqIbcL3XJrwweTt80z4U/3t6/6LsDpKwtTPCY5YBHhNDdmg/h0/stJXUxeOhspHXU5p_XIW28JY-3g_v3ofOVcVRP5C7fo)** The only way to replace Kyrsten Sinema is to sustain an organized, well-funded grassroots movement. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. Because ousting Sinema isn’t just about replacing one of the least popular U.S. Senators — it’s about electing leadership worthy of Arizonans and finally achieving real progress on reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, and more.
