clean_body: | | Peter, We’re sure you’ve seen a lot of emails lately about the Arizona Senate race. Some of them claim to be raising money to help, but it’s unclear where that money is actually going. So what is the Replace Sinema campaign all about? ✅We’re the only PAC solely dedicated to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable, working with grassroots groups on the ground in Arizona, building a top-notch research and communications operation, and talking to reporters every day about why Sinema needs to be replaced. ✅We’re not beholden to anybody except our supporters (you!). Many Democratic organizations have to play nice with Sinema for the next two years. We don’t have to play nice. ✅We’re doing the hard work to Replace Sinema with a REAL Democrat who represents Arizona, NOT special interests (that means we’re also going to work our butts off to defeat the Republican if there’s a three-way general election). It’s been a big week since Democrat Ruben Gallego made his entry into this race. We are thrilled, and ready to help Democrats achieve victory over Sinema and the Republicans. We have to keep up the momentum. The only way to replace Kyrsten Sinema is to sustain an organized, well-funded grassroots movement. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. Because ousting Sinema isn’t just about replacing one of the least popular U.S. Senators — it’s about electing leadership worthy of Arizonans and finally achieving real progress on reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, and more. Can we count on you to support our movement? Your donation will help to lay the foundation to defeat Kyrsten Sinema in 2024, If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | -Replace Sinema Project & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Change for Arizona 2024, please .

name: Ron Wyden
subject: For Republicans, the cruelty is the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57832182/389250784/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUzOGMwNi1iOTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-1MKpnZBMTld7Vz8dRpWZgxT7pjpATUZMbUoVpalDk=&emci=3fbd4262-b499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=34e38c06-b99d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | This week, we commemorated the 50th anniversary of the Supreme Court's ruling in _Roe v. Wade_ , which enshrined the right to abortion care nationwide. But for the first time in the 50 years since that ruling was handed down, women in America today have fewer rights than their grandmothers, all because of Donald Trump's hand-picked Court. **As states have moved to criminalize abortion, doctors are becoming wary, and women are suffering.** Patients aren't receiving the care they need because abortion rights are no longer federally protected. Hospitals are choosing to let women die rather than give them the care they need. For decades, Democrats have been warning the country about what would happen if Republicans succeed in their plans to rip reproductive freedom away from women. Unfortunately, we're already being proved right: post-Roe America is dangerous for women. **If Republicans succeed in gaining more power in 2024, they will outlaw abortion nationwide, no matter the consequences.** And they won't stop there. Top Republicans have already made it clear they intend to go after the right for married couples to use contraception, and more. There is so much at stake in this next election, and I know that our grassroots movement will be at the forefront, fighting to expand our blue majority and build on the progress we've made. _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.
---

| Friend
It hasn't even been 30 days yet, but Republicans are already on a string of huge victories throughout January, so we wanted to share the achievements!

With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.
**State Democrats are facing _four ultra-competitive_ , high-stakes special elections next month – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. **
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your community.** But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents.
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your community. **So can we count you in? This is one of the last opportunities to become an official DLCC member this month!**

name: Byron Donalds
subject: “FISCALLY DEMENTED”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
That's what Joe Biden just called House conservatives.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---
Peter,
---
Joe Biden just called House conservatives "fiscally demented" because we're going to vote against more reckless spending bills that light your hard-earned money on fire.
---
_You want to know what 's fiscally demented? _
---
**Ramming a 4,000-page, $1.7 TRILLION omnibus spending bill through Congress at the last minute that allocates almost $400 million to secure the borders of Tunisia, Oman, Jordan, Egypt, and Lebanon, but _EXPRESSLY PROHIBITS_ any of the border patrol funding from being used to secure our own border. **
---
[**Please make a contribution to support House conservatives as we hold the line against Biden 's out-of-control spending and fight to restore fiscal sanity to Washington. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253760:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253761:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253762:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253763:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253764:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---

Biden sounds utterly ridiculous when he says things like this.
---
But of course, the Fake News Media will still give him favorable coverage and REFUSE to talk about what's actually in these spending bills.
---
Rest assured: House conservatives will hold the line against this insanity, Peter.
---
We've got to get this kind of America-Last spending under control.
---
**Paying to secure other countries' borders when we have a historic crisis at our own border is simply indefensible.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support House conservatives as we hold the line against Biden 's out-of-control spending and fight to restore fiscal sanity to Washington. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253759:JxvrSdGNY:m:1:3331421248:E4351EF0E64FDC14723CD508A6576623:r)
---
Rep. Byron Donalds
FL-19

## - Please type your reply above...| | | Hey Peter, it’s Claudia. _**Cocaine, Fentanyl, gang violence, and dirty money:**_ What do all of these things have in common? They’re all pushed by deadly Mexican cartels and are IGNORED by Joe Biden. name: VoteVets.org
subject: We ran out of money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We would have loved to have worked in more races. We could have made a difference.
#
Derek -
Last cycle we spent more than $24 million helping to elect Democrats to the House and Senate.
There were quite a few House races where our ads made a difference. They moved the needle in close races. There are Democrats in the House today because of our work.
We would have loved to have worked in more races. We could have made a difference.
But we didn’t have enough money.
And in a House with a 5-vote margin, every additional race would have mattered.
Now we’re looking at the most important election cycle in modern American history. A razor-thin majority for Republicans in the House and for Democrats in the Senate.
And the White House is on the line.
So yes, we’re starting our fundraising now. We have to. Because VoteVets is one of the most important organizations in the cycle. And we can’t do it without you.
[**Can you please contribute $3 to VoteVets today? We would not ask if it were not so critically important. Think of every donation as another race we can get involved in this cycle.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230126-1-15&t=1&akid=7305%2E3013755%2EV7q1C4)

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Newsweek: Preserving Access to Rural Cardiac Care | Opinion
body:
| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=bf36ebc7e3784a19b164f7bd603f5bd9&_e=5zrHq25lAPL07PY5vhwWKQlltWDoRmAxsh7WgaSF4OTggPKeP2bF9u8EZd2nCuwCWbHpUNDZyPO8qof2FgcVUP4vH4F93c5INS6Ay0jMbKRZyrllZIZR23fhUTgniwGt_hg-bPzaeLpMu7dV7mWC_a6k6nPPT8fG2L0Iu1UuziWjA5Y7YWi2_JiViAkNBnUH_JPDYqxTTO4LO9QUVcWncw%3D%3D)
---
_**Preserving Access to Rural Cardiac Care**_ By Bobby Jindal and Neil Gheewala
---
Americans living in small rural communities take great pride in their hometowns. When it comes to their health care, America's 46 million rural residents want access to basic care within their own communities. Inflation, poor fiscal performance, and a lack of political leadership threaten that access. More than 500 U.S. hospitals are now at risk for closure, impeding access to care in many of these towns. The Biden administration's latest effort to save these hospitals forgoes a comprehensive strategy for a superficial solution that will result in less local care and worse outcomes for many communities. On January 1, a Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) rule went into effect that allows a critical access hospital to convert to a "rural emergency hospital"—a new designation, defined as a facility which provides emergency and outpatient care, but must forgo inpatient care services and transfer patients within 24 hours to another hospital. This "catch-22" situation risks timely emergency services for rural patients and absolves state and local officials from fighting to preserve access to life-saving medical care. Saving critical access hospitals that rural Americans depend on for time-sensitive cardiac or stroke care is key to keeping local economies strong and reducing the burden on overflowing metropolitan hospitals. Washington bureaucrats have yet to propose a comprehensive strategy to work with state and local leaders to engage with physicians to solve this problem. [**FINISH READING ON NEWSWEEK.COM**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=bf36ebc7e3784a19b164f7bd603f5bd9&_e=5zrHq25lAPL07PY5vhwWKdZm1saCU0Tts4NDeW6Rhios5tpLe-AkUH7xEQFgG1xMkNhNi-YBSlaRkdUDS6zmNPknkRJNxUuXdEMIdYUCOpbhZhjkC309XfUohfyhqMKFG0HeBrPDOPOkVoikkxA6lNzKQor2CO4Dm7fs8VS2uQq_3ahpqHYQOa0qgd4_cSoebrVGTyX_9dk7tyRUKVBghFH1lwVj9QDf65mHLUupf6FVIE_eh225J3FJZOlsT_SDoW6ckZTUi1dQhsRClUsNLw%3D%3D)

name: Jason Miyares
subject: saying no to Big Tech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
they hold an enormous amount of power over our daily lives, and it shouldn’t be this way.| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=b3ee9883ad0c4836b457546f6365dec5&_e=KcjX6_G7oExLI5vXrintkNV4vKTpkd9hc2zdYLxfLXYjGaWiSaHiIVrKIZiw3hMlcOwQRaQDJXdRY9XpyTdQi1pLvPMJuttOhEjvNFZSHbySo4xePl-jgxU0wMJoWXEXUpcGMINk1dz3Mja2o0X49v_DFdQ4MhwMaOHNS_4dpdSrGK1TxV1QHc2AvVTwAXkzyboJ_cZVpvvTP-9vzpzf89mf5Y-WK0X_y-dyseqpRlz4U2WgypfUSStp-PnJ1dmtZxJ3OA3R8RYhf8B7kdiT8I0uPDGAj0Jg4a_CoDk7AdBQNG4xZVNTrCSd7YouePEtwNOH7t2zU9udlN8PHi7oSxRbMjIy59SV7hKAg1g46eDXK0Z5ENR6xUXJYt-2VHnO)
---
friend, Earlier this week, I joined a bipartisan coalition of state attorneys general in a [**lawsuit against Google**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=b3ee9883ad0c4836b457546f6365dec5&_e=KcjX6_G7oExLI5vXrintkFsWXkKR-QNYSGMpE6iVm2R9KgVoljf_y_B4YdS1OyQqbAGU2k2EzWK0o-JLjUYCYc1616edvfC1JhrmOV-B7s4BQNFJ-tUR47NER8bDiQEuOXceZHJdAYgdvpkXUOZJLzHJ-G8b535hJCJuTegkCJ0ehfxIPWc0k5D0tBYRdRDzdDDxaxfuLlMUc8Uj3Bt_aYZayuvClQ21adwodMo-jjrhA1J1khUarYnIUCFwxyukv_bn7cX2eluHcEHUVyodcVuYMR03leV2bb7NKkFYl-RCHm5aVuEe7_oH91_d9zpomhxdid9T9w_2Iy7obix3kFGYRxCqzzxAq5j76QQrb_e6SYfKOoD-HKApoBUyBYtuvD_wx9ddRiE8zqtbBE2vWhYNC55hbT65zdVA6_Uj9QMMiFfJQ0u0YF1KSBTKpu6qTOV8GmPxUAjh4m9bqAJ2eBRgNdecVhrvQWGiOkICRWU%3D) for violating federal antitrust laws.
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=b3ee9883ad0c4836b457546f6365dec5&_e=KcjX6_G7oExLI5vXrintkNV4vKTpkd9hc2zdYLxfLXYjGaWiSaHiIVrKIZiw3hMlcOwQRaQDJXdRY9XpyTdQi1pLvPMJuttOhEjvNFZSHbySo4xePl-jgxU0wMJoWXEXUpcGMINk1dz3Mja2o0X49v_DFdQ4MhwMaOHNS_4dpdSrGK1TxV1QHc2AvVTwAXkzyboJ_cZVpvvTP-9vzpzf85zwlG0oqu4LHwUlqsnHxI7gLySmc6Cy2W_vy090D1WQ6j_OpjLJuuNXn0Ram3Ww1mBtk1GeQ4qDJ60EaSO215VobvCqLtBoDDR3axQa76PQRkrSrUfbWX6Wcn2WEa-WUmEuC2hJQlKKLsTvzYjT7_Z14JYmjFHxg-oOusqKGefQ)
---
Big tech corporations like Google wield an __enormous__ amount of power and influence over the internet and our daily lives. Google is the primary search engine, host, and advertising vessel for hundreds of millions of consumers and producers, while also competing directly against those same producers and consumers. Google single-handedly controls what consumers see – and, more significantly – what they do _not_ see. They also control what advertisers can say, and at what price.
---

50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---

clean_body: they hold an enormous amount of power over our daily lives, and it shouldn’t be this way.| | | friend, Earlier this week, I joined a bipartisan coalition of state attorneys general in a for violating federal antitrust laws. Big tech corporations like Google wield an enormous amount of power and influence over the internet and our daily lives. Google is the primary search engine, host, and advertising vessel for hundreds of millions of consumers and producers, while also competing directly against those same producers and consumers. Google single-handedly controls what consumers see – and, more significantly – what they do not see. They also control what advertisers can say, and at what price. friend, Virginians deserve a free market for products, services, and ideas, not a censored, curated monopoly from a corporation like Google – and I will do everythingI can to ensure that. Thank you for trusting me with this immense responsibility,Jason Miyares | | | | | | A Personal Note from Jason: 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57820381/389208589/85195366?sourceid=1048529&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc5Nzk4ZC05NDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-3znG7cM1tH3j_iAUm7d1njM34U9plsNLo6LAS8T9N8=&emci=75be4c46-fd9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b79798d-949d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** We're facing our toughest Senate map in decades heading into 2024, Peter.

While Republicans only have to defend 11 seats, Democrats have to defend a whopping **23** — and Mitch McConnell and his anti-choice allies _only need to flip two of them to take the chamber_. Senate control _will_ come down to key battleground states like Nevada, Michigan, and Wisconsin.

Make no mistake: These are battleground states where Democratic pro-choice candidates CAN win, but it'll be close. Here's how razor-thin the margins were in recent Senate races: **WISCONSIN:** Republican hold by 1.00% (2022)
**NEVADA:** Democratic hold by 0.5% (2022)
**MICHIGAN:** Democratic hold by 1.70% (2020) That's why your early investments matter so much. As the GOP gears up to dump millions into battleground Senate races, we can't afford to let the women we support start off at a massive fundraising disadvantage — not when reproductive rights for millions are on the line. **So please, donate right now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who can defend our narrow Senate majority and protect reproductive freedom nationwide:**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: 40 mass shootings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We are only a couple of weeks into 2023
#
Enough is enough, Peter.
**We are only 26 days into 2023 and already 3,031 people in the United States have died from gun violence, and at least 73 of those deaths have been the result of mass shootings.**
**[Add your name to my petition right now to stop the cycle of gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57820477/389208950/851359862?refcode=dd_em_230126_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230126_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzM4MTU1Ni05NTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFgziCLA7uwJpRcoEc5Wl_nwzej6I_Z6_pXyW87B1k8=&emci=0ec9dd62-8f9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=93381556-959d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
This year alone there have been 40 mass shootings in our country — and it’s only January.
No one should live in fear of being shot and killed with a weapon of war while buying groceries, going to work or school, attending a religious service, or going about their daily lives — but this is the reality in the only industrialized country where mass shootings occur on a regular basis.
**Congress has the power to act.** There are constitutional, common sense ways we can reform our gun laws — starting with universal background checks for gun sales, a policy majority of Americans support.
We can also take federal steps to ban assault weapons and get these weapons of war off our streets.
Let’s take action so that another family isn’t mourning the loss of a brother, sister, mother, or father after another senseless shooting — in Illinois, California, or anywhere else in the country.
**[Sign my petition now if you want Congress to work to end the epidemic of gun violence across the nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57820478/389208951/851359862?refcode=dd_em_230126_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230126_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzM4MTU1Ni05NTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFgziCLA7uwJpRcoEc5Wl_nwzej6I_Z6_pXyW87B1k8=&emci=0ec9dd62-8f9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=93381556-959d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**** ******** ****

Let’s take action so that another family isn’t mourning the loss of a brother, sister, mother, or father after another senseless shooting — in Illinois, California, or anywhere else in the country. My best, Dick Durbin ** **** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Our media is outright FAILING US in the current political moment. Let me explain how.
body:
Not the corporate media.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2ced8c9-32f9-44e3-84b1-7ae30cb38269/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Our media is outright FAILING US in the current political moment. Let me explain how._** [Let's start with Charles McGonigal, senior FBI official in charge of investigating Trump's relationship--his collusion with--Russia.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7a91917-cb88-4305-812c-d604b7c72d3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) A week before the election in 2016, a piece appeared in the NY Times that boggles the mind. It declared the FBI saw no connection between Trump & Russia. Insane at the time, but it's only grown more so as both the Senate Intelligence Committee--led by GOP former Sen. Richard Burr--and The Mueller Report found numerous instances of the Russians trying to help Trump. **From a meeting in Trump Tower attended by one of Putin's minions and Donny Trump Jr., ostensibly to get dirty on Hillary, to Paul Manafort's sharing polling with a Putinite, even if Mueller didn't find the meetings criminal (remember, Mueller was stonewalled by Trump et al), [it all easily fit the definition of "collusion." ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T049f352a-578a-425d-a34c-9b96da5cc0dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _Here's where McGonigal comes in. [He was literally arrested this week for being bribed by a sanctioned Russian oligarch with whom Manafort worked closely, Oleg Derispaska.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6895e06-05c8-4e50-b537-c4467feb57e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Deripaska magically had some of his sanctions removed in 2019 by 42 Senate Republicans, then turned around and offered $200 million for an aluminum plant in...Kentucky. Mitch McConnell's home state! The other Senator in Kentucky? Rand Paul, whom the late John McCain accused of working for the Kremlin on the Senate Floor._ **_[To summarize, the guy in charge of investigating Trump's ties to Putin was being bribed by a Putinite, ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb60c3ad-afd8-4835-b8c8-761ec57d38fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)the same one close to the convicted Manafort, and who seemingly offered Rand Paul/Mitch McConnell a $200MM bribe in the form of an aluminum plant in their state. _** **HOW IS THE MEDIA NOT COVERING THIS AS MUCH AS THEIR RIDICULOUS STORY ABOUT HILLARY'S EMAILS??** [_I went on Stephanie Miller's show to discuss this and other things. **These are the things the media either won't touch, or cover once and quickly move on. We will stay on these stories til these problems are solved.**_** **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e3176d1-fdba-4412-ba4d-1b1e26c523db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) So please [watch HERE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb733a0e6-a7da-4d98-b902-f03f3033dc0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And [please subscribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4453d11a-c3f8-499c-a1cf-0c003f383df0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to The Blue Amp (YouTube) Channel, [HERE!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18ea066d-c844-4de2-bbe2-0ac553b465ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **A second story: **The idiocy surrounding the Republican fabricated urban myth kitty litters are being placed in classrooms for students to use. **_[Like so much from the Right it's just a flat out lie, but the media won't consistently call them on this, and recently even right-wing former football coach Tony Dungy repeated it. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T943b70c4-3bb5-4cf7-9451-ecb2342206e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [It's insane. It's inane. It puts teachers at risk,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40e38e24-6689-42dc-8e14-ffe461b3258f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) not long after a teacher was recently shot by a six year old--SIX--in Newport News, Virginia. The sad thing? [While there aren't kitty litters, there are pales in some classrooms in case a mass shooting occurs and students need to go to the bathroom while in lockdown](https://default.salsalabs.org/T205b11c9-95f0-4927-a750-c1559d0cd531/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). I feel sick even typing that last sentence. Again, the media may do a one-off on these stories, never making clear they're lies and making those telling the lies pay any price. [BUT WE WON'T. Please watch HERE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae597fda-a0dd-409d-8eb0-98934158c65e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) & [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel HERE. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4130587d-2e47-4cc9-8b70-df5630139590/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for all you do, my friends. We'll get this information out via these emails, [Youtube](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a0f674d-95e0-47ee-94d3-847db65d6dc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d18e72d-9ca5-41a0-87f7-2cfde741b0db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)...hell, telegraph, carrier pigeon, marathon runner & hot air balloon if we have to. [For we are not--and never will be--The Corporate Media.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1789a1c7-2c01-4157-9d31-8104715f7fc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfb2b7cd-31ae-4cac-8f5b-1fb69c181bb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Susie Lee
subject: Broke a New Year’s resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57839117/389256920/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg1NDcwMy1jMDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkANwUecN5vBLGxHHyxsAXM78kNfMLL9IgCy3HIZ5-Y=)

| | Folks, I have bad news: I broke one of my New Year’s resolutions. I’ll explain how but first, I need to ask: [**Can you chip in $25 to help my team reach our end-of-month goal for January?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57839118/389256921/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230126_FR_EOM1_B1_OTHER_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg1NDcwMy1jMDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkANwUecN5vBLGxHHyxsAXM78kNfMLL9IgCy3HIZ5-Y=) | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57839119/389256922/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230126_FR_EOM1_B1_OTHER_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg1NDcwMy1jMDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkANwUecN5vBLGxHHyxsAXM78kNfMLL9IgCy3HIZ5-Y=)
---
I wanted to go this month without having to coordinate an end-of-month fundraising push, but it looks like that was too optimistic. After reviewing numbers with my Finance Director, I can tell you that **this end-of-month goal couldn’t have come at a better time.**
January was a difficult month for nearly every campaign’s fundraising. So many of us were busy with the new year that it put fighting back against the Republican House Majority at the back of so many folks’ minds. _(Believe me when I say I’m jealous!)_
But now that we’re back in the swing of things, one thing has become clear: **there is no more time to waste.**
As campaigns for 2024 begin to launch across the country, my team and I are gearing up for the far-right candidate the GOP will run against me. It’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots team to help protect this swing district.
And listen, Republicans have already begun their continued assault on reproductive freedom. Next on their chopping block: Social Security, Medicare, and LGBTQ+ protections.
My end-of-month goal for January helps defend our battleground district and take on the far-right Republican House Majority. So, I’m asking personally: [**Will you chip in $25 or more to help me reach my $8,000 goal for January?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57839120/389256923/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230126_FR_EOM1_B1_OTHER_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg1NDcwMy1jMDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkANwUecN5vBLGxHHyxsAXM78kNfMLL9IgCy3HIZ5-Y=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, I have bad news: I broke one of my New Year’s resolutions. I’ll explain how but first, I need to ask: = | | | = I wanted to go this month without having to coordinate an end-of-month fundraising push, but it looks like that was too optimistic. After reviewing numbers with my Finance Director, I can tell you that this end-of-month goal couldn’t have come at a better time. January was a difficult month for nearly every campaign’s fundraising. So many of us were busy with the new year that it put fighting back against the Republican House Majority at the back of so many folks’ minds. (Believe me when I say I’m jealous!) But now that we’re back in the swing of things, one thing has become clear: there is no more time to waste. As campaigns for 2024 begin to launch across the country, my team and I are gearing up for the far-right candidate the GOP will run against me. It’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots team to help protect this swing district. And listen, Republicans have already begun their continued assault on reproductive freedom. Next on their chopping block: Social Security, Medicare, and LGBTQ+ protections. My end-of-month goal for January helps defend our battleground district and take on the far-right Republican House Majority. So, I’m asking personally: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for all that you do, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. |

Meta (Facebook’s parent company) announced yesterday they would be allowing former President Donald Trump back on the site after a two-year suspension. Trump had been banned from the site after _inciting an insurrection_ on January 6th, largely through the lies he spread online. **Under no circumstances should Donald Trump be allowed back on the platform, especially as he’s running for president again in 2024. ** We’re collecting signatures to tell Meta: Do not allow Trump back on Facebook to inflict further damage on our democracy! [_**If you stand with us, please take a moment and sign the petition now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57821194/389211516/-1553661645?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFmMGY4OGYtOTc5ZC1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZK2VR7C6QYFpjy7w8Z67SjmYmsxi1qVPGrhdabZS2yQ=&emci=2ff0f88f-979d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=31f0f88f-979d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [TELL META: NO TRUMP!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57821195/389211518/-1553661645?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230126_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFmMGY4OGYtOTc5ZC1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZK2VR7C6QYFpjy7w8Z67SjmYmsxi1qVPGrhdabZS2yQ=&emci=2ff0f88f-979d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=31f0f88f-979d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: | = Meta (Facebook’s parent company) announced yesterday they would be allowing former President Donald Trump back on the site after a two-year suspension. Trump had been banned from the site after inciting an insurrection on January 6th, largely through the lies he spread online. Under no circumstances should Donald Trump be allowed back on the platform, especially as he’s running for president again in 2024. We’re collecting signatures to tell Meta: Do not allow Trump back on Facebook to inflict further damage on our democracy! | Thanks for making your voice heard, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Will you endorse my re-election campaign, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| |
---
Peter, **With the 2022 election in the rearview mirror, we’re officially kicking off our re-election effort to keep Illinois' 17th District blue.** I have no doubt that our race will be highly competitive once again, and the outcome here could play a key role in determining House control. The stakes are high, but I decided early on that we wouldn't use hair-on-fire email schemes that have become the bane of Democratic politics. You won't ever see any arbitrary deadlines, hyperbolic exaggerations, or obnoxious scare tactics here. We're doing things a bit differently, Peter. This campaign is about listening and addressing the issues affecting Central & Northwest Illinois families daily. This isn't about the political fights trending on social media or cable news that have caused so much distrust and dysfunction over the years. **We’re not going to scare you into supporting us, but we hope you'll join us if you’re willing:** **[Now that I’m officially representing IL-17 in Congress, will you add your name to say you personally endorse my re-election campaign? It’s important to know that I can count on your support to win this race.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlNSJpQO6eAQponUXJPzJSyFFz5-3X9uZEmUzvtoSEwwKb3dGjqOzfnsPr1hNklJk-rXrFtB4NmoSzHaHlBfUmqPVwGxVtymAAfSkf7UrewvuR9rgiUM8o0koiNvCb681BDRHL2ye5sof3iG3yZ9PmixQX_txZBUt8ql0MJZI6G9VwgR6xmpgjZqbCHWE_CgS-9HGrzDwHnbTxWl3XOf7lL_dJHuiAKyYls9M-iYvhjhUAcfmJvor1ppGfJW-Levf8x6z5GoSbe6pPewJSh3t6SL_TlD07GsRqikGpmXvHe1yGKK2ZcL8nVwxzrMxkOA7ekFatH9cXLPOvRicJX_OyRs4iNKZB-hYbTf6MDspuAdSgDRNcz5ZYjtFQ8Baa8b4mGM8F20Qu_27t9Q5VyeXF7/3t6/Oj0ZBa7nQ3KksUxj2r48uw/h0/SFhq5RivPRGg0Prpzapq1fSxnuIkUC-Zyhm-uPRcnzA)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Are universities getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6sg9755fst6dr0fqdk9cnbfsr63982ufel3rnfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthm9oj0slh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za03eldqktkgq2gm1onhl8mei4mcilqvjbbpksoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthm9oj0slh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z76c0jkgrl6ispfivp1bcrrbcappq1ckg9s1p2g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cthm9oj0slh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Brett Broesder, Democrats Serve
subject: No choice but to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| This week, we should have been celebrating the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. Instead, we find ourselves at a perilous moment in the fight for reproductive rights.

Abortion rights are under attack – and we have no choice but to fight back.

[We need to elect public service pros who will fight tooth and nail to restore abortion access. Brett Broesder

* * *
**_Here’s our email from yesterday if you missed it:_**

Peter,

This week in 1973, the Supreme Court affirmed the constitutional right to abortion in _Roe v. Wade_.

But now, 50 years later, abortion rights have been gutted at the highest court in the land. Millions of Americans now live in states with abortion bans or extreme restrictions.

It’s on all of us to fight back.

Democrats with public service backgrounds understand the profound impact that access to reproductive healthcare can have in a community. **We’re building a pro-choice majority that will fight for abortion access – and we need you to join us.**

[Will you sign on and commit to voting for pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57821725/389213648/-1839575787?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230126_1_2&refcode2=4d2a8eae-999d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=xsh/hp6wL5SOeEQDXPUxEqz2C9C5NcSvQgx+NDhDW1/RgkjroOwU9QoHGNi6/tQJ4DDv6jh2m9DuEg42EOu+XA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkMmE4ZWFlLTk5OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3G9vVquernGOiKojejA0DnLbKHM6pFYX7pv10uysl_0=&emci=f7379fca-129c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4d2a8eae-999d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

When I founded EMILY's List back in 1985, it was just a handful of women with a radical idea: Let's create a political organization _specifically dedicated_ to the advancement of Democratic pro-choice women in politics. An organization by women, for women.

A lot has changed since 1985, but one of our core tenants has not — and that's the idea that the backbone of EMILY's List is, and always will be, our supporters.

**[At this critical juncture for abortion rights in this country, we need the investment of this community. Please donate $3 today to help recruit, train, and elect Democratic pro-choice women.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57822380/389216571/379932632?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzg0ZDdmOC05YTlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iv_CMqfViSNVfTBgz4_28_rdrOxUOmCiJ2QSr-0YlC0=&emci=c64193da-d7a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2384d7f8-9a9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Your support for EMILY’s List isn't about any one campaign or even one election cycle. When you become a member of this community, you're standing with over _five million_ of your fellow EMILY's List fighters who are helping elect phenomenal women to office. And you're sustaining an organization that doesn't _just_ show up in high-profile races (though we are deep in the trenches in those elections too.)

This organization _also_ invests deeply in the less flashy races — like flipping key seats in the state legislature to take back control from anti-choice Republicans or electing governors across the nation who could ultimately be the deciding factor in whether millions of people in their state have access to abortion at all. This is a 24/7, 365 days a year, every year kind of place.

With _Roe v. Wade_ overturned and attacks on abortion rights at an all-time high, this moment is a critical tipping point for our country. There's too much at stake in our politics to shy away from the fight now. We are a team that can help make a real, lasting difference. But we have to step up.

Endorsement of Joe Gruters
Joe Gruters, currently Chairman of the Republican Party of Florida, is running for Treasurer of the Republican National Committee in Friday's big election.

I have known Joe since before I was a candidate in 2016, and before he was even elected to office. Now he is representing Sarasota, the home of Truth Social, very very well.

Joe has done a great job leading Florida Republicans to historic wins, including my two great victories, and he will do a fantastic job as RNC Treasurer.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Did you see this? Abolish the ATF. Seriously.
body:
We're putting the ATF in our crosshairs.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)
---
| Peter,
---
| In my district in Florida, "alcohol, tobacco, and firearms" is just our idea of a good Friday night.
Not so in the D.C. Swamp...
There, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has become nothing more than a tool of converting otherwise law-abiding citizens into FELONS!
That's right, Peter - with yet another anti-2nd Amendment regulation being rolled out by Merrick Garland and these alphabet agency authoritarians, it's clear that the days of the ATF's unconstitutional tyranny MUST be brought to a swift end.
I'm not going to sit back while the power-hungry tyrants in the Biden Regime continue their unlawful assault on lawful gun owners! Instead, our MAGA Majority is taking a different approach...
Peter, I'm calling for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms to be ABOLISHED, and [I want you to be a part of this movement! Join me today, and let's rid ourselves of these gun-grabbing tyrants FOR GOOD! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTEr2sMpaFuwLCr3XTBIFKb-p9nhtXB60NR5gm54jwRYbU7ctriW9ILPNYqB31feaqgBVImVTSplCWJw54CIUC9aWWX6htuus3Yk49x4z_qQttnj31z4x_lpoCznEG9AQRVmQux8jHL3Ved13bubF_hfahLCLuvs8EAF2ISgtNSQn-tW9Hsca8TVtEv5oGnmS4UwdVxhdd3-PSk-k820AThBA==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)
---
| | [>> ABOLISH THE ATF - CHIP IN TO THE FUND <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)
---
| Peter, we need to draw a line in the sand on this one, or else we may NEVER be able to reign in the Deep State that is being weaponized against us.
We know that these Swamp bureaucracies already worked with Big Tech to censor Free Speech and rig an election against Donald J. Trump.
We know that they already conspired to label concerned parents as "domestic terrorists."
We know that they have been arming the IRS to the gills and forming a private militia of tax collectors.
But now that one of the WORST of these bureaucracies is once again targeting the rights of AMERICANS to bear arms?! [WE HAVE TO TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)
I'm doing just that by calling for the ATF to be completely abolished altogether. I'm not kidding.
I also know that a big undertaking like this won't be accomplished without the full support of our movement. [So if you want the ATF's grimy hands off YOUR lawful firearms, , will you please join me with a boost of support towards this ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)[ABOLISH THE ATF FUND](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)[ today?? ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DX-udUVzifvezQ3ySc2rWP98BybTG9qzeC_Thg3XG6rpacSVMDiALMHJnrsDHTE9Z4uEOUmJOPxajswGgwMt1czTWlg7WQyLW0lrvuWGja8s0OK7eC1jim6etV3R56lZOKeMOLDSedNo2DMzqmIJcWXSqqtfeQDMPExhIK4A5wZL4GuB4mXAHjyZEczEY1zG6EHdZtQJ0sMrVu65-h85A==&c=jXL3i2HuftZorr3z73tv8dzkFFWvf0YfiR2-uGFA7UOu6lGPhO6K8w==&ch=jejIhkUAt30X2h_lp3nV124ZCYsgObLMyTiaMq0DDV46GQDm3UTE5Q==)

clean_body: We're putting the ATF in our crosshairs. | | | | == | Peter, | In my district in Florida, "alcohol, tobacco, and firearms" is just our idea of a good Friday night. Not so in the D.C. Swamp... There, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has become nothing more than a tool of converting otherwise law-abiding citizens into FELONS! That's right, Peter - with yet another anti-2nd Amendment regulation being rolled out by Merrick Garland and these alphabet agency authoritarians, it's clear that the days of the ATF's unconstitutional tyranny MUST be brought to a swift end. I'm not going to sit back while the power-hungry tyrants in the Biden Regime continue their unlawful assault on lawful gun owners! Instead, our MAGA Majority is taking a different approach... Peter, I'm calling for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms to be ABOLISHED, and == | == | | == | Peter, we need to draw a line in the sand on this one, or else we may NEVER be able to reign in the Deep State that is being weaponized against us. We know that these Swamp bureaucracies already worked with Big Tech to censor Free Speech and rig an election against Donald J. Trump. We know that they already conspired to label concerned parents as "domestic terrorists." We know that they have been arming the IRS to the gills and forming a private militia of tax collectors. But now that one of the WORST of these bureaucracies is once again targeting the rights of AMERICANS to bear arms?! == I'm doing just that by calling for the ATF to be completely abolished altogether. I'm not kidding. I also know that a big undertaking like this won't be accomplished without the full support of our movement. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for taking a stand, | == | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | | | | | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Esther, FL 32569 | == | == Sent by mailto:campaign@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: David McIntosh, Club for Growth Action
subject: Bad for Washington. Good for us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | Peter, meet the greatest fear of the Washington establishment: **Congressman Jim Banks.**
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | Jim's a devoted husband, a proud father of 3, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.** But do you know what Jim _really_ hates? **Wasteful government spending, such as...**
---
-> Over $3 Million to Watch Hamsters Fight on Steroids -> More than $1.1. Million to Get Mice Drunk -> Over $100,000 to Study if Thanos could Snap His Fingers in Real Life
---
_Yes, these are all very real._ **And unfortunately, your tax dollars are being wasted to fund all sorts of programs just like these. ** Peter, both sides are in on the wasteful spending. That's exactly why we need another fiscal hawk like Jim Banks to lead the fight in the Senate.
---
| | [**SEND JIM TO RESTORE FISCAL SANITY >> CHIP IN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
**And don 't worry, Jim knows how to fight. ** In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom's Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | **But his fight didn 't stop there.** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. **Jim continues this fight today in Congress. ** He knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee 's Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation's fiscal house in order. **
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | **Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that 's exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate. ** **_[Peter, will you send Jim Banks to the U.S. Senate to restore fiscal sanity to our government?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)_**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253771:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r)
---
| | Thank you, David McIntosh Club for Growth Action
---
| | Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at [www.clubforgrowth.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62253772:62e6qdGNM:m:1:3334294963:B309A76DE3DD8FC4DEDC66EBD0C60ED5:r) or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. By doing so you affirmatively accept membership in the Club for Growth or affirm a prior membership. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---

subject: The GOP capitalizes on ethics failures by Democrats
body:
Democrats--and newspaper editors--created preventable opportunities for right wing Republicans by embracing congressional conflicts of interest
