name: Shontel Brown for Congress
subject: Have you seen Ohio’s latest restrictive voting rights laws?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Under Ohio’s latest laws, millions will lose access to their voting rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849079/389268274/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230126VoterID_VotingRights_TB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY0ZGQzYy1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqjgDxIAWeoGVND1olvV6IxmRv8xlrGJ-SPxtBTQ8Gk=) Peter, we’re seeing some major changes in voting rights access across the nation, and right here in Ohio, voting rights laws are now as strict as they can get.

**Passing one of the nation's most restrictive voter ID laws, Ohio Governor Mike DeWine and the GOP-controlled state legislature have taken voting rights access leagues backward.** _This latest law limits acceptable forms of photo ID, shortens early voting and absentee voting, and even limits who can get curbside assistance voting to those “physically unable” to enter the building._

More than 1 million Ohioans with expired or suspended licenses will lose their access to the ballot, forcing them to jump through bureaucratic hoops to vote. Since their county-issued veteran IDs are no longer acceptable, thousands of veterans will be left disenfranchised. _This attack on voting access just isn’t right, Peter._

Despite no instances of voter impersonation and Ohio Republican Secretary of State’s assessment that the 2020 election was safe and secure with “a 99.98% accuracy rate,” **Ohio Republicans are set on restricting our voting rights ahead of the next presidential election.**

[**_So, Peter, will you stand with Rep. Shontel Brown against this wave of voting rights restrictions by adding your name to our petition today? Sign on now to tell the GOP, “Hands off our voting rights!”_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849080/389268275/627500040?refcode=EM_PET_230126VoterID_VotingRights_TB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY0ZGQzYy1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqjgDxIAWeoGVND1olvV6IxmRv8xlrGJ-SPxtBTQ8Gk=&emci=1d64dd3c-cd9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1e64dd3c-cd9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME
STAND FOR VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849081/389268276/627500040?refcode=EM_PET_230126VoterID_VotingRights_TB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY0ZGQzYy1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqjgDxIAWeoGVND1olvV6IxmRv8xlrGJ-SPxtBTQ8Gk=&emci=1d64dd3c-cd9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1e64dd3c-cd9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Onward,

Shontel Brown for Congress | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: polls were tight. Our budget was tighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.
| | |
---
Hi there,

FIRST, polls tightened and GOP spending skyrocketed in the final days of the campaign. Pundits doubted whether we could win.

As a result, we made aggressive investments in additional advertising to ensure that we could win. We hoped that we would be able to increase our fundraising to keep up with the growing onslaught of last-ditch spending by Republicans.

We now have a hole to fill to get those last bills paid.

[Will you please chip in $3 or as much as you can to help retire our debt? Team,
It can be hard to stay in the know. The news moves fast, it’s impossible to keep up with everything online, and your inbox quickly gets flooded with emails (sorry about that).
That’s why today we wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit more about our texting program. Here on Team Slotkin, we’re committed to keeping you in the know while making things as easy as possible for you. And we definitely don’t want you to miss any future updates or announcements from Elissa. That’s where our texting program comes in. You can easily stay up to date on all that we’re up to with concise texts from us and Elissa.

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Become a Founding Donor of Schiff 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Adam just announced that he’s running to represent California in the
United States Senate.

Adam believes that we are in an existential fight for the future of our
country and its democracy. That we made real progress in the midterms, but
that the real danger lies ahead, in another presidential election in which
the GOP believes that if it loses, the process is somehow rigged or
fraudulent.

Many of the most consequential fights for the future of our democracy will
be waged in the U.S. Senate. That’s why he is running for the Senate in
2024.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1024&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]Will you show Adam he has your support by pitching in $10 to become a
Founding Donor of Schiff 2024 today?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1025&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]DONATE $10

Already, the response from folks across the country has been overwhelming.
Just in the few hours since he announced his exploratory campaign.

It’s clear: The American people are desperate for a Senate that will
address the many urgent challenges facing our democracy and our economy,
and they want a fighter, like Adam.

One that won’t allow obstructionist senators — Republicans or Democrats —
or archaic, unconstitutional rules like the filibuster to stand in the way
of the progress our country so desperately needs.

Because at the end of the day, our economy must ensure that all
hard-working people have the chance to succeed, or both our economy — and
our democracy — will fail. It can’t just work for large corporations or
the wealthy. We deserve better.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1026&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]So Derek, pitch in $10 today to join Schiff 2024 as a
Founding Member before midnight tonight. We are off to a fast start and we
need to keep the momentum going!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1027&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.U6B5wJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1028&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.aZ7DO3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1029&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.sfJsy4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1030&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.0yUkhh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1031&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.3OtEFQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1032&akid=1659%2E5257348%2EG5nIA2 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for adding your support for Adam today. It means the world to him —
and to us.

More soon,

— Schiff HQ

name: Virginia Democrats
subject: VADEMS block abortion bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Three abortion bans defeated

|
---
Derek, **Earlier today, VADEMS blocked three abortion bans in the State Senate.** This secures Virginian’s right to choose for 2023, but Republicans could take control next year and change it all. The GOP in the General Assembly are eager to implement an abortion ban, and they will absolutely try again at every opportunity. Democratic lawmakers will continue the battle for abortion rights in Virginia. If we’re going to protect abortion past this year, we have to have the support needed to win in November. **I’m running for re-election in 2024, and I’m ready to continue our work to RESCUE AMERICA from Washington’s out-of-control spending and woke agenda.**

The time for strong conservative leadership in Washington is NOW, Peter.

I’ve NEVER compromised our conservative values to please the radical Left, and I’m not about to start now.

**Our Senate race is going to be the fight of a lifetime. We’re facing the Washington establishment and radical left, and they have a target on my back after we had the CLOSEST Senate election in America in 2018 that went to a recount.**

[**I need every grassroots patriot to stand with me NOW. name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6vu6g2a11sc2ub9mmanhffdcsm1e9i1p7privg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5939nc2uobrg93b0mva6cvl9v8u6chaltt7olmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsjkf55dti935dfd3v666h25to7sf7gg8me8l1do_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlbsq2fuejedrcns0bpl0tov1jkrnki9jkcf470o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zclpt803v9bs6jn13r83v1lejq80fd0c2lt2epmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd3oq4k7kum1h4n9pt845vc25a0aggmv5bf3an9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7a083bssh6mbm5qhlot0ra3t77itouu3pkhhsb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoi8n9tfqb3fv9nv9t0iq2mv3g3u1bnk3mq12vu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zft8bmqs9e7jf9mrn7h68ia4rid01mp8o04rj6v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfnk0ut4qvd8aco6od81r6n4q65cgnrd5suu2680_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhuqgbopnsa26sn3l92u6pft7qec513i4bt8cdgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zld365vrerk9muo8gk4sur5ev3k254jomck0pep8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6nbce8gu5td8mbbf3h20mlqikekfel9t9u8va10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctjm2ob0cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

subject: Biden’s War on American Energy is a DISASTER

body:

Peter, The cost of a gallon of gas is still $1 more than when President Trump left office in January 2021. And with the coldest months of the year upon us, Americans are paying nearly 30 percent more on average to heat their homes.
The worst part of it is this is all by design...
Joe Biden, desperate to appease left-wing climate activists, declared War on American Energy when he took office – _**a**** _nd_ we’re ALL paying the price, from the cost to fill our tanks to the inflated cost of goods and services to the pain at the thermostat**_. He has burdened American producers and consumers while strengthening dictators.
We must reverse course. For months, I’ve been leading the fight to unleash domestic energy production and I’m not letting up.
Today, I’m asking for your help to ramp up pressure on the Biden Administration.
Take a moment now to sign my petition to **Make America Energy Independent Again.**

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: BREAKING NEWS! Another Key Conservative Endorses Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative!
body:
| | This is breaking news! On the same day that former Congressman Ted Yoho headlines a Ryan Chamberlin fundraiser, former Marion County Commissioner Parnell Townley endorses Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative. | | | |
---
[Unsubscribe](%%unsubscribelink%%)

|
---
| [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iAarh2A6fQve0iI&b=DFbRNCOSrtYzh3Vo2kjcOg)
---
|
---
| Fellow Conservatives:

This is breaking news! On the same day that former Congressman Ted Yoho headlines a Ryan Chamberlin fundraiser, former Marion County Commissioner Parnell Townley endorses Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative.

This adds up to one simple fact. Ryan Chamberlin is the only Ron DeSantis conservative in the race, and he is the only choice for true conservatives. Parnell Townley agrees. In his endorsement, Townley said as follows: “Ryan will be a great ally to conservatives and Governor Ron DeSantis in the Florida House. Now more than ever, we need committed, strong conservatives like him who will fight the establishment and protect our community and Florida from the destructive, woke policies of Joe Biden.”

Chamberlin has now received endorsements from former Congressman Ted Yoho, former County Commissioner Parnell Townley, and national recognized Trump medical advisor Dr. Steven Hatfill.

Ryan Chamberlin is an author, speaker, and consultant that has been working for the last 2 years to launch The True Patriot Network (TPN), a conservative social media and news platform supporting strong American values. Ryan has worked with Success Magazine, speaks regularly at national conferences, and recently co-authored his 5th book titled Think Big which became an international bestseller in May of 2022. His 3rd book titled The Rich You Formula was co-authored with the late relationship expert Gary Smalley and endorsed by Mike Huckabee. Ryan has been married to Jenny Chamberlin for 28 years. They met at Souls Harbor First Pentecostal Church in 1989, where they still attend.

The special election is on Tuesday, March 7th.

To contribute to the Ryan Chamberlin Campaign, please visit: [https://secure.anedot.com/ryan-chamberlin-campaign/f8ad9e05-ea3d-4da6-997f-85d0edff8534](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iAarh2A6fQve0iI&b=1I2CSh2Vrw0ZalmkUOX1fg)

name: DSCC Team
subject: Can I make a request?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, it's Sen. Schumer.

I’m reaching out to you with an important request, but it's a little different than normal, so please let me explain: **I need you to add the DSCC to your email address book.**

When we send grassroots Democrats like you an email, it's because we're trying to organize supporters, share critical updates, seek your opinion on the best strategies to defend the Senate, and -- yes it's true -- raise money that we urgently need to keep Mitch McConnell out of power.

None of that can happen if our emails land in the spam folder instead of the inbox.

Technology is always changing, so that's easier said than done. But what I'm asking you for today could make a _BIG_ difference -- and it's extremely easy. This is how to do it if you're using a computer:

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&akid=9621%2E9716520%2E6AIp-c)

And here's how it might look if you're doing it on a phone or tablet:

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&akid=9621%2E9716520%2E6AIp-c)

I can't stress enough how helpful this would be. I know this probably sounds strange to you. It’s strange to me! But I'm serious when I say that this is the single most important thing you can do to help defend the Senate today.

**So please, take a few seconds to add us to your address book.** I know you’ll come through for me.

Thank you for everything that you do,

Chuck

[
](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&akid=9621%2E9716520%2E6AIp-c)

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230126-DSCCTeam-SchumerAddressBook-Pros-sl1&akid=9621%2E9716520%2E6AIp-c)

name: Team Grassley
subject: When Senator Grassley is not on the ballot, grassroots donations help elect Republicans at the state and federal level.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, Senator Grassley is honored to continue representing Iowa in the U.S. Senate and is working as hard as ever to ensure the views and values of Iowans are heard loud and clear in Washington. As a good government watchdog, he'll continue holding our government accountable to the people. We are grateful for our supporters who have helped us build a strong grassroots organization and helped fuel Senator Grassley's re-election victory. He is fighting to cut wasteful spending and restore fiscal discipline, secure the border and stop fentanyl from killing our kids and strengthen our freedoms and way of life. When Senator Grassley is not on the ballot, grassroots donations help elect Republicans at the state and federal level. Senator Grassley will leverage his political leadership to help Republicans take back the Senate Majority and the White House in 2024. Keep in touch,
Team Grassley

Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

---

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: A 30% NATIONAL sales tax?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Team, I wouldn’t have believed this if I hadn’t seen the bill text in black and white:

Team, I wouldn’t have believed this if I hadn’t seen the bill text in black and white: _**House Republicans have introduced legislation to implement a national 30% sales tax.**_ This plan would make life so much harder for the regular families I promised to fight for in Congress, which is why I’m going to work hard to make sure it never passes. And I’m asking you to join me, friend. **[Will you add your name next to mine and say that you OPPOSE the GOP plan for a 30% national sales tax?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57828610/389238215/788328118?refcode=email_012623_salestaxpetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyOWM1Yy1hYzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tEyo4cVwCjICKcxVdLjwiq-EbMA80SOhcRNzItE440=&emci=d311e4be-8a9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=09e29c5c-ac9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** | | [ADD YOU NAME → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57828611/389238216/788328118?refcode=email_012623_salestaxpetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyOWM1Yy1hYzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tEyo4cVwCjICKcxVdLjwiq-EbMA80SOhcRNzItE440=&emci=d311e4be-8a9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=09e29c5c-ac9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

By replacing the income tax with a massive national sales tax, this horrifying GOP plan would raise taxes on 90% of American households.
That means paying 30% more each week for groceries. 30% more for gas. 30% higher costs every time you buy new school supplies, get new clothes, or treat yourself to a night out.
**It is simply appalling to give the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations another enormous tax cut while hiking day-to-day costs for regular Americans by 30%.** [**If you agree with me, friend, please add your name.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57828612/389238217/-1646716368?refcode=email_012623_salestaxpetition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyOWM1Yy1hYzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tEyo4cVwCjICKcxVdLjwiq-EbMA80SOhcRNzItE440=&emci=d311e4be-8a9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=09e29c5c-ac9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

name: American Update
subject: Trump Loses Millions Of Rally Viewers As DirectTV ‘Deplatforms’ NEWSMAX
body:
BREAKING UPDATE: Donald Trump Makes A FULL RETURN To Social Media

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3JHy4SS9diRXnu95KXBpmA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657944%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QxwRVK7AV8nVB9TyS6bU%2fA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657055%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=08EcLSLh%2fMFvum9Ae1J2AQ&sysid=1 Trump Loses Millions Of Rally Viewers As DirectTV ‘Deplatforms’ NEWSMAX

In a move that shocked many, Newsmax has been deplatformed by DirecTV. This comes following another controversial move by DirecTV to deplatform OAN in April of 2022. The move by DirecTV has angered many Republicans, and Newsmax is looking to fight back by seeking a Congressional hearing about the alleged censorship by DirecTV, as they’ve never sought to remove liberal-leaning networks such as CNN, MNSBC, ABC, or other mainstream and liberal-leaning outlets.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Tax the rich, not our groceries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are showing us just how out of touch they really are...
#
Peter,
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26787?refcode=em20230126-2097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)
---
Just three weeks into their House majority, Republicans have already shown us their true colors. They've proposed a ludicrous 30% national sales tax that would impact everything from groceries to gas.
**Every day, the GOP makes it clear that they're working on behalf of the rich and powerful, at the expense of all of the rest of us.**
Despite their claims, their tax proposal would disproportionately hurt working families and provide yet another windfall to the very wealthiest. Unlike them, our movement is fighting for a country and an economy that works for everyone. [**Will you make a $3 contribution today to support Pramila while she leads our progressive coalition to fight off the GOP's ridiculous national sales tax?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26787?refcode=em20230126-2097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26787?refcode=em20230126-2097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)**
We know that our tax system needs to be reformed. To start: the richest need to pay their fair share. Last year's Inflation Reduction Act included taxes on large corporations and closed some of the loopholes used by the richest to avoid paying their fair share.
**But our work is far from over:** we must continue to find and close all of the loopholes in our tax code that give unfair breaks to the rich and powerful.
Republicans have shown us over and over again that they will prioritize regressive and dangerous policies to appease their wealthy backers instead of fighting for the 99%.
From day one in Congress, Pramila has pushed for progressive solutions that will ensure a fair taxation system where those with the least won't have to foot the bill for those who have the most. She always has and always will advocate tirelessly for an agenda that works for us all, not just the one percent.
[**Can you pitch in $3 or any amount today to stand with Pramila while she holds the line against the GOP's regressive economic policies?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26787?refcode=em20230126-2097amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26787?refcode=em20230126-2097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230126-2097-footer&t=24&refcode2=2097_420207_UbPb7i&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2097%2E420207%2EUbPb7i)

Friend,

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

clean_body: Peter, While the right-wing is determined to put up roadblocks for progress at every turn, Greg is focused on the real, urgent needs of working people across this country. , Greg highlights his commitment to delivering for Texas families: = Real change begins not only with clarity of purpose and vision, but new perspectives and ways of thinking. Greg is proud to be part of a freshman class that is ready to make sure our government delivers for everyone, not just big corporate interests. From Maxwell Frost, the first Gen Z member of Congress, to Delia Ramirez, the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest, our progressive caucus is ready to fight for the change Congress needs. Those in power will always be resistant to any change that puts their power at risk. We must fight back and continue our work to put that power back in the hands of the people. = **= We deserve to live in a world where everyone living in the U.S. is guaranteed dignity, safety, and given the opportunity to grow. = Thank you, Tara = Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: The GOP majority is ready to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Take the survey before midnight >> | Republicans in Congress are ready to get to work. The first 100 days of the 118th Congress are critically important for the new GOP majority to...
Friend,

Republicans in Congress are ready to get to work.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Wisconsin needs Tammy Baldwin in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leading the PAC
body:
#
Hi there -
[**Mandela here, humbly asking you to split a $5 contribution between Tammy Baldwin’s re-election campaign and Leading the PAC today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=1&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
You got a lot of emails from me last year asking for your support in my Senate campaign against Ron Johnson. But today, I am not asking you to support me, I am asking you to help protect Wisconsin.
Wisconsinites and this country deserve a Senator that will uplift and protect its people, and Tammy Baldwin is that Senator.
Tammy has been a leading voice in the Senate over the past 10 years and Wisconsin cannot afford to lose her leadership. She’s a trailblazer, and a role model to so many women and LGBTQ+ community members across the country.
She first made history when she became the first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin, and again when she was elected as the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.
But it wasn't all so easy. She’s frequently been a top target for national Republicans and endured years of attacks while having millions of dollars of dark money dumped against her. And there is no doubt that this cycle will be any different.
The slim Democratic Senate Majority is once again up for grabs, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat Tammy.
But Tammy’s never given up despite all the odds being against her. And she won't this time either, as long as she has you by her side.
[**So please: Can you split a contribution of $5 — or anything you can — between Tammy Baldwin’s re-election campaign and Leading the PAC? I wouldn't be asking if this weren't so important.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=2&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/2924?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.IhV3C2&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=21&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.k4m2Pj&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=22&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.fL7mi8&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=23&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.iOGUgr&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=24&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.1UmEMz&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=25&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=26&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
Tammy is a trailblazer for Wisconsin and this country and we can't afford to lose her in the Senate.
Thanks in advance for adding your contribution today.
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em230126-1-gm&t=27&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4111%2E196590%2E32Q-Z8)
Paid for by Leading the PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b5c86dcda034cd9a9b9dedebf907474&_e=LpJgHqQ9FPYewHWmTKV5iM_xWiDU3YpzpZ2qImLPoj2toxkd21HhqBsEbFZBWFt7Ar4BrbX7J3um-uR_wrnoaTbAPzY7lUD3Pl3N4Wpz5Ir5gtm9KPi8rKpULJX-nZEnK1_8YvK8pTp1ghRdznaxQc2ZAkKhjuhqZ1BgC6HX0KD2I8n9IEIHpgUmsDV1QysNRaUlLH1zhWXkNCSk3lytt1_xdys8Vj1fuQQaFrWp8nrGtR-eX9KUrsDVvburZ2z1NPbVog3OJPUsBtv0OF1tYdXUKMXu0bE1eDcLooUk_aoZBl7ywJzFi3u1iIpcV9w-)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b5c86dcda034cd9a9b9dedebf907474&_e=LpJgHqQ9FPYewHWmTKV5iM_xWiDU3YpzpZ2qImLPoj2toxkd21HhqBsEbFZBWFt7Ar4BrbX7J3um-uR_wrnoaTbAPzY7lUD3Pl3N4Wpz5Ir5gtm9KPi8rKpULJX-nZEnK1_8YvK8pTp1ghRdznaxQcstxX3Q47TTczBq2t4-IPqMc5KKOeVazLSj_uPiMjx37dRNKqc2Iw04VwukkkoAmNl_ym2WQS9BGsH1ehP5yiDfWD1gSst0QnstAMxglrUpugSGpDelnfy1-ZKLR_Sy4iJVwOWyZt7iFcqtaWsRqIomehXCBg9elsK3DT3Ahf-h)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b5c86dcda034cd9a9b9dedebf907474&_e=LpJgHqQ9FPYewHWmTKV5iM_xWiDU3YpzpZ2qImLPoj2toxkd21HhqBsEbFZBWFt7Ar4BrbX7J3um-uR_wrnoaTbAPzY7lUD3Pl3N4Wpz5Ir5gtm9KPi8rKpULJX-nZEnK1_8YvK8pTp1ghRdznaxQajVC0oTw5PplyISmOrqi_CiRk0QyLl3NBiYXiyV4aW6Q8rwqyQ0z2U5LaJ5psAlYakiPDsLAsQ1DRk8sfOu050-xPq1F1MYxgWgYKvvKLQnUmnT-FMTpdsR0CfGiareFCWZzk2ccWzWGLK70l9AiypUTlHtkU456eQhaXD_87n4)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. name: Courier Newsroom via Blue Amp Action
subject: PETITION: keep Trump off of Facebook and Twitter
body:
More than covfefe
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e26f687-7cd5-4de1-ade8-8f1e9461f3b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Our mission at Courier Newsroom is to combat disinformation and misinformation at the source. One of the worst sources of bad information? Donald Trump. His social media accounts have been the origin of some of the worst content online, with his supporters eagerly believing and spreading his false claims. Right now, Trump and his team are appealing to get his accounts reinstated on prominent social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter. [Today, we’re asking you to join us in urging Facebook and Twitter to uphold Trump’s ban by signing our petition now. We’re working to get 2,000 new signatures today:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dd9b5ab-c5f3-4166-b2a3-66e6a660f36d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcac9d241-0c5a-485e-8394-8790dec98900/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6cfacac-3e58-4f0b-b430-0e598e40a102/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| After years of using these platforms to spread disinformation, incite violence, and ultimately, ignite a deadly insurrection ahead of January 6, 2021 — Trump’s ban from mainstream social media platforms was a necessary step to protecting our democracy. Since then, we’ve learned more about Trump’s role in the insurrection and the influence of his social media posts, thanks to the January 6th Report. The average person wouldn’t be allowed back on a platform after doing any of the things Trump did on social media — let alone all of them. Independent reports have found a major rise in hate, discrimination, and political violence following Trump’s tweets. [Please, take a moment to sign our petition to keep Trump off of Facebook and Twitter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5bfaf3d-646e-45d9-b494-9372feb1f1fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This only takes 30 seconds and will make a serious impact on our work to combat disinformation. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5771875b-2ec9-49ee-8714-7ded54aa5e9d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Everyone at COURIER
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a9bfb19-ef6a-4665-bc8f-e920ab9a1008/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/couriernewsroom-keeptrumpofftwitter-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9e2124a-c732-44fb-9b1f-b2e85625256e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=7a624f07-9ec8-4e92-85ca-52b5799b54a0&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=7a624f07-9ec8-4e92-85ca-52b5799b54a0&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC)
subject: Here’s all you need to know about Republican candidate David Walker:
body:
The stakes for this election are sky-high. Here’s all you need to know abou | | |
---
| | **We'll be blunt: We aren’t taking any chances ahead of New Hampshire's most competitive special elections of 2023. ** Last cycle, state Democrats only flipped _one_ seat in New Hampshire special elections – and that was coming off national wins of the presidency, Senate, and House. But that’s because special elections like these often come down to just a handful of votes, and they’re often underfunded and forgotten. We can't afford to take these races for granted, especially because winning this seat would put us one step closer to FLIPPING the New Hampshire House this year! **_That's why a generous group of donors is triple-matching every gift until January 31 at midnight – so every dollar you chip in will have triple the impact!_ ** **[_It’s why we rely on grassroots donors like you to power state Democrats to victory. Please chip in $7 (goes $21 further!) today, before our critical end-of-month deadline, to push state Democrats across the finish line in special elections like this one >>_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLv40GcQr5QNxgnHXd0dGMOkZAYPrECZHdCcwCsROLWqd7IFSvJpwS4tPM3e2kfq5ItR68nLfW4afbnuH4nr00vRn9r6COJuAAQyZ-MRCoNgHtbIN-RJaZL53i1PuNtQm9v3WRbx2kOAEzYdAYTI0w9DF4K9diRf0OFqa117ldiuFXJBZr8dMQKc0_RvsE3iGZ-343UmxLi9ya3QkGeej-8h6xhEQfdvinzVLrCGS23mZjgGt0lVkA4ZnmyDhVb2UB_2aC1RVel6WzbVd6_IqcTLK4uFNnratPQCKyFKyOvOeCv4yCi0Svg-UBYUdfxgO_bMluKyfeB0DJIFtunBChrIQx8rCOBnz1SOMSVq1Z3sXFjDwdqIR6eRmdnlZm-Odz0VQBBlGDgLPeB9wU61kuPC3ZeIV_9GrhrmOllqB3mwGtQrcMmY5pq_Fcp3NQ4wOGT6f10rFM91qcyQ7sftJjBuDZKqAgN4k1CxASP4QFALA/3t6/GAxNL8DrTLGLMseZ0vsQYw/h0/EG9yGDA4lhGmIxTbLujdV8ZMcs9z1WqpRBc6LCAJiUs)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: The stakes for this election are sky-high. Here’s all you need to know abou | | | | | We'll be blunt: We aren’t taking any chances ahead of New Hampshire's most competitive special elections of 2023. Last cycle, state Democrats only flipped one seat in New Hampshire special elections – and that was coming off national wins of the presidency, Senate, and House. But that’s because special elections like these often come down to just a handful of votes, and they’re often underfunded and forgotten. We can't afford to take these races for granted, especially because winning this seat would put us one step closer to FLIPPING the New Hampshire House this year! That's why a generous group of donors is triple-matching every gift until January 31 at midnight – so every dollar you chip in will have triple the impact! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans control the New Hampshire House by an ultra-thin margin – and if they win this seat, it’ll make it that much harder for Democrats to flip this chamber. We can’t let that happen. This is one of the most competitive races we've seen in 2023 so far — but anything can happen in special elections. [ On Thursday, California Rep. Adam Schiff announced that he is running for the U.S. Senate seat currently held by Sen. Dianne Feinstein. Schiff, a Democrat, tweeted, “We’re in the fight of our lives—a fight I’m ready to lead as California’s next U.S. Senator.” Schiff joins Katie Porter, D-Calif., who announced she is running for the seat earlier this month. Dianne Feinstein has not yet announced her retirement but is widely expected to and Democrats are ready to fill her seat in order to shore up power. See Schiff’s announcement below: ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8li9t3l8dg4tu9a6k7bfu3v3lpmdi8on7l46p88_rp22sh2s8i66pr1ctge4p32clh2bs)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in
2024 to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for
everyone.

Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.

If you’re with me, chip in $10 right now to be one of the Founding Members
of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2023_abs_em_launch

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.U6B5wJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.aZ7DO3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.sfJsy4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.0yUkhh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.3OtEFQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]Screenshot of Schiff for Senate launch video

Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose
leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they
must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical
Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump
is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous
crowd of imitators.

This is the fight of my life — to protect our democracy, build it back
stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of
Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food,
education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed
as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy
fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start
looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can
fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight:

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For
universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To
stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and
progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in
2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this
election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start
preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our
country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his
rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears. Kevin McCarthy just removed me
from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding
them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a
lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground,
no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the
country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the
Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the
end of the day? I'm not accepting corporate PAC money in this race. Even
$3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.U6B5wJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.aZ7DO3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.sfJsy4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.0yUkhh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.3OtEFQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough
for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.

Talk soon,

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1631?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.m1gE9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_IN_20230126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1667%2E5257348%2EARgg02 ]Privacy Policy

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57834562/389252545/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4NGNmNy1iYjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2RoOOBswN5Yd0xJBFxhof5EwruSG04Msoig1-tgEL-U=&emci=51f096d6-0d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=97084cf7-bb9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m up for re-election in 2024 Peter, and as one of just three Senate Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

In fact, 2023 has only just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me.

**[_Peter, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia as we begin the new year to protect our hard-won Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57834563/389252546/-843865763?refcode=20230126.2_ShB_1AE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4NGNmNy1iYjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2RoOOBswN5Yd0xJBFxhof5EwruSG04Msoig1-tgEL-U=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

**[_I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider splitting our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57834564/389252547/-843865763?refcode=20230126.2_ShB_1AE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4NGNmNy1iYjlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2RoOOBswN5Yd0xJBFxhof5EwruSG04Msoig1-tgEL-U=)**

With gratitude,

Sherrod

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benjamin=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Focusing on Unity and Faith this Cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
We had a great week on the campaign trail blazing for the 4th district. | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=fdb59ce1f2&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
#### We are making big waves in the 4th district
# We Can't Wait to Tell You All About it!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| It's been a wonderful week on the campaign trail, and we know we are getting closer than ever to turning this seat RED!
---
|
---
|
### Bible Study, Events, and Doorknocking
I just wanted to check in with you and let you know about all the great things we are doing.

This week I attended a bible study where we got to talk about some of the issues facing America. As a pastor, these bible studies are important because we bring people together.

After all, I became a pastor because I wanted to unite my community, NOT divide it. That is the same exact goal I have brought to my campaign.

Our country is more divided than ever. We NEED to get back to working for the American people, not ourselves. I have dedicated my life to service, which is why I knew God was calling me to run for Congress.

In other news, I attended Mark Early's campaign kickoff. I talked to constituents about the problems we are currently facing in the 4th District. We covered topics like supporting our men and women in blue and one of the most important issues facing our district right now: education reform.

We absolutely cannot compromise when it comes to our children's education. That is why I have advocated for a "money follows the child program". Our schools are struggling under the current system, and it's time that parents were able to choose what education best fits their child's needs.

Lastly, my team and I are out fundraising and doorknocking daily. These are the tedious tasks that make all the difference in an election.

We can't win this without these two crucial components, and the good news is that you can help with both!

By clicking the "contribute" button, you can help me get off the phones and back out there to do the hard work it takes to win an election. We are just a few weeks from election day, and it is more important than ever to raise the money to convert voters and get them out on election day.

If you can't contribute your dollars, we ask you to contribute your time instead. Time is one of the most precious resources in a campaign, and we never seem to have enough of it. Come join us to doorknock and ensure voters turn to the polls. You can sign up to door knock by emailing us at info@benjamin4congress.com.

This is the best chance Republicans will have for a long time to flip this seat RED, and we can't afford to miss out on the opportunity.

With less than four weeks left to election day, we need your help more than ever! Will you join the cause?

---

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxS8D9R94Z7f5DmnaafvvEIfyNzQDL2K7Qi1ywMgbta8vKjw6L7HRmQMXm9RIdQwEkvRid_h2kUnXNOWisSuq-MQsqM9YIJo-IsbDB3JATwksqave-VuwQiCFTZbixLCnxLcTpyvwE7qfRZPa2c9U5es%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxRcdJZml0JGon3OWwCRx6dfkmqgKVIHvzpFhv032XY3M-oZaVp1EY8Lmx0IDyWBrt8Lrb9x-02z7tN0XF_PgsA3Z91MRENUcrKIkT715xAAh4d-JaxEYsV7-OmrqvEQOtKVZxJAtpbs99C_6wLJfvJo%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxaINBDktPqV8DVDTTnqL8_t-VBDNmx5W_Sz3zPAxj74PRBdrD6riGVOhkrc_oxCwDgQZmlmNOycN7Aih2Q6ty6soxdS0fX3ZjnkB_EmIl5x5XUE7Jwzl06kOMKiqx6f5qGoShKTapuo4azymSGGTCHA%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxWKig0tMX-rpM0KxTx5B5if9_9btvradAAco2FPuv6fL_TeEdz4NifgVNGFiw3-G6OslFmgaXH44KO20kyIqFWizVmtMM7h4pXQGFnh3Akeez5Zvbef_D7l0q2C_OAG6yDcfzI1IND9oeherAZi-dh4%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxWjjSLXRugHks4lCciRAMNfeGIoGHWFh2c4hGH4dv0P-DanWcs-dqvcuwQGpThpBLXzCleULvKNHjQ1h78PizjjvrsBxtD82eVLDuABN8Sh3145Lzux7zMNKlf9YhBA0eSDUtxWsD--GtfZoT0G2FF8%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxVniqoQk3G5QcvMqKtKlparPFDxYuIHtJFpG3kMD2NiX9fKOmL--YoRHG1uLL1GWmr_dHk9f3nb3jSg1yHFRtdiyVsYMwdQQwzB-Q-Nm3kDfd7kVmqgSV8q-rDEZphKLkbJFrLJy-l21OmFQUmEw9FQ%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxXmNNKTfnzxOhtyr6Yr2pmLSEmen4VVDI2SOJ28QYbmXASdKA72U04QqJ3CZJSUo6I8rlmdfdEFKxlXV07Y6GB-EM5pqXFE0ueF-J3cjRM3Qk1IWSjirFTl8FkL_UAmM1h5pKhUv5_r0_aCpJncRCdo%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bca12f83ab4c40dd8ad0b3adfc8240da&_e=HshOXds7L4oKnrFOG2BQ0lVgE3V6WsNLtJ7CzxYU0jf5mezCE8hpdE2ifxNlD7r7W6RmmRFOgCvzCbx5WMyXepMTuZ3k5Y1F6I8pfyczF4MR-K80uFXiPKNhuSPtHquft5CVGcD1bx9wT3eHXphTxYXa_FZy_zk4f-ekIVkZi69xu8uS0LUfXf2Zbeze8lqs9jy35ijUrDiXBuYNyxlSY9_UeA-qPVImR5aWGEXZiEWTD_2BmtAoJov8uf3RbfjAiv9AqcDFX7YqckjqeOItt5hN7FMeW9PfIlaVqBNyEAc%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, it won’t be long until they turn their full attention against the American people. That’s why I desperately need your help not only to drain the swamp but to completely defeat it. Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Ramona M.
subject: The good, the bad, and the ugly.

body:
Where do we start?
|
---

Team, I hate being the bearer of bad news. However, things are getting bad for voters in one of our crucial battleground states.
Earlier this month, House Bill 458 was signed into law. This bill will force Ohioans to show a state-issued photo ID when voting in person, denying voting access to many Ohioans that previously voted using an alternate form of identification indicating their current address.
| [**Help our fight against voter suppression**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57851833/389305662/1969562785?refcode=20230126_AOTL_F_ohvotersuppression_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YjhlMzY3LWU4OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hy3duYIuXeYLNNjNzByh5e4xaCV1XCP6ql2LFJvYPCk=)
---
**Here’s what you need to know about the strict voter ID law in Ohio:**
* **Eliminates early voting on the Monday before Election Day.**
* **Shortens the deadline to apply to cast absent voters’ ballots by mail.**
* **Limits polling place accessibility.**

**[Pitch in today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57851834/389305663/1969562785?refcode=20230126_AOTL_F_ohvotersuppression_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YjhlMzY3LWU4OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hy3duYIuXeYLNNjNzByh5e4xaCV1XCP6ql2LFJvYPCk=)**
---
I'll be honest. The fate of fair democracy is on the line as we continue to see these anti-progressive voter suppression tactics pop up across the country. [**Every dollar counts right now, so All On The Line can have resources for volunteers taking action to ensure we advocate for voters across the country to have a voice at the ballot box in the upcoming elections. Chip in now >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57851835/389305664/1969562785?refcode=20230126_AOTL_F_ohvotersuppression_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YjhlMzY3LWU4OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hy3duYIuXeYLNNjNzByh5e4xaCV1XCP6ql2LFJvYPCk=)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Survey inside: Tell me what matters to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends,
Over the weekend, I emailed you about some of my priorities for the year and what you can expect from me and my team over email.
In case you missed it: When I drop into your inbox, it’s going to be because I have something real to say. You’ll see updates from inside the House, info on efforts my colleagues and I are working on together, and my thoughts on the issues that matter most - like ending child poverty, rethinking American foreign policy, innovation and emerging technologies, rebuilding trust in our institutions, etc. You know, small goals! 😅
Here’s the important part for today: I want to learn more about you! Will you take a quick survey and let me know what’s on your mind? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9MaE4oQGW0a9H1y_j5o1zA2]
This survey is partially so I can make sure I’m updating you on the things you care about, but it has a bigger purpose, too. Getting to know you - the people who have shown up and supported me for years now - means that I can show up for you in the halls of Congress. Because that’s what this is all about - speaking up and showing up every day of the year.
So right now, please take the super short survey linked here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9MaE4oQGW0a9H1y_j5o1zA2] and tell me the issues that are most important to you - and what you want to hear about when I reach out.
I’m looking forward to all that we get to learn about each other in the coming weeks!
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sjc-q4-2022-em?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221117-1-EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sjc-q4-2022-em?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221117-1-EM]

Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The last time I was in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The last time I stood in the well of the Senate, I was making the case against the most corrupt president in the history of our country, during his Senate impeachment trial.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1666%2E5257348%2Er9-cdw)
Derek —
The last time I stood in the well of the Senate, I was making the case against the most corrupt president in the history of our country, during his Senate impeachment trial.
The same disgraced, twice-impeached ex-president who is already running again in 2024 — Donald J. Trump.
We’ve seen many more of his abuses of office in the years since. Abuses that have shaken our democracy, and the Senate chamber, to its very core. Like the incitement of a vicious attack on the Capitol on January 6th.
I believe in my heart that the future of our democracy hinges on this next election in 2024. That’s why I’m wasting no time and building a Senate campaign to save it.
**[If you believe, as I do, that this next election will define the future of our democracy, then I am personally asking you to chip in $10 to become a Founding Member of Schiff 2024 before midnight tonight.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1666%2E5257348%2Er9-cdw)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1666%2E5257348%2Er9-cdw)
---
We need a people-powered grassroots movement to weather the relentless attacks we are sure to face from Fox News, Trump, and the Republicans. That’s why your support today, as I announced my run for Senate, is so important.
Every Founding Donor who supports our campaign before midnight tonight is helping to create a Senate that follows the wishes of the American people — not Mitch McConnell and the Trump acolytes in the Republican Party.
Thank you so much for your support,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=12&akid=1666%2E5257348%2Er9-cdw) | | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1631?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.m1gE9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=13&akid=1666%2E5257348%2Er9-cdw)
