subject: Protect Brett Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Sign our petition to demand that the Justices are kept safe!| | | **🚨****BREAKING NEWS ALERT****🚨** **Federal Marshalls expressed concerns about Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh's safety after an angry mob of liberal activists swarmed his home. ** **_[PROTECT OUR JUSTICES, SECURE OUR COURTS](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb0d18616a14a4cbf254ce300798432&_e=UKWCqw8EuTGF3NjQ3T9J723TbfigazUguBZfzd6scq8V1lmM-7JAyde--vFcBfmF7tW02nt8sr5OrB-z7rvOi2ReDPX6tKum5TohCVP9M9kaARHrhZLLTAxHbN4g4kedpVFy874mophCQi2wrPD7ulKHPA2FNFuy1OngFIpVsr3HWezKvDaa1HP4YHULvZRPU0nNB_vIDv5UgFC1FV5YYg%3D%3D)_**
---
| | Peter, The fight to protect America's courts is not about politics; it's about protecting people and our values.
This last year has proven how far the Left will go to get their way. From angry protests to **_[attempted assassinations](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb0d18616a14a4cbf254ce300798432&_e=UKWCqw8EuTGF3NjQ3T9J723TbfigazUguBZfzd6scq8Huz_nEM4U0UVpH4AJVViVrISfZ_IUces5E8NSE-k7v2eYnZD1HTDQIkpsSOhI4zDcFcaiA9UYi7Fop4RpWG8_D5z87IY8v5DzP7MOQcPQdChSa3dYgDZniqZfey6Gv1MTEFZ7NWz2w89dIoBZu5FY_uu-PvaMsyyXvqYy-_xSEA%3D%3D)_** , they will stop at nothing to push their radical agenda.
---
[**HELP US STOP THEM!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb0d18616a14a4cbf254ce300798432&_e=UKWCqw8EuTGF3NjQ3T9J723TbfigazUguBZfzd6scq_JdZgZQPlWitCax_wyqfNE-OdTBHokmO9-ee6GOFQ0hI3x-4rBtWnZBZHa8ifgFg_-T2y7PtosFJ7ntDyAUKaKRf_orBM8Wd1WcXQjuyPi89bokUDz4JKXd9OhpAsilyBi8dBBu6oV5YsaA8ZwSf3FjXb7s76laozUOJycu0isxw%3D%3D)
---
| | **The target of their rage? Conservative members of the U.S. Supreme Court. ** In the last few years, violence against federal judges has drastically risen. In 2020, the son of one federal judge was shot and killed in his New Jersey home. And in the summer of 2022, the situation was almost repeated when an armed man showed up at Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh's home.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb0d18616a14a4cbf254ce300798432&_e=VaspL9BTLcDzDp7nOcnrEIM9fdVAYUvrQe7rsSv-N2TMgj9NFb7MaERBT75zRVteGPhgv2AmlOrDZDNffhQ_JwHdTmHT_ImzghHC0i-w8Pl8bZ_vFEW-IFS8NgSi1SdoN1nWNJSco_ZWTs4blwsD_5lk-BSE1gqmYw8pb-NoOqaPrCoLhU07sgSvP952KnsBboqG9tGLc9gd1bj1C6Yfeg%3D%3D)
---
**One thing is clear: the U.S. Supreme Court justices need to be protected. They sit on our highest court; their safety is of national importance.** Supreme Court Justices should be able to make lawful decisions without being threatened by the violent, radical mob._Do you agree? _
---
[**YES I DO!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb0d18616a14a4cbf254ce300798432&_e=UKWCqw8EuTGF3NjQ3T9J723TbfigazUguBZfzd6scq_qlGz0b5MN8dES7JZjUWwm2_sPJQNk7KUayJMTE4etFytOMVWJEkgJjAND_uDP1lUNfgqkuK8cppYqac868aBcxeaJUcZqhq3qGgMxLTI747wlHCPvnvFxeXb7TpkUREmZGXgUDqev8kPENiWbTWJ4kpHV4GMtarfD60g-EcFBmQ%3D%3D)
---
Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend —

I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone.

Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.

**_If you’re with me, split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link:_** [vpproject.us/schiff](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39131?t=6&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39132?t=7&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39133?t=8&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39134?t=9&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39135?t=10&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39131?t=11&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39131?t=12&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.

_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight:

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

**With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day? Even splitting $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39131?t=13&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39132?t=14&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39133?t=15&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39134?t=16&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39135?t=17&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39131?t=18&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf)
I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.

Talk soon,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6157%2E878179%2Ei9vIJf).**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Are American schools getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa450610e8d4fdbb120c648bedd2415&_e=0dOapfV7xpJmo2dX_-95wtRRp81KcoeT7-9mHD_R5mbMP-RYEs_8sOh6QMoxuNPDuGLW8SvTPCZDtR54O9Z4OaVKcWSSJCiHHjoSM07SdQW29oM_7zAYvvw9Giig0W__K1Ew0xhg_JKa6WzHWFFOYGYX_eNE6eJYCR4RQ7X-HOcj4VqifX0rVtgxOKTPk88Cngc_6V6rZd2Jo2wQ7_czkp_YFT7ue6Br-Uh8nSKjqgt7q8YAvuHACireUHJTe1qI-pvQQd87NjCzHlJpnedyQ0dwwE8pc_VpMTzWDBF2l47pTbOM-x9dxUi8nuqw3_lQhjh_eO6KMNj25RMFfWiY9uvO4ZAcndIrnglTAZhzP03FxK0ZRyeBv7AAe4U5v13-)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa450610e8d4fdbb120c648bedd2415&_e=0dOapfV7xpJmo2dX_-95wtRRp81KcoeT7-9mHD_R5mbMP-RYEs_8sOh6QMoxuNPDuGLW8SvTPCZDtR54O9Z4OaVKcWSSJCiHHjoSM07SdQW29oM_7zAYvvw9Giig0W__K1Ew0xhg_JKa6WzHWFFOYGYX_eNE6eJYCR4RQ7X-HOcj4VqifX0rVtgxOKTPk88Cngc_6V6rZd2Jo2wQ7_czkp_YFT7ue6Br-Uh8nSKjqgsItdsCoaCDC6CLYZUZSlElJ1WqUpdgicou2ftZ9UnRbXO_aLz37B7giGjZQRCtaqQE3LGdukKdEOgh2WBAih9zYXa8htd2ljLmoSOf5-LgCeayKTMMtCE03JSy2Dm7duziqKrV2HbJyVdBXoZ1COfm) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaa450610e8d4fdbb120c648bedd2415&_e=0dOapfV7xpJmo2dX_-95wtRRp81KcoeT7-9mHD_R5mbMP-RYEs_8sOh6QMoxuNPDuGLW8SvTPCZDtR54O9Z4OaVKcWSSJCiHHjoSM07SdQW29oM_7zAYvvw9Giig0W__K1Ew0xhg_JKa6WzHWFFOYGYX_eNE6eJYCR4RQ7X-HOcj4VqifX0rVtgxOKTPk88Cngc_6V6rZd2Jo2wQ7_czkp_YFT7ue6Br-Uh8nSKjqguMtZu05GDCQUL1vr3nvZEJjy3yPs20wOTf9qXFdjjPr5iitpKHvk1B2NtcSjdP_m22stQi9a38Io1Vb69Fx0jUpJ6iGNMSNuRQsYUNXdUYfgdzhTUl7omzgwBjY2z4BkpMtXIVDYIlb8BfChAKlJYv) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

## IMPORTANT MEETING JAN 23RD 6:30PM. El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
|
---
Give me Liberty or Give me Death! I will die on this mountain!
Only 46% of Christians are registered and only 23% of Christians vote. We must close this gap if we want any chance of taking our country back.
I have taken this volunteer position to shift the tide and save our Nation. I need your help, every little bit counts. We are gearing up to head out up and down the state. We will be hitting college campuses, churches, church events, community events, festivals, and much more.
The goal is to register new voters, conduct workshops on constitutional authority, God-given rights, voting, precinct strategies, and empower churches to get into the fight.
We are competing with a monster machine called the Liberal Left. Those like Soros and others control the narrative with billions flooding into political races around the world.
Conservatives and Christians just stand by and complain and most do very little to help solve the problem. The left looks polished and successful, we must look like we are successful to bring people in.
If we could get 100 people to give $50 we could tackle this goal and turn up the heat.
I will die on this mountain, I will keep fighting for you and for our kids. I refuse to turn and run. Give me liberty or give me death! Who can help?
The links are in the comments.

I will die on this | | | IMPORTANT MEETING JAN 23RD 6:30PM. El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA | Give me Liberty or Give me Death! I will die on this mountain! Only 46% of Christians are registered and only 23% of Christians vote. We must close this gap if we want any chance of taking our country back. I have taken this volunteer position to shift the tide and save our Nation. I need your help, every little bit counts. We are gearing up to head out up and down the state. We will be hitting college campuses, churches, church events, community events, festivals, and much more. The goal is to register new voters, conduct workshops on constitutional authority, God-given rights, voting, precinct strategies, and empower churches to get into the fight. We are competing with a monster machine called the Liberal Left. Those like Soros and others control the narrative with billions flooding into political races around the world. Conservatives and Christians just stand by and complain and most do very little to help solve the problem. The left looks polished and successful, we must look like we are successful to bring people in. If we could get 100 people to give $50 we could tackle this goal and turn up the heat. I will die on this mountain, I will keep fighting for you and for our kids. I refuse to turn and run. Give me liberty or give me death! Who can help? The links are in the comments. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57843090/389259553/-1511406121?refcode=em_surv_2023.01.26_b1_dhq_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjU0MTU1Yy1jMzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2K50Tovdp7_wJGF2lFYpcy91P1GyFKlRcrydv6W6o4=) Derek —

Now that Chris is in Congress, one of his first priorities is to take on unchecked corporate greed.

For far too long, Congress has sat back and allowed mega-corporations to gobble up competitors and rake in profits, all while hard-working folks struggle to get by. Whether it’s from a lack of good paying jobs, manufacturing being shipped overseas, or hiked prices, it’s impacting working people every day.

**Chris isn’t owned by mega-corporations or dark money special interests, and he’s ready to bring down costs and bring back jobs. But first, he wants to know: How is corporate greed impacting your life?** | **[LET US KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57843091/389259554/250802856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjU0MTU1Yy1jMzlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2K50Tovdp7_wJGF2lFYpcy91P1GyFKlRcrydv6W6o4=&emci=e92d69d0-a19d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6f54155c-c39d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share something with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57843764/389259962/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjBjMDEtYzQ5ZC1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQ7znGy3A1XT70jDqoWJ6oNot5I9kv5CvdyKdi1TFeo=)
---
I’m used to being written off, Peter. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — _especially when it’s hard_ — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. **I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history.** When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won re-election by _double digits._ Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. [_**Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and HER Time?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57843765/389259964/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjBjMDEtYzQ5ZC1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQ7znGy3A1XT70jDqoWJ6oNot5I9kv5CvdyKdi1TFeo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57843766/389259965/-523917261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230126_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjBjMDEtYzQ5ZC1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQ7znGy3A1XT70jDqoWJ6oNot5I9kv5CvdyKdi1TFeo=)

clean_body: | = I’m used to being written off, Peter. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history. When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won re-election by double digits. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. — Tammy HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I want to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — I’ll be honest, I’m about to ask you to make a contribution ahead of our first fundraising deadline of 2023. But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important — especially today. Last year in the Senate, we made incredible progress, passing legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make quality health care more affordable, tackle the climate crisis, and protect the right to marriage equality for all Americans — no matter who you are or who you love. Your support has allowed me to stay focused on doing my job — and with two more years of a Democratic Majority, we need to keep up all the progress we’ve been making. With so much work still ahead of us in the Senate — from restoring reproductive rights to protecting the right to vote — and I won’t have a lot of time to raise money for our campaign. So, this is where I’m hoping you will step in. Unfortunately, we’re a bit behind on our first fundraising goal of 2023, and we need some help catching up. The response to these emails has always been so great, so I hope I can count on you today: **Peter, I am asking you to add a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford before our first deadline of 2023 expires. Can I count on you? Fellow Patriot,

**We need to get serious, and our country needs to have a good long look in the mirror. Where are we going? On what path are we traveling?**

**_To me? Our country is heading down a dangerous path under President Biden. Crime, out-of-control spending, and so much more are plaguing our country, and they don 't seem to have the plan to fix it._**

I decided to run for the Senate to take back our country and fight for our conservative values. **It 's the same passion that led me to serve in the Marines. **

**[We can turn our country around together. clean_body: It's time to get down to business | Fellow Patriot, We need to get serious, and our country needs to have a good long look in the mirror. Where are we going? On what path are we traveling? To me? Our country is heading down a dangerous path under President Biden. Crime, out-of-control spending, and so much more are plaguing our country, and they don 't seem to have the plan to fix it. I decided to run for the Senate to take back our country and fight for our conservative values. It 's the same passion that led me to serve in the Marines. | - As always, thank you. Sincerely JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: the 2022 midterms left one thing very clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
Eric Holder said, “I’ve believed consistently that wherever Democrats can...”
|
---

Team, the 2022 midterm elections made it clear that, in states where the NDRC’s grassroots movement has helped secure fair maps, _Democrats can win tough races_. | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57844879/389261679/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230126.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhNzA2N2M3LWM0OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X20rip9QjpjTP9LTGmO21lqK50dlYhlC_8kfk9G_anI=)**
---
But while our grassroots movement helped secure fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Minnesota, Michigan, and more, maps in too many other states like Florida, Ohio, Texas, and too many others, are _still_ gerrymandered. **That’s why our work must continue.**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57844884/389261684/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230126.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhNzA2N2M3LWM0OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X20rip9QjpjTP9LTGmO21lqK50dlYhlC_8kfk9G_anI=)**
---
_He’s right!_ Democrats have shown that, when they have the opportunity to compete on a level playing field, they can beat the odds, defy history, and win. That’s why, in 2023, we must keep fighting – state by state, and across the country – to defeat GOP efforts to rig maps and undermine our democracy.
**The NDRC’s fight for fair maps has always been powered by supporters like you. Will you pitch in now to help us replicate our successful strategy to secure fair maps?**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Will you join the Bloc Party?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Have you heard of Bloc Party? It’s a podcast hosted by Waleed Shahid and
Amira Hassan, JD’s communications and political directors.

New episodes will be released every other Thursday, starting today, with
the first episode of season 3. We’ll also bring on more JD staff members
and surprise guests to share their insights, expertise, and perspectives
with the entire movement community — including you!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125743?t=1001&akid=27245%2E1203867%2EPcIczb ]Will you take a moment to subscribe to the Bloc Party and listen to
today’s episode?

Today’s episode of Bloc Party is about Kevin, the never-Kevins, the I
guess-it’s-fine-we’ll-take-him Kevins, and what we should take away from
the Right buckling down for 15 rounds before electing Kevin McMarthy as
speaker. Amira explains a history of Kevin McCarthy’s journey from
California Republican to “Young Gun” to Freedom Caucus, to losing 15
rounds of votes before becoming Speaker.

This episode also asks, what did the far-right win? And is there something
for the left bloc to learn from the Freedom Caucus’ tactics of holding the
line?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125743?t=1002&akid=27245%2E1203867%2EPcIczb ]If you’re interested in hearing the inside scoop about the progressive
movement in this country and learning more about the work behind the
scenes, then listen to Bloc Party today!

More soon,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230126-27245-footer&t=1003&refcode2=27245_1203867_PcIczb&akid=27245%2E1203867%2EPcIczb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=27245%2E1203867%2EPcIczb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Others Complain…But Judicial Watch Acts!
body:
If you have already made a contribution to support Judicial Watch in 2023 thank you!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

If you have recently sent us a contribution for 2023, _I thank you heartily and welcome you to the Judicial Watch “family” of supporters!_!
But I am reaching out today to make _certain_ you're on board in 2023...because [we absolutely need to hear from you due](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz) to the _exploding volume and growing importance_ of our work.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

_In just the past few weeks_ , for example...

* We filed an appeal in Delaware asking the court to overturn a lower court decision, and allow the release of President Joe Biden's U.S. Senate records housed at the University of Delaware. There are more than 1,850 boxes of records spanning Biden's 36 year Senate career at the University. As you can imagine, _our lawsuit has taken on real urgency due to the cascade of stunning revelations about Biden 's handling of classified records_! It is easy now to _complain_ about this scandal...but Judicial Watch, along with our friends at the Daily Caller Foundation, has been in the courts and "on the case" for more than two years!

* We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Defense Department for training materials used at the U.S. Air Force Academy that reflect critical race theory propaganda and promote racial division among Americans. _We filed our lawsuit after the Defense Department stonewalled our original open records request_. Marxist critical race theory has no place at the Academy, and _we are committed to informing the American people about just how pervasive this poisonous teaching has_ _become in American public institutions_.

Of course, [we are fighting public corruption](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz), too.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

In addition to our lawsuits seeking key documents related to Hunter Biden's sleazy overseas business ventures, especially in China, we are bringing pressure on the Republican-controlled House of Representatives to fulfill their oversight duty and launch full investigations into serious allegations of Biden family corruption that may have benefited President Joe Biden...as well as his reckless handling of classified documents!

Our need to police our government officials never ends...corrupt politicians and secretive government bureaucrats cannot police themselves! And no one is working harder than Judicial Watch to expose and challenge them.

And we can do this essential work because... _and only because_ ...of the generous support we receive from our members. With their help, _we don 't let corrupt politicians like Joe Biden off the hook_!

_Nor do we let secretive government officials escape accountability for undermining our Constitution and keeping citizens in the dark about what government is doing_! When they refuse to comply with our open records laws or violate other statutes, we challenge them in the courts.

Indeed, we have a lot of hard work ahead this year...and [that is why I am counting on you to again give us your support!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

_For example, Judicial Watch 's work in the courts supporting law enforcement against illegal immigration has never been more urgent_. Joe Biden is the most radical open-borders president in our history, and the crisis on our southern border proves it.

And our Election Integrity Initiative team is already at work preparing to force more states to clean their voter lists in advance of the 2024 elections!

**On these and so many legal fronts,_Judicial Watch is virtually the only game in town_. Judicial Watch's independent watchdog work leaves Congress and Big Leftist Media in the dust...and _we prove that every day_! **

But these battles are expensive...and we don't have the deep pockets of the government to fund our independent investigations, litigation and public education...instead, [we rely on you and other conservative Americans who share our commitment for upholding the rule of law.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)

_We have proved that with your support our work can literally change the course of history_. [I hope you can help us with a contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)

name: Team AOC
subject: Dealing with the clown car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria had some thoughts on the Oversight Committee.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230126-3832-header&t=1&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)
We’re three weeks into the 118th Congress, and committee assignments have still not been finalized.
At Alexandria’s town hall last week, a concerned constituent asked what Alexandria would do to offset the ‘lunacy’ from Republican-led congressional committees.
This was her response:
“Committee assignments are not official yet... but from what we’ve heard through some of our conversations, it seems as though, on the Republican side, they have appointed Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Paul Gosar to the House Oversight Committee ... Usually when you are an incumbent on a committee, you have first preference to decide if you stay on that committee. That's _usually_ how that goes. **My intention is to stay on the House Oversight Committee and provide full support to Ranking Member Raskin. And we’re also going to have to manage this clown car that’s going on on the other side.”**
She continued:
“I will say that in the past, we have been able to secure certain bipartisan hearings. Now depending on the incoming chair — Congressman [James] Comer — we will see what his appetite is to continue doing that... in the past, we have held bipartisan hearings going after defense contractors and abuse of our public funds by defense contractors.
The DOD is one of the only agencies that has not really been able to pass an audit... I vote against the defense budget every year, and one major reason for that is because of this complete lack of accountability. And we know: if you’ve been a teacher in a school, every single penny that you spend must be accounted for. Every single dollar. In healthcare, in all of this... So in the past, that has been a point of bipartisan hearings, and I've been able, through my questioning, to really go after some of these contractors that have actually resulted in getting funds back from them. But it really depends on what they [Republicans] choose.
Our alternative is to start sending letters directly to the Biden administration on some of these issues. We’ve already started doing that with respect to some issues around immigration, defense, et cetera. **Because whether it’s a Democrat or a Republican, Oversight is necessary.”**
You can watch Alexandria’s full response here:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230126.VLYB5K&refcode=em20230126-3832&t=2&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
Alexandria has been adamant about holding government contractors and corporations accountable to taxpayers — and she will continue to do so on the House Oversight Committee. **But with the addition of far-right committee members, holding these groups accountable may get harder.** [Will you show your support for an Oversight Committee that holds corporations and contractors accountable to the American public by making a contribution today in support of our campaign?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230126.VLYB5K&refcode=em20230126-3832&t=3&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)
[Donate](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230126.VLYB5K&refcode=em20230126-3832&t=4&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230126?refcode=em20230126-3832-P_ENG_EXP_OPP&t=5&refcode2=3832_2526796_qkdpqC&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230126-3832-P_ENG_EXP_OPP&t=6&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3832%2E2526796%2EqkdpqC)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

## The current mission
---
|
---
Give me Liberty or Give me Death! I will die on this mountain!
Only 46% of Christians are registered and only 23% of Christians vote. We must close this gap if we want any chance of taking our country back.
I have taken this volunteer position to shift the tide and save our Nation. I need your help, every little bit counts. We are gearing up to head out up and down the state. We will be hitting college campuses, churches, church events, community events, festivals, and much more.
The goal is to register new voters, conduct workshops on constitutional authority, God-given rights, voting, precinct strategies, and empower churches to get into the fight.
We are competing with a monster machine called the Liberal Left. Those like Soros and others control the narrative with billions flooding into political races around the world.
Conservatives and Christians just stand by and complain and most do very little to help solve the problem. The left looks polished and successful, we must look like we are successful to bring people in.
If we could get 100 people to give $50 we could tackle this goal and turn up the heat.
I will die on this mountain, I will keep fighting for you and for our kids. I refuse to turn and run. Give me liberty or give me death! Who can help?
The links are in the comments.

Over the past month, we’ve seen what’s in store with a Republican-majority House of Representatives. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18dfd55c2f3949e68d8f93af815a9af5&_e=m2Cc7r34DPrVcCJxwIPUUKaZFUjFHtaMzrIJ74ni6aC5YwF6wmyTgKjEL8YTHwrov1cG05hpwKnh7tutgXvWgjyaGloF4j09oSHxeVM8GCzlHK2Ywb6NYWGO-Dlk9h_Ad_AKY4A4ckKjPwbKP66C7DaqdhzIQ1uRSbZKu0zFQiEP47wEy56yHpZM0O_OnJ4tE4760LxRw2OQJIuTBBzVZmB8E3hz0XpOqeOez-n0JZK6Qf2hS_cS5XSq17y-qNjmMK6_H0zjS8-5OGu5KuLFr3Sn-uq1sS_SgFz6glTTmUJfqU2_u1vrMGbpfw9mDxtlJVBFOJo1LY39WfRovHioM16tphanZpSxOTjRznFWj7HCK3T67_uivaFpbBmldIE5)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18dfd55c2f3949e68d8f93af815a9af5&_e=m2Cc7r34DPrVcCJxwIPUUKaZFUjFHtaMzrIJ74ni6aC5YwF6wmyTgKjEL8YTHwrov1cG05hpwKnh7tutgXvWgjyaGloF4j09oSHxeVM8GCzlHK2Ywb6NYWGO-Dlk9h_Ad_AKY4A4ckKjPwbKP66C7DaqdhzIQ1uRSbZKu0zFQiEP47wEy56yHpZM0O_OnJ4tE4760LxRw2OQJIuTBBzVZmB8E3hz0XpOqeOez-n0JZK4nBYmNbEgxCOaU0aEFf_uazL0TmHZIHmr_bDsLLuLH9JrpEcG2cAjd1YJgkaXjen_HeUY6KzVHB6JKLGpYdL3n0i7ctBRc4RtveRS2T5h5oJYg_fwXuhyG4r0Puiq9mpblsEn5P9ujhZ1AVMcRxt0)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18dfd55c2f3949e68d8f93af815a9af5&_e=m2Cc7r34DPrVcCJxwIPUUKaZFUjFHtaMzrIJ74ni6aC5YwF6wmyTgKjEL8YTHwrov1cG05hpwKnh7tutgXvWgjyaGloF4j09oSHxeVM8GCzlHK2Ywb6NYWGO-Dlk9h_Ad_AKY4A4ckKjPwbKP66C7DaqdhzIQ1uRSbZKu0zFQiEP47wEy56yHpZM0O_OnJ4tE4760LxRw2OQJIuTBBzVZmB8E3hz0XpOqeOez-n0JZJIqwoIqyoc5cJYpUG6Xlz0XOzVj2a3kkzQU4xOaO0yPvezbGSvL66hco08zbG_RUxL_fKJbLZWsojfHo7dJ-snXcMkQkasabOXzx4fKyLDay_kGrlZ_Hb4HzJEMCDsBXBPhXD-48cNLxpdAbTwAbF-)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18dfd55c2f3949e68d8f93af815a9af5&_e=m2Cc7r34DPrVcCJxwIPUUKaZFUjFHtaMzrIJ74ni6aC5YwF6wmyTgKjEL8YTHwrov1cG05hpwKnh7tutgXvWgjyaGloF4j09oSHxeVM8GCzlHK2Ywb6NYWGO-Dlk9h_Ad_AKY4A4ckKjPwbKP66C7DaqdhzIQ1uRSbZKu0zFQiEP47wEy56yHpZM0O_OnJ4tE4760LxRw2OQJIuTBBzVZmB8E3hz0XpOqeOez-n0JZKQGxkF9pEJ6V_sCWLRsT8hz5g2V4AzPOTspgnxtEYVRU44NeqO0aLUuDb0kfk8qb5EsDQHrLf8Yqgbe1fn__9PJEV52_kJI5jc6Nncbhh03AvIWiQoRBAylgFxjrFgJBdrQzKc7VnSYE4h8aL7Euc5)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18dfd55c2f3949e68d8f93af815a9af5&_e=m2Cc7r34DPrVcCJxwIPUUKaZFUjFHtaMzrIJ74ni6aC5YwF6wmyTgKjEL8YTHwrov1cG05hpwKnh7tutgXvWgjyaGloF4j09oSHxeVM8GCzlHK2Ywb6NYWGO-Dlk9h_Ad_AKY4A4ckKjPwbKP66C7DaqdhzIQ1uRSbZKu0zFQiEP47wEy56yHpZM0O_OnJ4tE4760LxRw2OQJIuTBBzVZmB8E3hz0XpOqeOez-n0JZJCw8qRVt8Mp9g6HdqK440yW96DEaYQzfaM2-beP8_LuM-g_c5gkmPAfE-Xs_qmlAZfR3J2hf48myuhUg79PTl91W050m9Q0-c023zN9AN-PNKG7HfImZLKB6lfjIXX8p5BWYYdteUaXwx6xs6Ox-di)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

“C’mon in!”- no questions asked.")**_

We don't know who they are or where they came from, and Democrats see no issue with them coming in and making a mockery of our laws.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: Kristi Noem vs. South Dakota Freedom Caucus
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
**Friends,**

You’re getting a lot of emails from us this week. But a lot is happening...and some big news dropped today!

**SOUTH DAKOTA**

Yesterday, we wrote to you about how South Dakota Kristi Noem was pushing a $200 million “economic development” bill over the objections of the SD Freedom Caucus.

Today, on the front of the Fox News website, comes [a story](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ec155233a8&e=64ecec6d03) about how Noem is unconstitutionally sponsoring bills in the South Dakota legislature. That’s right. The Governor, head of the Executive Branch, is sponsoring bills as if she’s in the legislature.

>From the [Fox article](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=6fa4721e40&e=64ecec6d03):

_"The governor and the executive agencies seem to conveniently forget we have three branches of government, not one," said [South Dakota Freedom Caucus member Tina] Mulally, who argued against the bills in a committee hearing. "It’s the difference between a Republic and a despotism."_

The SD Freedom Caucus has promised to block all 84 of her bills unless she removes her name as sponsor.

Meanwhile, a South Dakota House committee is doing real harm to America’s individual freedoms.

The South Dakota House State Affairs Committee voted 12-0 that January 6 detainees should not be treated humanely or fairly.

Later that day, this same committee heard a resolution that would amend the state’s constitution, affirming the right of a person to reject any vaccines. They killed the measure, 11-1.

This sort of hostility to freedom, in a deep red state, is a very real thing. It’s happening across the country. The South Dakota Freedom Caucus has no members on this committee, but rightfully is trying to expose this routine abuse of liberty.

**MISSISSIPPI**

If you live in the Magnolia State (and even if you don’t), please tune in and subscribe to SFCN State Director Steven Utroska’s radio show and podcast, [Liberty Wake-Up Call](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=16ca7c8fd6&e=64ecec6d03).

**ELSEWHERE**

Writing in _The Federalist_ , James Silberman [explains](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0bb948065c&e=64ecec6d03) how the House Freedom Caucus stood strong against Kevin McCarthy in the Speaker’s race and how that sort of courage needs to spread across the states. Quoting two state freedom caucus members, he writes:

_[Idaho Freedom Caucus member Scott] Herndon explained that the success of the 20 holdouts should inspire grassroots conservative momentum:**“I do expect Freedom Caucus growth around the country, and as the state-level Freedom Caucus Network expands, we’re going to see that it can be effective as a balance against the establishment.”** On Jan. 3, as the House battle was raging, a coalition of 14 Montana state legislators announced the formation of the Montana Freedom Caucus. Commenting on the new group, Montana State Sen.Theresa Manzella posted, **“Did you watch the House Freedom Caucus block the election of the left-leaning speaker today? Small in number, but strong and strategic. We hope to be as effective at the state level!”**_

Help us be as effective as the House Freedom Caucus! Please donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network TODAY.

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=92063aa295&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
|
Keep fighting,

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=03442e00bc&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

Today, on the front of the Fox News website, comes about how Noem is unconstitutionally sponsoring bills in the South Dakota legislature. That’s right. The Governor, head of the Executive Branch, is sponsoring bills as if she’s in the legislature. From the : "The governor and the executive agencies seem to conveniently forget we have three branches of government, not one," said [South Dakota Freedom Caucus member Tina] Mulally, who argued against the bills in a committee hearing. "It’s the difference between a Republic and a despotism." The SD Freedom Caucus has promised to block all 84 of her bills unless she removes her name as sponsor. Meanwhile, a South Dakota House committee is doing real harm to America’s individual freedoms. The South Dakota House State Affairs Committee voted 12-0 that January 6 detainees should not be treated humanely or fairly. Later that day, this same committee heard a resolution that would amend the state’s constitution, affirming the right of a person to reject any vaccines. They killed the measure, 11-1. This sort of hostility to freedom, in a deep red state, is a very real thing. It’s happening across the country. The South Dakota Freedom Caucus has no members on this committee, but rightfully is trying to expose this routine abuse of liberty. MISSISSIPPI If you live in the Magnolia State (and even if you don’t), please tune in and subscribe to SFCN State Director Steven Utroska’s radio show and podcast, . ELSEWHERE Writing in The Federalist , James Silberman how the House Freedom Caucus stood strong against Kevin McCarthy in the Speaker’s race and how that sort of courage needs to spread across the states. Quoting two state freedom caucus members, he writes: [Idaho Freedom Caucus member Scott] Herndon explained that the success of the 20 holdouts should inspire grassroots conservative momentum:“I do expect Freedom Caucus growth around the country, and as the state-level Freedom Caucus Network expands, we’re going to see that it can be effective as a balance against the establishment.” On Jan. 3, as the House battle was raging, a coalition of 14 Montana state legislators announced the formation of the Montana Freedom Caucus. Commenting on the new group, Montana State Sen.Theresa Manzella posted, “Did you watch the House Freedom Caucus block the election of the left-leaning speaker today? Small in number, but strong and strategic. We hope to be as effective at the state level!” Help us be as effective as the House Freedom Caucus! Please donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network TODAY. | "CLICK HERE TO DONATE" | Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. | | | | | Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved.

body:
| | | I’m so proud of our progress. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sXTSfTgRnzkO2IcbdwRjv5TcQqJaEpZGA2p_qkwpRBtpaQ-Fyamqr5dM5UzcKVuRD1_8IUbUS7eVraVx8BVAHByxQfUSxZriLzBrlH1Znk39riqmi1zhXwytU7ggb05OOlHCNBDbFJmGEl0vfoSBrUSfs5Lz9fnO7Vve2G5BhkNG6KFUjAIRtuuvdH82-dQngZRquoOL1WbLi4MuO9W2i3AXwwIPqeMspqFm6RAU5hxLZdAYpfiaUNDUrn7vxVtlxuu-Mg_mNg-2AfycerWz9m9JuEyAaX0-C_F9gamnDeTQncyiD5-pCJSGFLDUBjpjqQ/3t6/VQ98LRgkQmW8M4Og6R7doA/h0/XdSdmTZMGmO-rMYhS0URhM42LQkwik72zLihldJD5_I)

| Team,

In a few days, my time as AZ Dems Chair is up. But as things wind down, I wanted to reach out to our grassroots team one more time.

**First off, let me say THANK YOU.** Without supporters like you, we would not have had the success we had in 2022. A Democratic statewide trifecta – Governor, Attorney General and Secretary of State _had not been accomplished since the 1970s, until now._

We re-elected Senator Mark Kelly as well, and, despite new district lines, maintained our standing in the state legislature with just one seat away from gaining control of either chamber.

As you probably know, serving in the state legislature is my other job while also chairing the state party. My colleagues have honored me by electing me as leader of our State Senate caucus, and in fairness to everyone, I’m stepping down as state party chair.

I have watched as our team – you included – has taken Arizona from a deep red state to one that is purple, and quickly turning blue. Which is why I wanted to reach out one more time before I step down as chair.

_This work is hard, and it takes a lot of effort and a lot of resources._ But I want to make sure this team knows the work isn’t over. We need a Democratic legislature to work with Governor Hobbs and our other statewide elected Democrats. We need to win back a few Congressional seats. **_And we need to start all of that work right now._**

Team, while my titles are changing, my dedication to building a better Arizona is not. I hope your dedication to that shared goal doesn’t change either.

**[Will you do me one last favor and make sure the next party chair knows they have a huge grassroots supporters team willing to help them finish the job of turning Arizona completely blue? The best way to do that is by donating $10 or whatever you can afford today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sXTSfTgRnzkO2IcbdwRjv5TcQqJaEpZGA2p_qkwpRBtpohSE_NesYi1EBfeCbHEgKlz-UwqymddUisdvvqumonro0OA1dGn_zR9uKj3Zc8LE3LBfex1h5jgNAjEkDH1PVpSoTRPjrbxIXT_B95LQaytGtROm8KNyB58Qtm_pvWUaxeapSewcfZYjUrD47CvKbjUqfgqYjGtzOhUAXzyzSPK_T_90H2zbz7E7xdsTN4u7BIGDS7zgjPFWApFzsZmPUajK9oKCNKNuwlF7j0jC6VWDCTHgYfZ7kIqRAoZi01ipveoPzYadDcQpOhCoCF0ZIg/3t6/VQ98LRgkQmW8M4Og6R7doA/h1/V-7pB_fMcM90btNH09y6eIAJo8rUJECj-MQDuNj0414)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QZ8qye5TB3xowGYXwLTwGP_MQp50JGfT5s8uROXzb_DQIvoWIkkMp99avXg57mJMQj4Xf0Ranoqyr8b6_5POJOs4lSf5golUFvLoTYa4uwbHts4YyaghG8dsac3PCMlS8etzT-ZZCWs6eg8wUDSl6HbrNtQDrZBU2tw6ijmqgItxt7VxP2tqkj7If4T-mNlGQ08qapvqlKd1nHsbpxxRDoKgK0zwmHsJcnQX_ovI6C5XNldNgTtsxod8IiY8ZY75rF97ryM9IdqefoKGMK6D3trw8S8AxjUYVfwe9cZzGEH62LGsMxRN-TBGz6HjmNcXBI0VJautA3QD8bg0kuW5r7pzxygMa9TOI4GEGfllVZ9I/3t6/VQ98LRgkQmW8M4Og6R7doA/h2/RT2FLpiPrFfNouqOW5vTgopOHFtong7An2Y7hNQS-_Y)

name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0303ea569f4fbfae0a91c04907c7dd&_e=x7S8FdtRPo0roH-o7ZaLp3yHbXtBnG-XKCE8r73yLl_uNmA3ITkAVxPzB8KcitfaZz5R0YirIwIcwWPnJAhQExiR2CORsgvnXtzPBbRKl_LLVOvIUdTswyXV1Xk6Q7-_KTCIdTnN0DjYdpwWE_zg0WKtPw8EnzEF3LSs9lxEFYO4IuQZRIMfQobEdUU_85XA4vwfzGcrg3f_6w7C7M-vjZi0_S26lt8b9zj75--9ypciE4JXk9ba2HlSsoaiK-wxknDZGYkurdlA5TWHmlYvLCixQPaEkiXsO2At61scdq0%3D) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0303ea569f4fbfae0a91c04907c7dd&_e=x7S8FdtRPo0roH-o7ZaLp3yHbXtBnG-XKCE8r73yLl_uNmA3ITkAVxPzB8KcitfaZz5R0YirIwIcwWPnJAhQExiR2CORsgvnXtzPBbRKl_LLVOvIUdTswyXV1Xk6Q7-_KTCIdTnN0DjYdpwWE_zg0fG3J1MpqN9ALt1ajJojP4ppGaOv3NDs_zOAPF0EadIpie43sno_EUigOI1F9wHSGr-ZEkjg0K5wW4eVOLfVyAdkJhbNvDsO_TSzQyNIo9tz1tZxit9P4SlnGZ1nP4_SITCL5mNRm4jFtriyiZQ98y0%3D) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0303ea569f4fbfae0a91c04907c7dd&_e=x7S8FdtRPo0roH-o7ZaLp3yHbXtBnG-XKCE8r73yLl_uNmA3ITkAVxPzB8KcitfaZz5R0YirIwIcwWPnJAhQExiR2CORsgvnXtzPBbRKl_LLVOvIUdTswyXV1Xk6Q7-_KTCIdTnN0DjYdpwWE_zg0Vd0oCvnsIyPFmTIzbnNDtUxgjHzieEs9H1Q0gbhxECf6tmRuAl2M5GtqzAeZnIYKymOvI2kj6FzkUybBaTh6zRHYFyvbCp6bE5nvxbR5qyGHI0n4NodAwKf48bPm9o6odTkxewMnmXVIF6Dox_Ip8w%3D) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0303ea569f4fbfae0a91c04907c7dd&_e=x7S8FdtRPo0roH-o7ZaLp3yHbXtBnG-XKCE8r73yLl_uNmA3ITkAVxPzB8KcitfaZz5R0YirIwIcwWPnJAhQExiR2CORsgvnXtzPBbRKl_LLVOvIUdTswyXV1Xk6Q7-_KTCIdTnN0DjYdpwWE_zg0esZldAUnWvNbRxA0HvEHfAQj-4JXTmEZGsB6yNvvct2EJHfLHt9EX2cSgqSkFuxhhPm472opCYP_p-ooJ40qlkUqZrG84UqUGuJDsjDagU7eAU-9U4czIt-Tw8mF7Uwk0oo6gARVRuJdgnEFUfWGSQ%3D) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. body:
It doesn't take much to make a difference.

| |
---
Folks, it doesn't take much to make a big difference for our campaign. Our recurring donors keep our campaign going. Their ongoing support enables us to register and mobilize thousands of El Pasoans in the fight for grassroots change. That work must start now since Veronica's campaign is already gearing up for her reelection in LESS than two years. It will fly by. _**I'm not talking about big-money donors — I'm talking about everyday people like you and me. Working people who are passionate about our community, and believe a better world is possible.**_ They chip in a few bucks a month to support Veronica's campaign, and it makes a world of difference. _In fact, our average recurring contribution is just $25.29!_ ****[Contribute $25.29 Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849104/389268335/-1291653745?refcode2=d9b6bc6e-cd9d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&recurring=true&amount=25.29&refcode=230126_lz_recurring_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWI2YmM2ZS1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pk7foiQO8gWi-t4LGnWlGj_NcjKwOdCTi2wyZ9JGtQ8=)**** It doesn't take much, friend, when we all work together. body:
The path to retaking the House runs through California’s 38th district, but we must start laying the groundwork now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849229/389268844/-898182101?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230126-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTQ5ZWRmYi1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tN3GeNViMaYrIrsXvZCsdRk3xvER3sifVTNVwq94I8s=)

Peter,

As one of seven kids from a working-class family, I am proud to fight for families just like mine in Congress every day.

2022 was a landmark year for progress on our most pressing issues. Together with my Democratic colleagues, we took action on climate change, fought to bring down costs for families, and worked to protect reproductive freedoms when they were on the chopping block.

And thanks to supporters like you, I am back in Congress this year to continue the work I was elected to do.

But with Republicans back in control of the House and eyeing the Senate in 2024, we cannot afford to slow our momentum. The path to retaking the House runs through California’s 38th district. That is why we must start laying the groundwork now.

[_**Will you support my work in Congress by becoming a Founding Donor today? Anything you can give, even $3, will go a long way in bringing back the focus to the working class.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57849230/389268845/-572979983?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230126-1-EM&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTQ5ZWRmYi1jZDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tN3GeNViMaYrIrsXvZCsdRk3xvER3sifVTNVwq94I8s=)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4616bb06acc4b84ae58f2e3a5d31bc8&_e=7vrM0F8ZS2uBzBdP0-MG6KiQOuWNbv90azigpYe1KpMBNBlyUSTrq_LWUYEjCjTHvDbZkH2GGYYhzVHpMvFlEyKRTNLY2uRO614fqJKhij-8WRE560JUMbxGE_1sU_a4mqQ-y7Kwh9iwt8iSSeX1VlgvHKYMK5H9_Cuql_5MXyL7H4ZcfFg9Ae_4bT-BWOaVEOJpHJ_TTJoizBQiK-IVb00sHM5wpe_xKlZZx-Zp6xNpaqlINhMbo-xNTR9nHXXhVur2sP4-9SAzjwOU5lwtNrCT_hnjxowim82ikwiXMgK26-Q7tl2d32zwQ4pUDEQtFM07AcrrqvLZ7KajeVpy3yWVxzkE7XXiwqmXAenSvRLPEsVmi_pgP-PD9mXIsAPv)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4616bb06acc4b84ae58f2e3a5d31bc8&_e=7vrM0F8ZS2uBzBdP0-MG6KiQOuWNbv90azigpYe1KpMBNBlyUSTrq_LWUYEjCjTHvDbZkH2GGYYhzVHpMvFlEyKRTNLY2uRO614fqJKhij-8WRE560JUMbxGE_1sU_a4mqQ-y7Kwh9iwt8iSSeX1VlgvHKYMK5H9_Cuql_5MXyL7H4ZcfFg9Ae_4bT-BWOaVEOJpHJ_TTJoizBQiK-IVb00sHM5wpe_xKlZZx-Zp6xOMwXPUmFweojQju8nPIQmzMRW10lxSwRJtj2X0KTIFYly_K--RK5BmaDhwltDlLGt7OuJcGwT78ChZdCbRxlqsl2UeohN_ZkR7UE6o-CgJLFkCD3ioH6jW1iGqRBJnMF4uQx3ZNrs_d-AxpY1BwZul) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4616bb06acc4b84ae58f2e3a5d31bc8&_e=7vrM0F8ZS2uBzBdP0-MG6KiQOuWNbv90azigpYe1KpMBNBlyUSTrq_LWUYEjCjTHvDbZkH2GGYYhzVHpMvFlEyKRTNLY2uRO614fqJKhij-8WRE560JUMbxGE_1sU_a4mqQ-y7Kwh9iwt8iSSeX1VlgvHKYMK5H9_Cuql_5MXyL7H4ZcfFg9Ae_4bT-BWOaVEOJpHJ_TTJoizBQiK-IVb00sHM5wpe_xKlZZx-Zp6xNg9qW7NDRQ9A_b-NJlmvUyLMqpiHiwFmz83zOVlqVxvFjXQ43cgA-yqxZd7ZsOwNvm6zErZnBpRdvdPzlu8psU2vHVhOe_tWuhBFTbQZRYefAeR4GrGfSXufb5b2M1_HUgpwZpIBDvvGemVAtQAqNu) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.

clean_body: Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? | | | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Every supporter counts | Friend, My team just texted me to tell me that we still haven’t hit our January fundraising goal. But we only have a few days left... Have you chipped in yet, Friend? I hate to ask you, but I don’t have a shot at winning this Senate race if we don’t have your support. | We can’t afford to start this campaign on the wrong foot. I’d hate to miss this first crucial goal. Thank you, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| Help us celebrate Kevin McCarthy’s birthday and make Adam Schiff his U.S. Senator.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1675%2E5257348%2EsHnUe1)
Derek, today is a very special day... and not just because Adam launched his campaign for the U.S. Senate.
Today is Kevin McCarthy’s 58th birthday, and what better way to celebrate it than by helping ensure Kev is represented in the U.S. Senate by a leader like Adam Schiff, who’s dedicated his life to public service, to California, and to our democracy.
**[Can we count on you to chip in today to help us give Kevin McCarthy the greatest birthday gift of all by making Adam Schiff — Kevin McCarthy’s Senator? subject: Here’s how grassroots support shaped our future:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The real power of our movement is in everyone on this team coming together and pitching in a little to accomplish a whole lot. | |
---
When I say that grassroots supporters like you power the Democratic National Committee’s work, I really mean it, Derek. Just take a look:
* Last year’s midterms were our strongest cycle for grassroots fundraising _ever_
* Folks like you made over 2.5 million donations last year alone!
* **98% of all of the gifts made to the DNC were under $200.**_98%!_ And our average online gift was just $30.

[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJTuIqr9HOMmVZlOQ_CFcw4xIthUYqB9Kia3vvOZVkUCmM541E6havZweiOFIvOk8QXR-UlR5gbhzJr7zBYzGyQsMgduhkViI3uc2O9FvTC-FyGPICOjzVSXjBd1ISKNFuZbKPrTqnbgedIuHRjWNUB0Rz94tWnip19pxAwcu-kcELO-Hr7VtDr9U1QIUi3iJhyn1zW5Sr7k-5YIO9uWSoXfJWBs3Xa5fN7fjyBJc2qp1pS_EQHcZFEVfWxL4PcbCGBrZXMke98gKH6oCaldypbZZ1E1-kwztesu4TqX4SKeNEczafHerXv-wWb_D_BObVqDL2tpRrX6VVbuEtPL6BsR4NfYtkDusQ7gc_zqNvJnZ6laWil3H-6ucj81Vq3pLLdd_mNX99YAWhTCO7rJW5D7EAnLQJjEibppE6wB3-faon2FHsZ5U8Fy4E2A3pTlWWObrYsGtdQ5YOyFPnhoegONpHh2HGZ9-KC1pMUHxTolGrvHC86_Sz-EqK686AmwDeO5WFVACIZI3yatNnooZqzVw6YVZiHt90-xA3ZVuHZVE8mCLTRvwk4ZcCqktuXuBKmX49BgTJ80XY-F8vPFjFpAAO_Hjq9soizNT2kDUPOzDTfr54XinmZpzKaYL-nkwAZL_ifl-_4vCDo6hqb51LIbYm-nER_2svMQupARhDrxkuosTP3GZDGOeeADX3TAcGqtMFtG_cdInpl4XMyVOPPAHIDw-ncyxE5MyKL752rWAc4sopmex2X97lkBlM-eatJI3jalCqLpEPwvNabirGY_QsogvD1jTJgcfw-B7u9Ry4pNn1-ap3biA6zCxuzvygJp0zcC3TEjePC5ikKO2ZrZZv6CPVSoOrmk3rq_6ub4I/3t6/muUDDiubR5Wnw0YI53j9vw/h0/w8c1r8gGsBFi0sJ-XmLnD596nScjn15x1fPn6cKBngY)
That's pretty astounding, Derek. What it highlights for me is your $3, $5, or $7 donation is a real building block for our party's foundation. **As we approach our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023, the DNC is tracking behind where we need to be.** If we want to keep delivering for Democrats in the coming years, we have to build a strong party infrastructure, and support from grassroots donors like you is crucial to that effort. **Donate $10 and we’ll get your personalized membership card in the mail as soon as we can. You can rest assured that you’re fighting for the Biden-Harris agenda as an official member of this grassroots team.**

As I said, 98% of all gifts made to the DNC were under $200 -- the real power of our movement is in _everyone on this team coming together and pitching in a little to accomplish a whole lot._ **[I hope you’ll chip in a few bucks to the DNC today.
