clean_body: The real power of our movement is in everyone on this team coming together and pitching in a little to accomplish a whole lot. | | When I say that grassroots supporters like you power the Democratic National Committee’s work, I really mean it, Derek. Just take a look: Last year’s midterms were our strongest cycle for grassroots fundraising ever Folks like you made over 2.5 million donations last year alone! 98% of all of the gifts made to the DNC were under $200.98%! And our average online gift was just $30. That's pretty astounding, Derek. What it highlights for me is your $3, $5, or $7 donation is a real building block for our party's foundation. As we approach our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023, the DNC is tracking behind where we need to be. If we want to keep delivering for Democrats in the coming years, we have to build a strong party infrastructure, and support from grassroots donors like you is crucial to that effort. Donate $10 and we’ll get your personalized membership card in the mail as soon as we can. You can rest assured that you’re fighting for the Biden-Harris agenda as an official member of this grassroots team. ** The results we see every November are determined in large part by how big our investments are early on in the election. If we fall behind this month --any month really \-- critical investments in voter protection, data and technology, and organizing might be impacted down the line. Thankfully, it really doesn’t take a big donation to make a difference. As I said, 98% of all gifts made to the DNC were under $200 -- the real power of our movement is in everyone on this team coming together and pitching in a little to accomplish a whole lot. Thank you, Patrick Patrick Stevenson Chief Mobilization Officer Democratic National Committee P.S. 98% of the contributions made to the DNC are from grassroots donors like you, Derek! We’re relying on your support to keep hitting our goals to build a strong party infrastructure for the elections in 2023 and 2024. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

This week, I’ll be the FIRST Republican presidential candidate to campaign in the FIRST primary state of New Hampshire. But I’m counting on patriots like YOU to help me show just how much momentum we’ve built ahead of this critical campaign stop with a SURGE of grassroots contributions. | | In the final weeks of the midterms, instead of sending additional support to our America First candidates in Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, and Pennsylvania, loser Mitch sent $7 MILLION to Alaska. Why? Because McConnell cared more about electing liberal RINOs than he did about winning back the majority and saving America. Once again, the Washington Swamp put you last, Friend. But just like I did as your President, I will ALWAYS put you FIRST... ...Because this campaign has only ever been about one thing: WE THE PEOPLE taking back our country. That’s why I’m going directly to the grassroots patriots of New Hampshire who will be the FIRST to vote in next year’s primary. And as we prepare for this critical trip, I’m counting on your support to PROVE just how much momentum we’ve already built. Thank you, | Donald J. name: John Fetterman
subject: Not how I do politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let me start by saying that I’m not an ultra-millionaire.
#
Let me start by saying this, Derek: **I’m not an ultra-millionaire.**
And I’m not a fan of calling up ultra-millionaires + asking for their money, either.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230126-1?refcode=em20230126-8216&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)
_^This is not how I do politics_
When I say we’re a grassroots team funded by folks like you, **I mean it.** We don’t take a single dollar for granted. Each + every dollar we raise helps me to focus on fighting for working people in the U.S. Senate. NOT calling up mega-donors.
In fact, the finance folks on my team even get an email every single time someone donates!!!
Yep, that means when you donate to this email, someone on our team will see that and do a little happy dance.
[**_Want to inspire a happy dance today, Derek? Make a donation of any amount to support my work in the Senate, even just $3. Every donation adds up._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230126-1?refcode=em20230126-8216&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230126-1?refcode=em20230126-8216&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)**
Believe me when I say this: your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. Every single dollar makes a huge difference, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.S. If my finance team sees your name come across our ActBlue tonight, I might catch them rocking out like this. 👇 **_[But only if you chip in by clicking here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230126-1?refcode=em20230126-8216&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)_**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230126-1?refcode=em20230126-8216&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230126-8216-footer&t=1&refcode2=8216_434096_spB2uh&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8216%2E434096%2EspB2uh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: URGENT DEADLINE: Tell President Biden to cut dangerous methane pollution (signature needed)
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9131213&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDYxNDgwMAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDYxNDgwMAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9131213&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDYxNDgwMAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDYxNDgwMAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_V6kCg/SjdYdmI2Nm9kWU1MS2gxaW4xVU9KbGVpbnlLYUZQNSt2d0ZqaUZLR1MyeHozSnlGWTBmU0FmT1FiZnJxSkw5MG5IZ2VSNnhablVrN1RiVytWTERLcU0xak9WRmZzUWo5ZjZ6VWpaSml2bXc9S0/Y1ErWGw0VmlLZ2lWcjRJVXFxSDJ5VVo2cGtOaUJGd2h6RmJkb25KL2pyUFBTWkpZTDd3L2dGU3YzSDNXMnlQRFdKMmRsUGZuUHNBM0JWbDVMQ2preXlQS2JKWG5pSzFOS0 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9gDr4JV/SjdYdmI2Nm9kWU1MS2gxaW4xVU9KbGVpbnlLYUZQNSt2d0ZqaUZLR1MyeHozSnlGWTBmU0FmT1FiZnJxSkw5MG5IZ2VSNnhablVrN1RiVytWTERLcU0xak9WRmZzUWo5ZjZ6VWpaSml2bXc9S0/
